body:
“Democracy was on the line in this election – and the American people showed...”
|
---

Team, after last November’s elections, Attorney General Eric Holder said this: **“Democracy was on the line in this election – and the American people showed decisively that we’re not willing to let it go.”** | **[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57980056/389676596/1068403165?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230129_FR_1N_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZhM2M2OTA1LTMxYTAtZWQxMS05OTRjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ZhIwIX0kEs4qlG8fJXX-25m-cLS-48sIuY7fO_McPN0=)**
---
**_He’s 100% right!_** Thanks to the incredible support of this grassroots movement, the NDRC helped secure major victories in the midterm elections.
**[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57980057/389676597/1068403165?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230129_FR_1N_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZhM2M2OTA1LTMxYTAtZWQxMS05OTRjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ZhIwIX0kEs4qlG8fJXX-25m-cLS-48sIuY7fO_McPN0=)**
---
But then, A.G. Holder also said this:
**“We must recommit ourselves to defend against ongoing threats to our elections, our right to vote, and our democracy. Now is not the time to take our democracy for granted.”**
**_And he’s 100% right about that too!_**

With election deniers continuing to attempt to undermine voting rights, conservative politicians continuing their efforts to manipulate maps, and right-wing activists working to fill courts with judges who they believe will rubber-stamp their anti-democratic agenda, it’s clear that the threats to our free and fair elections have not subsided. **_So our work to defend our democracy must continue._

[_Please: Will you heed A.G. Holder’s words and recommit yourself to the fight to defend democracy by making an urgent donation to the NDRC before the end-of-month deadline? Every dollar you give will help power our efforts to protect voting rights, secure fair maps, and more._](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57980058/389676598/1068403165?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230129_FR_1N_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZhM2M2OTA1LTMxYTAtZWQxMS05OTRjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ZhIwIX0kEs4qlG8fJXX-25m-cLS-48sIuY7fO_McPN0=)**

body:
Taking direct action by engaging with voters over the phone is one of the most impactful things you can do to help Democrats win next week. | |
---
Derek -- Pennsylvania is having special elections -- and we have the opportunity to elect more Democrats to the state house. We need folks like you to step up and help make a difference, **[so we’re inviting you to join Team DNC as we make calls to Pennsylvanians.](https://click.act.democrats.org/ss/c/XlxiKm-amnZREMhISCI1HXgISUQ6kaMw7miBXrv1T3N51xiKWWbRHfQTM3gM6C825Re_bIiUHmNqMZpNoW_h9O3a1cXWOB0hFqs4LRvS7QrwKhLhVQIbMLn2Ebc5HyXfJ6-6KXtK4zSmXY0PIsxB3cDcXHUkOXqPMX6O5mqOoHNOL1iHDS021M4ZDE-J902tg_bv8IJuJaX8tZGtyOniv9BKqA253tsthWs8NYuLPvJrVfrBC9Ry_eQIRqX7BoysBJ2z0Z9FL6eMj_V3YEDibhwNMbXYjuqwFJ9JO4Jojtlh3oa7o-XH-cDXp8ewMi1GVVNp9E39bYbwiyfKEPEAesekwqiQqQeBmNrdGFV6O4zz4Jn9fFbSZjxYZfsQZpCtpHXIKizJRlgGfOdbbFF9Dnp-nZpwQq-s-xmaBywHleE/3ta/_esrPRhhRIeaHVyh4QrXEg/h0/jKO5D4gqY-zCoNkUoZmTDw6YFJaWtFP2mpeH4rTPLkM)**
[**SIGN UP TODAY**](https://click.act.democrats.org/ss/c/XlxiKm-amnZREMhISCI1HXgISUQ6kaMw7miBXrv1T3N51xiKWWbRHfQTM3gM6C825Re_bIiUHmNqMZpNoW_h9O3a1cXWOB0hFqs4LRvS7QrwKhLhVQIbMLn2Ebc5HyXfJ6-6KXtK4zSmXY0PIsxB3cDcXHUkOXqPMX6O5mqOoHNlj0IObsCm_XJWiw7Ua_vS0fC9XNhSx-UscDQbpqwWg9cnu_MpnX3FumCH1AfYmcN4eOYVXyyeWMt4sf7Q6iEFMtqNlYV3-v8GGmrQZmpmEw48NHxk6kIDGkdDGY4N7n8VHO1X1NYA34WTUeDzfUFe35ULFtj8-TZ5NJDd1TksOlab7DyQwxk67jM7nsbvLIDP3m9quA-ohsInzAacc-vm3sYq3y_2_d-3bRz9Ld0VJYUUPYOxt-xrXzpkpo05LvQ/3ta/_esrPRhhRIeaHVyh4QrXEg/h1/6XPzKgv6oP39qIIydmolwHcfU_FAV4Bl6KY6eB2jlEU)

subject: Congrats Rep. Hakeem Jeffries!!!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
From: dpwillis67@gmail.com
| **BREAKING: Hakeem Jeffries makes history as the first Black lawmaker to lead a party in Congress** Listen, this is a HUGE milestone for Jeffries, Democrats, and the entire country. So we’re sending Jeffries a letter from our top grassroots supporters to congratulate him! [**We’re hand-delivering this letter to his office at 8 AM Monday – so we only have 55 more signature spots available! SIGN NOW! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/39336?t=6&akid=6187%2E878179%2EJRTCaY) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/39336?t=7&akid=6187%2E878179%2EJRTCaY) | [**Donate $3 to sign the letter now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/39336?t=8&akid=6187%2E878179%2EJRTCaY)
---
TO: Representative Hakeem Jeffries
FROM: A grateful Democrat
Subject: CONGRATULATIONS **_Dear Rep. Jeffries – CONGRATULATIONS!_**

**We cannot begin to tell you the pride and joy we had when we found out that you had been selected to lead the House Democrats!**

While House Republicans are in complete shambles and struggling to govern, you have Democrats ready to begin delivering on their promises to voters.

**We know fighting against MAGA extremists in the new GOP controlled House won’t be easy, but you’re already showing impressive poise and leadership.**

**So we just wanted to show our thanks and send our congratulations!** [**I hope you know that there are MILLIONS of us across the country that stand with you. That’s why I’m signing this letter and chipping in $3 to Voter Protection Project to congratulate you on this outstanding accomplishment and to continue to elect incredible Democrats like you »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/39336?t=9&akid=6187%2E878179%2EJRTCaY) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/39336?t=10&akid=6187%2E878179%2EJRTCaY) | [**Donate $3 to sign the letter now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/39336?t=11&akid=6187%2E878179%2EJRTCaY)
---
**_X A grateful Democrat_**
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=6187%2E878179%2EJRTCaY). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=6187%2E878179%2EJRTCaY).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=6187%2E878179%2EJRTCaY) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=12&akid=6187%2E878179%2EJRTCaY). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=6187%2E878179%2EJRTCaY)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=6187%2E878179%2EJRTCaY)

**State Democrats are facing _four ultra-competitive_ , high-stakes special elections next month – some of which are vital for Democratic control – and the Virginia House and Senate are in play this November. **
**Electing Democratic leaders who will support President Biden’s agenda in statehouses across the country is _critical_ to building a better future in your community.** But it’s up to grassroots supporters like you to own a piece of this fight and give state Democrats the resources they need to go toe-to-toe against their Republican opponents.

There are three things you need to know right now, team:
1. Gabe is hard at work in Washington, where he introduced his first bill to prevent House members from wasting taxpayer dollars and voted against far-right legislation to further restrict reproductive healthcare, cut Social Security and Medicare, and give more tax breaks to wealthy corporations instead of working families.

2. Our former far-right, extremist opponent, Yvette Herrell, has already filed to run against Gabe in a 2024 rematch for this swing seat. Since she’s no longer in office, she has all the time in the world to fundraise and rebuild her war chest.

3. **This Tuesday, January 31, is our campaign’s FIRST fundraising deadline of 2023** , and after spending everything we raised in 2022, we need to refuel our campaign in preparation for 2024.

Our former far-right, extremist opponent, Yvette Herrell, has already filed to run against Gabe in a 2024 rematch for this swing seat. name: Team Sherrod
subject: FWD: My First Official Opponent
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF SHERROD BROWN
body:
Sherrod Brown - Senator from Ohio [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP13/1/87645/images/brown_2018_logo-outlined.png]
Really quick -- the first fundraising milestone of the year is a little over 48 hours away, so we want to make sure you heard the news about Sherrod’s first opponent of 2024. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sbe230129-opponent]
Here are three things you should know:
1. He’s a wealthy state senator who can draw from his vast personal bank account to fund his campaign. ( He funneled millions into ads the last time he ran for the Senate in Ohio. )
2. He told Ohio GOP leaders it should be a top priority to send Sherrod packing.
3. There’s no doubt he’s the first of many more challengers to throw their hats in the ring in coming weeks.
Sherrod’s race is going to be extremely competitive and expensive. We need to be ready for anything. Use this link to rush in $5 now: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sbe230129-opponent [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sbe230129-opponent]
Thank you,
Team Sherrod
----------Original Message----------
SENDER: Sherrod Brown
DATE: Jan 17, 2023
CNN: Ohio GOP state Sen. Matt Dolan announces US Senate bid to challenge Sherrod Brown
Friend, we’re only a few weeks into 2023 but already the first Republican opponent has just jumped into the race.
We set an emergency goal of $25,000 to raise today and I’m counting on your continued support as my race ramps up. Will you chip in to our movement today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sbe230129-opponent]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
Express Donate $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sbe230129-opponent?express_lane=true&amount=5&sbe230129-opponent_express_lane_5]
Express Donate $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe230129-opponent?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=sbe230129-opponent_express_lane_10]
Express Donate $26 [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe230129-opponent?express_lane=true&amount=26&refcode=sbe230129-opponent_express_lane_26]
Express Donate $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe230129-opponent?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=sbe230129-opponent_express_lane_100]
Donate Another Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe230129-opponent?refcode=sbe230129-opponent]
Our first opponent is a wealthy state senator who has been eyeing this race ever since he lost the GOP nomination in the 2022 Senate race. He’s the first of what we expect to be many challengers jumping into the race.
And with the NRSC already launching attack ads against me, we need to be prepared early and for anything.
That starts now. Any amount you can contribute to our emergency goal -- whether it’s our average contribution of $26 or $5 -- will make a huge difference. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sbe230129-opponent?refcode=sbe230129-opponent]
With gratitude,
Sherrod
PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF SHERROD BROWN
Contributions or gifts to Friends of Sherrod Brown are not tax deductible.
Friends of Sherrod Brown
3867 West Market Street
Ste. 289
Akron, OH 44333
United States

Tim

I will never concede to this pathetic hack of a candidate. She is not Arizona’s elected governor. And I will keep fighting until the truth prevails, and we can trust that our elected officials were DULY ELECTED! I am eternally grateful for your support as I fight on. I am fighting on behalf of every voter in Arizona whose vote was stolen from them. I am fighting for those who waited to vote for hours and whose ballot was not counted correctly. It could be you. Together, we will fix this. God bless, Kari Lake Paid for by Save Arizona Fund Inc.

body:

**Biden Can't Stop Raising Taxes on Average Americans**

Even as we face record high inflation and a recession "unlike any other"

**New taxes would push the top individual income rate to the highest in the world.**

And increase taxes on millions of Americans across every income bracket.

**In 2023, nearly $17 billion in taxes will target middle-income earners,**

Whose household wealth dropped an unprecedented $143 trillion dollars under Biden.

While Biden's elite wealthy friends and entitlement program beneficiaries don't have to worry.

**The Democrats just gave $80 billion to the IRS to investigate and audit people like you.** .

**_[Don't think your retirement savings are safe!](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c657226%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=BZaelTj3pqSwTPZr6NJXXQ&sysid=1)_**

Which means there is still time to protect your hard-earned nest egg from their greedy overreach.

**You don't have to pay for Biden's inflation-fueling spending spree. Protect your future today!**

**_[REQUEST YOUR FREE, 25-PAGE GUIDE NOW AND TAKE BACK CONTROL OF YOUR RETIREMENT!](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c657228%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=oeLPIMTv5gvN9OEcMWXfHQ&sysid=1)_**

Sincerely,

David Buchanan
Head of Client Success
American Hartford Gold

name: Nina Ahmad
subject: 314 Action PAC Has Endorsed Dr. Nina Ahmad
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nina for Philly
body:
On the road to Primary Election Day on May 16th, Nina continues to gather support from a diverse coalition of organizations.
We are very proud to announce that 314 Action, a science advocacy group dedicated to advancing a pro-science agenda in local and state legislatures, has endorsed Dr. Nina Ahmad, the ONLY scientist in the Democratic primary for Philadelphia City Council at large.
314 Action was founded by members of the STEM community, grassroots supporters and political activists who believe in science as a factor in legislative policy.
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/VbNS084pp1UtiokX7lgedwLHq-Pr876CfmDsXmupoDQ=/BmXDVSxAAuPER6kTdTUlNUnnuWCD0Mh5coBYiVX2Kl8=)

Nina will use Science & data to find new solutions to old problems.
Philadelphia is 6th largest US city and is known as "Cellicon Valley" due to its enormous growth as a hub of Cell and Gene Therapy. Nina will work to ensure that local Philadelphians are ready for these science & technology jobs that pay more than a living wage.

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/VbNS084pp1UtiokX7lgedwLHq-Pr876CfmDsXmupoDQ=/BmXDVSxAAuPER6kTdTUlNUnnuWCD0Mh5coBYiVX2Kl8=)

**[DONATE TODAY](https://act.myngp.com/el/VbNS084pp1UtiokX7lgedwLHq-Pr876CfmDsXmupoDQ=/BmXDVSxAAuPER6kTdTUlNUnnuWCD0Mh5coBYiVX2Kl8=)** to make history and join the broad coalition who are supporting
Nina Ahmad for Philadelphia City Council at large.

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Sign the petition: Ban members of Congress from buying and selling individual stocks
body:
No insider trading in Congress
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5ed142ce-f287-4df3-9dd8-6b1964607223/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **[Sign the petition: Ban members of Congress from buying and selling individual stocks.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te7209be4-f6aa-4bcd-a6d8-cc7d060f0c55/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** _The petition to Congress reads:_ _" Pass legislation to ban members of Congress from buying and selling individual stocks."_ As news of the COVID-19 pandemic and its inevitable consequences began to circulate early in 2020, millions of Americans watched the value of their stocks and retirement accounts erode.

Yet what was a crisis for some turned out to be an opportunity for lawmakers like former Georgia Sen. David Perdue. In January of 2020, the senator sold up to $5 million of Cardlytics stock at $86 a share. Two months later, after the stock had crashed, he dove back in, repurchasing thousands of shares at $30 each. Now, some members of Congress – including Perdue's successor, Senator Jon Ossoff – are trying to pass legislation that would make it illegal for lawmakers to actively trade stocks altogether. It’s a smart policy that’s long overdue.

**[Sign the petition urging Congress to ban lawmakers from trading stocks. Add your name to the petition now](https://default.salsalabs.org/T16448a83-90ca-4e58-ba2a-3f1fadc9b274/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9).** Stock trades by members of Congress – particularly those like Sen. Purdue’s – raise suspicions of insider trading and impropriety. The STOCK Act of 2012 tries to address this by prohibiting politicians from using nonpublic information to personally benefit in the stock market. However, it stops short of banning them from making trades altogether. So while the rest of us are navigating our finances without a map, unscrupulous politicians still have the opportunity to profit in the market from insider knowledge only they have access to.
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**SIGN THE PETITION**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td81f6720-5c8b-45d8-8d06-44ee07c87f97/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Sen. Ossoff's bill, the Ban Congressional Stock Trading Act, would require legislators, their spouses, and dependent children to place their stock portfolios into blind trusts. If passed, the legislation would not allow lawmakers to use insider information to trade stocks and make money. The fight to ban members of Congress from trading stocks picked up serious momentum last year, but the bill was never brought to the floor of the House or Senate for a vote. Now it’s time to build grassroots support to put it over the finish line. [**Sign the petition telling Congress to ban lawmakers from trading stocks now. **](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0ca6d8fb-1014-4c8d-9ec8-7e5d5bae045a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you for supporting better ethics in government, Cliff
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | [**ADD YOUR NAME**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Teec12d4d-b173-4570-ad91-6350bcd3ea3a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | |
---
| | Follow Us | [](https://twitter.com/intent/follow?screen_name=cliffschecter)| [](https://linkedin.com/in/cliffschecter-0873a448/)
---|---
| **Blue Amp Strategies**
1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/banmembersofcongressfrombuyingindividualstocks-n?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td656221c-a764-4a31-8f19-b50dab270bfc/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Candace Owens
subject: Special message from Candace Owens
body:
You can be whatever you want to pursue. You can accomplish anything with enough passion, honor, and integrity
[View this message in your browser](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z7io461afverili4mqavajug8lth97je1c7vsb9o_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t56ej3fctmekp76t1heipnacpne4pqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65srj69qm2or6m4q7cs36ekqj8djnm1j3adtl6mqj9o5m6oq62d376tgncshlmko6fkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj32t5lm1jrepr66jib6oj7m2qmash1k8gn48n24hhmepb0c3jm4p31c8iv0)
[](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2ze6bkjocsd6n1fbtur57j4vi09aqmioutekflmko_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c1geeoj4c5h2bs)

Friend,

**Radicals** are destroying Black communities in the name of justice.

**Politicians** keep Black and minority communities dependent on government handouts.

**The Media** continues to feed us a steady diet of lies that we're victims of a racist county.

And all the while:
* **Planned Parenthood** is murdering Black babies
* **Poverty and divorce** are at an all-time high for Black families
* And the **murder rate** is astronomical.

This is all meant to keep us divided and black and minority communities with a victimhood mentality.

But in this country, _we are not divided_. It's all a myth -- just a figment of someone's sick imagination.

You can be whatever you want to pursue. You can accomplish anything with enough passion, honor, and integrity. _There is no other country in the world where Black people prosper as much as they do here_.

**That 's why I co-founded the BLEXIT Foundation with Brandon Tatum. We are changing the narrative as we seek to abolish the victim mentality.**

So I've set a goal to connect with 500 new supporters by the end of the week.

[_**Friend, can you chip in $5, $10, $35, or any amount and be the first new supporter from your state? Click here to send your gift >>>**_](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z7tinmcc3qemh387v0b4ue7viq673rpvfgho6u50_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c1geeoj4c5h2bs)

**WHAT IS BLEXIT?**

People ask me all the time - what does BLEXIT mean?

It's an exit from the vicious cycle of victimhood mentality promoted by the media and the Radical Left.

They teach us to believe we're victims, that nothing will ever change, that the police are our enemies, and that racism prevents us from achieving our goals.

**Victimhood is a mental virus that infects our Black and minority communities. We need to eradicate it. **

And we're doing it by going into communities where no other organization is going.

[_**Help turn victims into victors >>>**_](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z81s2qn6t5pamhuq6sdt65de9oilnvo5i2mtq868_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c1geeoj4c5h2bs)

**Here 's how BLEXIT is making a difference.**

We currently have 43 chapters across the US -- _we just founded a chapter in Washington D.C.!_ -- made up of more than 14,000 volunteers! BLEXIT State Chapter members help change the narrative that surrounds America's minority communities locally.

Our Liberation Camps provide an American History curriculum that also teaches key life skills and character development to K-8th grade students in low-income communities at no expense to the families.

Our current BLEXIT Liberation Camp sites are in Tampa, FL, and North Charleston, SC, with more site locations to come.

We're also going to historically Black colleges and universities (HBCUs) to connect with students and show them an alternative to the victimhood mentality.

Friend, can you help us end the victimhood mentality?**Click below to become the first new supporter from your state this week.**

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zg77k6shq0kduj04fjjavo4c9dinq7c5qt59mt1g_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c1geeoj4c5h2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zbljmuq5q02okft7pq9srcngthmaoror9j868ss0_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c1geeoj4c5h2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zi1utdehbiajh7nugiua28ns4nhna7a5h5ec8tpo_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c1geeoj4c5h2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z1umb9h9tb6d40ce14rmbnen4733sfj6nkq7hhh0_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c1geeoj4c5h2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zieorvg4a92l8h9urhccbkd0qf4dhiphmmr88vfo_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c1geeoj4c5h2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zf9e0e3ctr9gjo7ed7a9lhh5kcc39isrhba0ja2o_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c1geeoj4c5h2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2ztd9g4kjq3uqpmq2rg2ftoum6ulukd00tck0c138_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c1geeoj4c5h2bs)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2ztt6uardp28baeej7fk1k6gb7krvg4m85pi03t28_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c1geeoj4c5h2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zgr6u3nk6snhqjoofqa02h8ptoplstn0hbk0l6ro_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c1geeoj4c5h2bs)

Thank you,

Candace Owens
President
BLEXIT Foundation

_BLEXIT Foundation is a 501(c)3 non-profit organization, as such, donations to BLEXIT Foundation are tax deductible under the IRS code. By entering your information you consent to receiving emails, text messages and other marketing information from BLEXIT Foundation and other third party related groups. Friend, it's Kirsten. The first end-of-month deadline of our campaign is less than 48 hours away — but we're still $3,723 short of our $25,000 goal.
We can't let ourselves fall behind. New York Republicans just had their best election cycle in two decades — _winning enough seats to deliver the House majority to the GOP._ And now, Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight is reporting that Mitch McConnell has a "clear path" to retaking the Senate.
Democrats must build momentum now, before it's too late.**That's why, as our end-of-month deadline approaches, I'm personally reaching out to ask you to become a Founding Donor to my campaign.[Please, will you donate $5 before midnight tonight so that we can hit this goal and build the foundation for a winning campaign?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57993765/389749717/-2054302023?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk3855-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZTlhNjg5MC1iMWEwLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Rb4Ty7InL_Q5dCUiVpbtm3pL5v4BaK40u3wDbnQf-_E=)**

**By investing in this campaign today, you're investing in a better future for our country.** A future where our reproductive rights are protected and enshrined in all 50 states. A future where voting is a fundamental right, not a privilege. A future where our democracy is strong and just.
Friend, you have my word that I will fight tooth and nail to win that future. But make no mistake: There are powerful people and corporations working to destroy us. **The GOP is emboldened like never before, and they’re already targeting my campaign as they work to flip the Senate in 2024.** These early days are absolutely crucial. _W_ _e can't afford to show any weakness._
With the GOP watching our every move, I'm relying on grassroots support from trusted democracy defenders like you. **Please, friend, you've had my back time and time again.****[I'm counting on your help to hit our $25,000 end-of-month goal so we can defend our Senate majority and pave the way for a brighter future for all. Will you stand with me again and become a Founding Donor today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57993770/389749722/-2054302023?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3855-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZTlhNjg5MC1iMWEwLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Rb4Ty7InL_Q5dCUiVpbtm3pL5v4BaK40u3wDbnQf-_E=)**
Thank you for being on this team.

With gratitude and love,

Kirsten

name: Rep. Dana Criswell
subject: Save Your Retirement from Biden!
body:
|
---
| | |
---
| [TAKE ACTION NOW](https://www.votervoice.net/BroadcastLinks/Z-FX_-iftdMWFQQb2ZGO9w)Earlier this year, the Mississippi Freedom Caucus alerted you of the dangers of ESG investments and how they were harmful to Mississippi taxpayers. In an article by steering committee member John Williams, [ESG - Woke or Broke ](https://www.votervoice.net/BroadcastLinks/uT9tJzxyyoRRD7lhhS5vMg)John explained how investments in ESG funds were a threat to your retirement income. John wrote,
> Many Americans save for their retirement through a tax-deferred investment account such as an IRA or 401(k). Most of the time, this money is placed in various mutual fund companies, and their funds are then invested in the stocks of individual companies chosen by the asset managers of those funds. The goal for these investments is simple: invest in companies that make a profit, so your retirement assets grow as much as possible. Less profit means less money for retirement.
Because of that article and **your action** to demand Mississippi take action to protect your retirement investments, State Treasurer David McRae took a stand against ESG investments.In an article published by Magnolia Tribune, McRae listed several reasons for his stand against ESG, including;
1. ESG standards are being applied subjectively, often according to perceived political ideology rather than hard facts.
2. ESG policies contribute to inflation and higher costs for working Mississippians.
3. ESG will do generational harm to Mississippi’s economy and our leading job creators.
4. ESG scores will create bubbles in favored industries – and bubbles burst.
5. BlackRock and other ESG investors are knowingly failing to uphold their fiduciary responsibility to PERS members by prioritizing ESG above all else.

Now we need your help again. Rep. Dana Criswell has authored a bill that would prohibit investments by the state of Mississippi in ESG funds. But it is in danger of dying in committee because the deadline of January 31 is quickly approaching and Chairman John Reed has not allowed a vote on this bill.[House Bill 1099](https://www.votervoice.net/BroadcastLinks/0e7RI4CqRoFQS7Znigzg4w) must be passed or your retirement income could be lost.[TAKE ACTION NOW](https://www.votervoice.net/BroadcastLinks/Z-FX_-iftdMWFQQb2ZGO9w)Complete the form and send an email demanding House Bill 1099 pass the Appropriations Committee and your retirement be protected from the liberal WOKE agenda designed to take your money. You may also call **601-345-1211****and leave a message for Chairman John Reed.**
---
| You are receiving this email because you signed up for alerts from Mississippi Freedom Caucus.
Click [here](https://www.votervoice.net/BroadcastLinks/sWRcNSRMVGmwOUQJGnQjXA) to unsubscribe from this mailing list.

---
| | [ ](https://www.votervoice.net)
---

| | | | | Peter, Our mission at Courier Newsroom is to combat disinformation and misinformation at the source. One of the worst sources of bad information? Donald Trump. His social media accounts have been the origin of some of the worst content online, with his supporters eagerly believing and spreading his false claims. Right now, Trump and his team are appealing to get his accounts reinstated on prominent social media platforms like Facebook and Twitter. [Today, we’re asking you to join us in urging Facebook and Twitter to uphold Trump’s ban by signing our petition now. We’re working to get 2,000 new signatures today:](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdc35aced-8829-481d-b087-44a758034a48/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc1f0c3d3-4d0c-4388-961d-9103f6a6ada3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| After years of using these platforms to spread disinformation, incite violence, and ultimately, ignite a deadly insurrection ahead of January 6, 2021 — Trump’s ban from mainstream social media platforms was a necessary step to protecting our democracy. Since then, we’ve learned more about Trump’s role in the insurrection and the influence of his social media posts, thanks to the January 6th Report. The average person wouldn’t be allowed back on a platform after doing any of the things Trump did on social media — let alone all of them. Independent reports have found a major rise in hate, discrimination, and political violence following Trump’s tweets. [Please, take a moment to sign our petition to keep Trump off of Facebook and Twitter.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T76268de6-1d25-4d68-ad38-9819fbeaf4c2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) This only takes 30 seconds and will make a serious impact on our work to combat disinformation. | | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc5c26af0-5e2f-4300-9742-dd474d70faf9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Brianna
subject: Can’t believe it’s been two years…
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
|
---

I can’t believe it’s been two years since I started working at All On The Line. We’ve seen so much happen over these years. And though the opposition has pushed our democracy to the brink with their anti-democratic antics, we’ve achieved significant victories because people across the country, like you, are taking action to combat map manipulation and fight for fair redistricting.
Team, we need to start the year strong because the future of fair redistricting across the country is on the line. With states like Texas redrawing maps and two pivotal redistricting cases in front of the Supreme Court, we have to be fully funded and ready to take action. I’ll be honest, we’re tracking behind our goals but [**I told our finance team I believed we could reach our end-of-month goal of $20,000. I believe we can because I believe in you and our movement, especially after the past two years.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57995563/389756794/1523206053?refcode=20230128_AOTL_F_BS2year_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNlMjRjYjI1LWI3YTAtZWQxMS05OTRjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=YZlUBMhqXgBdYod-B1MVk4vhlDxeYzwFMeIf8pEw7zQ=)
**[We fought for fairness and we won in a lot of states but our fight isn’t over. I started at All On The Line on January 11, 2021. One week after the insurrection on January 6th. As a former congressional staffer, it was horrible to see my former colleagues and friends attacked by election deniers and extremists who continuously deny access to fair representation and wanted to enforce a minority rule government against the will of voters.
**[Enough was enough. I could no longer watch American democracy face the possibility of crumbling.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57995571/389756802/1523206053?refcode=20230128_AOTL_F_BS2year_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNlMjRjYjI1LWI3YTAtZWQxMS05OTRjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=YZlUBMhqXgBdYod-B1MVk4vhlDxeYzwFMeIf8pEw7zQ=)**
Ever since then, I’ve spent the last two years fighting for fair maps and democracy because I believe in the promise of America, and I believe in our work. **[That is why I’m challenging my friends and family to donate $23 for 2023 to help us meet our goals and keep up the fight.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57995572/389756803/1523206053?express_lane=true&amount=23&refcode=20230128_AOTL_F_BS2year_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNlMjRjYjI1LWI3YTAtZWQxMS05OTRjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=YZlUBMhqXgBdYod-B1MVk4vhlDxeYzwFMeIf8pEw7zQ=)**
| [**DONATE TODAY**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57995573/389756831/1523206053?refcode=20230128_AOTL_F_BS2year_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNlMjRjYjI1LWI3YTAtZWQxMS05OTRjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=YZlUBMhqXgBdYod-B1MVk4vhlDxeYzwFMeIf8pEw7zQ=)

name: Newt Gingrich
subject: I'm only offering this once
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Republican State Leadership Committee
body:
|
| | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62267847:JeVZKHGiN:m:1:3331421248:119F5BAFD1D1A809446C043AE981B699:r)
---
Peter,

Tim Scott reached out. Marsha Blackburn reached out. So now I'm trying to reach you **one final time** because the situation is _that_ dire. | | | Peter,

Democrats are FURIOUS that you gave Nancy Pelosi the boot, so they're already making the rounds to every Big Tech billionaire, Hollywood elite, woke union, and dark money Democrat they can find to BUY her party back to uniform control...

**It gets worse:** Democrats still have the Senate and the White House - and our majority in the House is on THIN ICE. If we don't start investing NOW, we're DONE.

**Step 1** is hitting our VERY FIRST deadline of 2023, but we're still $17,823 from hitting that minimum threshold. I know that sounds like a lot, but if everyone reading this gives just $25, $50, or $100, we will CRUSH this goal and be off to a strong start! Earlier this month, I was sworn in as the new Democratic Leader.

Today, I promise you this: House Democrats will always fight for you and your family.

**But right now, I’m humbly asking you to fight with us.**

**_[After Republicans’ historically dysfunctional start, everyone will be watching to see what kind of fundraising numbers Democrats post. The support you show for my first deadline as Leader is essential to reclaiming the House for Democrats so we can continue to deliver For The People. I’m asking: Will you rush $10 to make this a historic fundraising period for Democrats?>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57996514/389760589/291648221?amount=10&refcode=EM_NBI_DWSPAC_20230130_FR_1.4_0_3MO_splitJeffries_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzkvMS84ODcwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYTk1ZTBiNC1iOGEwLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nBty67KwhClIqhYWdDYzCzY8Sj2pcaDs8uy42kBJ2tA=)_**

Here’s the deal:

Speaker McCarthy is rushing to outraise us to prove that we don’t have what it takes to reclaim the Majority.

**_We’re going to prove him absolutely wrong, Peter._**

Which is why we need a powerful surge of support – 1,000 gifts in my first crucial month as Leader – to kick this year off with a strong foundation for victory, outraise extreme MAGA Republicans and hand them their first upset of the year.

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57997095/389762755/1995090618?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYTIwNzFhMC1iYWEwLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5BQdmnp35GJta43Rl6VwIAaJdhr4ZN7KNNFZJLXhg0o=&emci=d1b07b0f-819e-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=0a2071a0-baa0-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=4568237)

| | **“Virginia House passes Republican proposals for tighter voting laws” -_WAVY_** Derek, _Republican anti-voting efforts are still running rampant._ Here in Virginia, the Republican-led House of Delegates just passed bills to ban ballot drop boxes and shorten the period for early in-person voting to just two weeks. Voting rights – the very fabric of our democracy – are still under attack. Whether it’s at home in Richmond or on the Senate floor in Washington, D.C., Republicans are going to continue to do everything they can to oppose voting rights legislation Democrats bring to the table. My priority this year is to make certain that every American has the right to vote. But I can’t do it alone. _**[We need to reach our end-of-month goal to win in November and keep up this work. Can you contribute $5 to help fight this battle?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57997105/389762759/-473032319?refcode=mw_em_230130_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYTIwNzFhMC1iYWEwLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5BQdmnp35GJta43Rl6VwIAaJdhr4ZN7KNNFZJLXhg0o=)**_ Your support is crucial to our fight to preserve our democracy. It is long past time we take federal action to protect our fundamental right to vote and ensure that our democracy remains strong. **I want to personally invite you** to join me for February's National Prayer Zoom Call hosted by [Pastor's For Trump](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17316252.10167.1.2e214355816f758d96e3c46f4b753853) with special guest **Roger Stone**.
**Roger Stone** is a seasoned political operative, speaker, pundit, and New York Times Bestselling Author featured in the Netflix documentary ‘ _Get Me Roger Stone_.’
A veteran of ten national presidential campaigns, he served as a senior campaign aide to three Republican presidents: **Nixon** , **Reagan** , and **Trump**.
Mr. Stone will provide us with **insights** and **updates** regarding the 2024 race for the White House.
We will have Pastors from across the nation lead us in a time of prayer and I believe it is important for you to join us.
This National Prayer Call is not just for Pastors only but for believers across America. Therefore, encourage others to join in!
You can register at [www.pastors4trump.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17316252.10168.1.53ea5826c044ad7ea18033241d9f91b4) and when you register an email will be sent to you prior to the Zoom Conference Call with the link and details of how to join.
The National Prayer Call will take place on Monday, February 6 at 7:30pm EST.
| | [ Join February's National Prayer Call ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17316252.10169.1.9706c137b323238fa71abbc9d54f4298)
---
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17316252.10170.1.72e8f365e8956c2148b06c3a0d183dfd)
---
Recently, **President Donald Trump** sent me a message of thanks over the newly formed [Pastors For Trump](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17316252.10171.1.2cc5a45a06f2528127bba906ac54bbc9) organization that he also recently shared about on **TruthSocial**. You can read the Pastors For Trump full **[PRESS RELEASE](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17316252.10172.1.daa78704aca58399935cc6fd1717d484)** here: [Pastors For Trump Press Release](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17316252.10173.1.738a547c333e4baae478adfb44d8f2bc) We are off to a TREMENDOUS start and with **President Trump's** share, our numbers are highly increasing. Many media outlets have reported on the formation of the Coalition such as **Newsweek** , **Rolling Stone** , **One America News Network** , **Real America's Voice** , **Gateway Pundit** , **Right Wing Watch** , **Baptist News Global** and others. This coalition is made up of **Pastors & Ministry Leaders** from different denominations across all 50 states having the common ground of wanting to **Make America Great Again by Making America Godly Again**. [Pastors For Trump](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17316252.10174.1.6feaa4ecdf419a4d827cef012d185c14) is NOT just limited to **Pastors/Ministry Leaders** but is for _every_ believer in America. There will be _monthly Prayer Calls_ starting in January that will host _prominent_ leaders within the America First movement who will give updates of what is taking place within our nation from their unique vantage point. I want to encourage you to visit [www.pastors4trump.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17316252.10175.1.10e13fd9a2f0ecc9d0686a1af305d213) today and register to join in on the Prayer Calls so you can be informed as well as a participant in praying for our country. **Dr. Billy Graham** once said, _"For America to get back on its' feet, the people of God must first get down on their knees and pray."_ Not only should you register to join the monthly Prayer Calls and receive updates from prominent America First leaders, but you should also send the [www.pastors4trump.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17316252.10176.1.abe65cdfb5e9fb9831788555460ade9a) link to your Pastor/Ministry Leader and encourage him/her to join the coalition with many other Pastor/Ministry Leaders throughout the country. Every Pastor/Ministry Leader will remain confidential, and their identity will not be released to the public unless they are in the role of a State/Regional Director. Pastors/Ministry Leaders that join the coalition will receive opportunities to meet (in-person) many of the America First leaders through upcoming rallies and events as well as have their voice heard by giving input on what issues should be presented to **President Trump** by the [Pastors For Trump](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17316252.10177.1.f56798b2c2b36374e90476f341c8541b) coalition. Please go visit [www.Pastors4Trump.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17316252.10178.1.1e36823ced219d91a9cd69da39903c37) today and be a part of the effort to **Make America Great Again by Making America Godly Again**.

name: Shift WA
subject: Democrats’ terrible bills
body:
Democrats appear to again be competing to see who can introduce the worst idea. Shift WA is ready to do our part in making sure the public knows about as many of the Democrats' terrible bills in 2023. | | [](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61435562:szhdzVDNa:m:1:2610672541:6DE10F533A0E63444BE3DB31B5EC1DDA:r "Shift Washington")
---
| Friends,

The 2023 legislative session is underway! And, like clockwork, the Democrats' terrible bills are rolling in.

During the last two legislative sessions, Democrats have subjected us to the consequences of their terrible anti-law enforcement bills, an unconstitutional state income tax on capital gains, huge gas tax increases thanks to climate change bills, and the unprecedented explosion in spending that always seems to benefit their biggest campaign donors. As a result, crime rates have skyrocketed, a historic lawsuit is underway, and our state revenue reserves are drained.

Despite their recent mistakes, this year Democrats appear to again be competing to see who can introduce the worst idea. **Here are a few of the terrible bills they have introduced:**
* SB 5109: taxpayer-funded unemployment benefits for people illegally in this country
* SB 5046: taxpayers-funded lawyers for convicted criminals appealing their convictions
* HB 1389: rent control, to reduce rental properties and drive housing prices even higher
* HB 1045: Universal Basic Income, or free money with no strings attached!

Beyond these terrible bills, Democrats have introduced various bills to further increase taxes.

**But it 's not just what Democrats have introduced - it's also what's Democrats are ignoring. **This year, despite past pledges to voters, Democrats are saying they will not take up legislation that would reform our state's emergency powers laws.

Governor Jay Inslee abused his emergency powers for 975 days. Democrats have no intention of preventing such an abuse from happening again in the future.

Shift WA is ready to do our part in making sure the public knows about as many of the Democrats' terrible bills in 2023. **[But we need your continued support.](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61435563:szhdzVDNa:m:1:2610672541:6DE10F533A0E63444BE3DB31B5EC1DDA:r)**

We are leading the charge to hold Democrats accountable this 2023 legislative session. Our efforts are fully funded by the generous support of our grassroots readers. [**Will you contribute to our work by donating $50, $25, or even $5 ahead of the 2022 legislative session?**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61435563:szhdzVDNa:m:1:2610672541:6DE10F533A0E63444BE3DB31B5EC1DDA:r)

Thank you,

The Shift WA team | [ DONATE ](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61435564:szhdzVDNa:m:1:2610672541:6DE10F533A0E63444BE3DB31B5EC1DDA:r)
---
|
This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com) and sent from Shift Washington. If you would like to send this message to some of your friends, you can [click here](http://click.shiftwa.org/forwardthis/ft.php?mID=14123823&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&ch=49000b887de404a22f48ed48dd2d4356&schema=echo3) to do so.

You can also stay up to date on our efforts to shift the debate in Washington State by following us on [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/shiftwa/) & [Twitter](https://twitter.com/ShiftWA). If you believe you received this message in error or no longer wish to receive emails from Shift Washington, [click to unsubscribe](http://click.shiftwa.org/p/oszhdzVDNa).

| | | After years of using his FB account to stoke violence, Donald Trump was finally suspended for 2 years after inciting the attack on the Capitol. But Facebook recently ended that suspension, saying Trump's threat to public safety has "sufficiently receded." **And Trump proved them wrong almost immediately, through public speeches and posts in which he threatened violence, repeated his incendiary election lies, and tried to whip his fanatical supporters into a frenzy.** Enough is enough. It's time for Facebook to finally do the right thing, and act against Trump the way they would any other FB user. [**Add your name, and tell Facebook to ban Trump permanently.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb0efc8f9-0552-482d-8af7-85bf77d779de/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

Friend,

I drew the lucky straw at House Republicans HQ this week, and I got my hands on Secretary Mike Pompeo’s new book, _Never Give An Inch_ , and I’ve selected a few top patriots for the opportunity to get a signed copy.

This book is incredible. I can hardly put it down.

---
| [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c94636%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=BjNMMsLqrUzPQA1X0yY2aQ&sysid=1)

Secretary Pompeo’s career as CIA Director and Secretary of State under President Trump is like a spy thriller novel brought to life.

In _**Never Give An Inch**_ , he takes you to secret meetings in Israel, North Korea, Taiwan, and the halls of power in Europe and Washington, DC.

His plan was simple: “put America first, champion our values, and never apologize for our country.”

Secretary Pompeo was first in his class at West Point and is the only person to have run both the CIA and State Department.

Liberals in Washington D.C. DO NOT want you to read this book. That’s why I know you will love it, Friend.

We’re running out of signed copies, so you need to act **_fast_**.

Will from House Republicans HQ

##
**This week, human trafficking survivor and pastor from Nashville will be on The Rachel Hamm Show, you won't want to miss out this week!**

_**February 2 at 10 AM PST,**_ I will speak with Lynz Piper-Loomis about her captivation story. Lynz is a published author and speaker. In December, General Michael Flynn held a dinner at Mar-a-Lago, resulting in Lynz and I crossing paths. This is a life story you don't want to miss, tune into Rumble to hear it!

_**February 5 at 5 PM PST,**_ I will be interviewed on the Todd Coconato Show. Todd is a show host in Nashville, Tennessee. Along with his show, he is a pastor and a speaker for the Reawaken America Tour with Clay Clark and General Michael Flynn. This week, the tables are turning and roles are switching. I have always enjoyed interviewing others but I will be the one interviewed for this show. Join Todd and I on February 5 over on Todd's rumble.
If you haven't heard the news, I was marked on YouTube for "spreading misinformation." I will not be allowed to post on that platform in the foreseeable future. Make sure to follow me on Rumble and Spotify.
**If you are not already subscribed to The Rachel Hamm Show, head over to your platform of choice and hit "subscribe." Be sure to also click on the little 'bell icon" to be notified when a new episode is released. name: Shyam Raman
subject: We need you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www
body:
We’re counting on your support.

|

Hey Derek, We need your support. From outreach and volunteer training, to our local candidate’s program, **we here at the Democratic Party of Virginia are working to make the Commonwealth a better place for everyone to call home.** In the two years Democrats had full control in Richmond **we passed legislation to pull us out of the COVID-19 pandemic, banned the death penalty, lowered the cost of insulin, passed the Virginia Voting Rights Act, built an economy that works for workers and their employers, brought down confederate monuments across the Commonwealth, and more.** But here’s the thing – and this is why I’m reaching out right now – we can’t continue this work without the resources we receive from grassroots supporters like you. **[Can I count on you to chip in and help us keep moving Virginia forward?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58001998/389780626/-1524691769?refcode=dpva-em-230130-shyam&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZWUzMGJlYS1jN2EwLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DUsNFC5ybdJc5KR_cX0SlZMMIgr4qgKh_uuVXuc6Zec=)** Virginia Democrats CAN win this November — **we will continue to fight for common sense gun safety, lower prescription drug prices, better education for our kids, and more quality high-paying jobs for our fellow Virginians.** **[Donate today to help us elect more Democratic candidates up and down the ballot all across the Commonwealth!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58002000/389780634/-1524691769?refcode=dpva-em-230130-shyam&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZWUzMGJlYS1jN2EwLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DUsNFC5ybdJc5KR_cX0SlZMMIgr4qgKh_uuVXuc6Zec=)** **– Shyam Raman**

name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: How to Protect Your Retirement Funds from Biden's New Multi-Trillion Dollar Tax Agenda
body:
**Biden Can't Stop Raising Taxes on Average Americans**

Even as we face record high inflation and a recession "unlike any other"

**New taxes would push the top individual income rate to the highest in the world.**

And increase taxes on millions of Americans across every income bracket.

**In 2023, nearly $17 billion in taxes will target middle-income earners,**

Whose household wealth dropped an unprecedented $143 trillion dollars under Biden.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Catherine=20Engelbrecht=20|=20True=20the=20Vote?=
subject: Melody, Maricopa, and You
body:
A Critical Fight in Defense of the First Amendment | | | | | |
---
| | _Today we bring you the true story of how a private citizen who made a social media post about watching ballot drop boxes found herself in a massive legal battle to protect the First Amendment. We've not publicly discussed our involvement in it, until now. Propagandist media will no doubt find a way to twist this into a scandalous headline, so we’re bringing it to you here first. We hope Melody’s story will inspire you as much as it inspires us._
Ballot drop box abuse has been a source of concern since 2020, when the "joint task force" of COVID and CTCL oversaw the installation of thousands of boxes to serve as unmonitored drop points for millions of mail ballots. The stunning lack of ballot security and overt abuse was proven through True the Vote's research and went on to be featured in the movie '2000 Mules’. Citizens wanted to help, but didn’t know where to begin. Then one concerned patriot, Melody Jennings, wrote a social media post suggesting that Americans could have ballot drop box watch parties in their own communities. Her idea caught on ... fast.
Melody heard from thousands of willing volunteers across the country who wanted to peacefully monitor ballot drop boxes in the 2022 elections. She set up a website and helped people connect with each other. The effort became known as “Clean Elections USA”. It wasn't an organization, it wasn't a formal arrangement, it was a movement.
---
Soon after 2022 early elections began, a pack of non-profit organizations represented by Marc Elias' firm and many others, sued Melody and "Clean Elections USA" in Maricopa County, Arizona, arguing that watching drop boxes was unlawful. Their attempts to secure restraining orders and injunctions failed, but the lawsuit didn't end there. Last Friday, we had a conference hearing in Arizona Supreme Court to begin litigation on the merits of the case. 'We' means Melody and True the Vote, as we have backed Melody's fight since it first began. Our legal team is fully engaged in this case, defending every American’s First Amendment right to peaceably assemble. True the Vote is proud to support Melody and the movement known as "Clean Elections USA" in this critical fight for freedom.
_“I'm a mom. I'm a patriot. I love God and country and the rule of law. But in 2019, I really woke up to what was happening in the world. After the 2020 elections and suspicious activities surrounding ballot drop boxes, my very next thought was, ‘My goodness, why are we letting this happen with these drop boxes? Why don't we have eyes on them?”_
_“Within five minutes I just threw it out there on Truth Social and said, ‘Hey, why don't we get out there and watch drop boxes?’ And it just went viral from there. I just started tagging people and posting. I remember over one weekend I went from 200 to 1500 followers and thought, ‘Wow, this must have something to it.”_
_**“There was so much hunger for people to do something, but they didn't know what to do or how to get started. And they were feeling like they’re just sitting on their hands and watching our country fall apart with not being able to really know even how to begin to help. I feel like it really helped people connect on a grassroots level to say, ‘Hey, I can do that.”**_
_"In Arizona we pushback from the radical left, so I spent a lot of my focus there but also in Michigan and Pennsylvania. In Georgia, we couldn't watch boxes. They took them all indoors. Each state was very different.”_
_“The first moment after I found out I was being sued; I was terrified. I've never been sued. I've never been in court in my life. But it didn't take long to not be terrified. I just remember Catherine Engelbrecht from True the Vote calling me. She didn't even ask me how I was feeling. She just knew because she'd been there before. She said, ‘You're going to make it through this.’”_
_“The lawsuits literally have not stolen my joy for one second past those first moments. I've felt like I am protected. I'm surrounded and I feel like nothing can touch me. I'm aware of my rights. I'm aware of God in this space. I'm aware of the vast army of patriots that surround me. And I also know that we have the truth on our side.”_
Melody Jennings’ willingness to stand and speak out is an example to us all.
**From now through the 2024 elections, the battles to defend our rights as citizens will only get harder. Smear tactics will only get uglier. Propaganda media will only get worse. But if we continue to stand together, with patriots like Melody, truth will find a way. Never quit.**
Ever onward -The True the Vote Team
|
---
|
---
| [YOU CAN HELP TRUE THE VOTE](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=91f34b242a&e=ad8cba7e98)
---
| | | | |
---
_Copyright © 2023 True the Vote, All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you opted in for updates via the True the Vote website.

**Our mailing address is:**
True the VotePO Box 3109# 19128Houston, TX 77253-3109
[Add us to your address book](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/vcard?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=10c8087c36)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/profile?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=10c8087c36&e=ad8cba7e98&c=f908400664) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=10c8087c36&e=ad8cba7e98&c=f908400664).

body:

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58004540/389786795/1793776944?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20230130_f_eom1_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOWRlZDdhZC1jZWEwLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E0Skw9siHsFG39hUQgA28GqWRzT5tSJPtfSwWwL6QLE=&emci=b5ded7ad-cea0-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=b9ded7ad-cea0-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=1037277)

| | We’re channeling all of our energy into protecting the freedom to vote in 2023, 2024, and beyond. In a moment we’ll explain why this work is so urgent, but if you’re already convinced, [_**will you chip in $20 or anything you can right away to help hit our January fundraising goal?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58004541/389786796/138120010?amount=$20&refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20230130_f_eom1_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOWRlZDdhZC1jZWEwLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E0Skw9siHsFG39hUQgA28GqWRzT5tSJPtfSwWwL6QLE=) | [CHIP IN](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58004542/389786797/138120010?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20230130_f_eom1_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOWRlZDdhZC1jZWEwLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E0Skw9siHsFG39hUQgA28GqWRzT5tSJPtfSwWwL6QLE=)
---
2023 is a busy year for Fair Fight. **Here’s what we’re focused on:**
**First,** we’re investing critical resources into expanding voting access for years to come here in Georgia. That’s why we’re laser-focused on combating Republican anti-voter attempts this year.
**Next,** we’re laying the groundwork for another election cycle in 2024 — with eyes on Georgia once again. The election might seem far away, but here’s the truth: Anti-voter lawmakers are already ramping up their voter suppression efforts, and we need to respond by protecting voting access.
**And finally,** we’re strategizing and collaborating with community members on initiatives to dismantle the systemic, deeply rooted voter suppression that’s part of our election system — piece by piece.
**There are no “off years” when it comes to protecting our democracy.** As we prepare for the critical months ahead, we need to finish January strong to be able to accurately gauge the volume of resources we can invest in voting rights protections this year. [_**So we’re asking: Can you pitch in $20 or any amount that makes sense right away?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58004543/389786798/138120010?amount=$20&refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20230130_f_eom1_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOWRlZDdhZC1jZWEwLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E0Skw9siHsFG39hUQgA28GqWRzT5tSJPtfSwWwL6QLE=)
Thanks so much,
The Fair Fight Team

body:
Would you like a SIGNED copy of my new book?

|

Friend,

I'm excited to release a new book about my time as President Trump's CIA Director and Secretary of State.

_**Never Give An Inch**_ contains dozens of untold stories you don't want to miss, including negotiations with North Korea's Kim Jong Un, rescuing American hostages, eliminating Qassem Soleimani, and much more!

**[I'm granting you SPECIAL ACCESS to your very own SIGNED copy before the book's release to the general public. Mike Pompeo

name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: Remember the January 6 peaceful protesters!
body:
Those held in jail – especially the hellish D.C. jail – couldn’t celebrate Christmas last year with their spouses, childre
Those held in jail – especially the hellish D.C. jail – couldn’t celebrate Christmas last year with their spouses, children, extended families, or friends. They weren’t allowed to go to Midnight Mass or sing Christmas hymns on Sunday morning at church. | | | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2znlb5ka5mabb97a73pmcjrdg9rht3o2e30o9j4m8_rp22sh2s8i66pr5chg62pj0cjh2bs)
|
---

[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zq63fip023najv304e8jhqe1dd435e5jmj8dblp8_rp22sh2s8i66pr5chg62pj0cjh2bs) Dear Patriot,

[**Please give a crucial $25, $50, $100, or more TODAY to fully fund my two critical class action lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to FREE and get JUSTICE for ALL January 6 protesters!**

](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zp12hrdljrb9e9f4q6qkl907d9lu13uo1hke6cu0_rp22sh2s8i66pr5chg62pj0cjh2bs) I hope you enjoyed a wonderful Christmas and New Year with your family and friends.

**At this time, I can’t help but think of my client, Marine combat veteran Jesus Rivera, and the other January 6 Peaceful Protesters who’ve been thrown to the wolves.**

Those held in jail – especially the hellish D.C. jail – couldn’t celebrate Christmas last year with their spouses, children, extended families, or friends. They weren’t allowed to go to Midnight Mass or sing Christmas hymns on Sunday morning at church.

**If they celebrated, they did it as political prisoners who prayed and sang...while hoping that the guards wouldn’t show up and beat them again.**

You and I know they’re being railroaded for just exercising their Constitutionally protected rights that day at the Capitol building.

Jesus Rivera didn’t even protest. He just shot video on his smart phone and a digital camera for a local news station back home in Florida. He entered the Capitol peacefully like many other patriots that day.

But Jesus has been sentenced to eight months in federal prison anyway.

Disabled Marine veteran Zach Rehl protested peacefully, but he’s been held without bail and the VA cut off his disability payments.

As you know, other January 6 peaceful protesters have been driven to such desperation by the abuse and torture they endure, that over 30 of them begged to get transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba!

**Many of these jailed patriots haven’t held or even seen their families in a year or more...some, like prisoner Peter Stager, have been jailed for over 600 days.**

That’s why I beg you to stand with me at this crucial time.

**I’m Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.**

I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.**

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents – AND WIN!**

And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten criminal regime in court.

I’m suing everyone responsible for these outrages, including FBI Director Christopher Wray.

[**Patriot, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2ziqgvothmbh0o1ibqgvogdho526s9k0i84apn798_rp22sh2s8i66pr5chg62pj0cjh2bs)

Your best gift today will help me fight for these jailed patriots, bring them justice, and fight for the future of our Great Nation.

[**So please give what you can right away.**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z4p8cfiefi28o1hvl8i6ellm801492se68rsfsv8_rp22sh2s8i66pr5chg62pj0cjh2bs)

Thank you so much!

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

[**P.S. Patriot, I can’t fight for the January 6 peaceful protesters without your vital support. Please give at least a crucial $25, $50, $100, or even $250 or more immediately.**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zqqjotjbr6i6h10bv90b36oflh0h4hnv39km9288_rp22sh2s8i66pr5chg62pj0cjh2bs)

name: Gwen S. Moore
subject: Horrified
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Gwen Moore for Congress
body:
I am horrified by the brutal assault on Tyre Nichols and extend my condolences to his family and community.

Unfair and brutal treatment of citizens cannot be tolerated. I join the calls for accountability and swift justice against those responsible.

Congress has a responsibility to root out bias and misconduct. We must act now to ensure the bipartisan George Floyd Justice in Policing Act, which passed the House last Congress, becomes law. De-escalation should always be implemented, when possible, rather than aggressive postures at routine traffic or citizen encounters.

In solidarity,

Gwen
Proudly representing Wisconsin's 4th Congressional District
Proud Co-Leader of the Violence Against Women Act
100% Pro-Choice
100% Democracy Defender

About Gwen: The first African-American woman in Wisconsin history to serve in the U.S. House of Representatives, Congresswoman Gwen Moore, took her official oath of office on January 4, 2005. She served in the Wisconsin State Senate from 1993-2004. Before her election to the Senate, Congresswoman Moore served two consecutive terms in the Wisconsin State Assembly from 1989-92.

name: Kate Connelly
subject: Chasing down every penny…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
Just a quick update on our January goal:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57985662/389719750/823540626?refcode=ea.e84ec65e-a6a0-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ms=ea.e84ec65e-a6a0-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlODRlYzY1ZS1hNmEwLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UNK-cer3z4wc7T5aBQAkJkKT9DO3PjbY9vQ01hIxxb0=&emci=810f555b-849e-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=e84ec65e-a6a0-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=1049176)
Hey Peter — I’ll keep this quick. Like Roy mentioned, I set a $10,000 fundraising goal for January. I’m spending today and tomorrow tracking down every _last penny possible_ so we can hit it! The first thing I did today was check our weekend fundraising numbers, and while we were able to narrow the gap to our target, **we’re still $6,080 short.** I’m going through our records to reach out to supporters who haven’t yet donated to ask you to make your first contribution before time runs out! **[Peter, can I add you to my list of end-of-month supporters? name: Vice President Kamala Harris
subject: Building an America that works for everyone will require everyone -- yes, everyone -- stepping up to support this work.That’s why I’m asking:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, **[www
body:
It’s time for grassroots Democrats to roll up our sleeves and get back to work. | |
---
Derek, Joe and I are ready to keep delivering for the American people this year -- but we need your strength too. So, I’m coming to you personally before the DNC’s first deadline of the year: **Building an America that works for everyone will require everyone --_yes, everyone_ \-- stepping up to support this work. That’s why I’m asking: Will you chip in $10 to the DNC ahead of tomorrow’s end-of-month deadline? When you do, the DNC will send you your very own DNC membership card.**

clean_body: It’s time for grassroots Democrats to roll up our sleeves and get back to work. | | Derek, Joe and I are ready to keep delivering for the American people this year -- but we need your strength too. So, I’m coming to you personally before the DNC’s first deadline of the year: Building an America that works for everyone will require everyone --yes, everyone \-- stepping up to support this work. That’s why I’m asking: Will you chip in $10 to the DNC ahead of tomorrow’s end-of-month deadline? When you do, the DNC will send you your very own DNC membership card. We cannot rest a single second. We must roll up our sleeves and get back to work. If you want to see Democrats continue delivering for working families, this is your sign to get off the sidelines and into the fight. We’re going to need your support in 2023 and 2024. Thank you for everything, Kamala Kamala Harris Vice President of the United States Kamala Harris: Derivative of Adam Schultz / Biden for President Photo. name: Newt Gingrich
subject: Re: Kevin McCarthy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
I’ve been doing a lot of thinking about what the new Republican majority means for America, and I’ve concluded that it all b

| |
---
| | | Friend,

I've been doing a lot of thinking about what the new Republican majority means for America, and I've concluded that it all boils down to three words: Speaker Kevin McCarthy. As a former Speaker myself, I know how tough the job can be. That's why I chose to support Kevin from the get-go - he's a natural-born leader who's prepared to fight day in and day out for the American people.

---
| | [SUPPORT KEVIN MCCARTHY](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zag6q8ir4j7ujbp1b9k3gv1nrfrmm3t6pbcs0l78_rp22sh2s8i66pr5chg6ao36c1h2bs)
---

Kevin's first couple of weeks in office have confirmed what I, and millions of other Americans, have long suspected: **he 's THE politician America _desperately_ needs at this pivotal moment in history.** He's already fired 3 corrupt Dems from their committee assignments, rescinded the funding for Biden's army of 87,000 IRS agents, formed a committee to tackle the Chinese Communist threat, moved to protect our country's strategic petroleum reserve, launched an investigation into the Weaponization of the Federal Government, and take several significant actions to protect innocent life from radical abortionists.

Kevin is a man of results, not empty promises. I'm proud to call him my Speaker. If you agree with me and the job that he's doing, I'd ask you to give him your official approval **[here.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhlq7u47usalomd4vm2uir0ali8dt18ufe0tbehg_rp22sh2s8i66pr5chg6ao36c1h2bs "here.")** Fighting the Democrats is a tough job; he needs to know that the American people are behind him _every_ step of the way.

---
| | [GIVE KEVIN YOUR OFFICIAL APPROVAL](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6entcjhs0gi7050dugbk24t7ouk7dhqnd2cd9o0_rp22sh2s8i66pr5chg6ao36c1h2bs)
---
| | [STAND WITH SPEAKER MCCARTHY](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0l32587ac7fk9u6iob2phr3or8gj90ks4jv5ofg_rp22sh2s8i66pr5chg6ao36c1h2bs)
---

Thank you for your time,

Newt Gingrich

---
| |

---
|
