name: 1600 Daily
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our presi
This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zhap9r4ofrv18mf63j2m2dt4f7c2is06qedcqe1g_rp22sh2s8i66pr5chg66p34cjh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zddie6tlqnr8hsvtpqvqci497dil12dupnmaae58_rp22sh2s8i66pr5chg66p34cjh2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zhmb5b1ja7n6l9o2tcgbv7rrq58h0ug6p9d9nqo0_rp22sh2s8i66pr5chg66p34cjh2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: Joe Kent
subject: Deadline!
body:
Dear Loyal Supporter,
Our deadline is coming up as we close out the first month of the year and we are about $11,000 behind our goal. Can you please help us fill the gap with a contribution today?
Show your support for my campaign at [https://JoeKentforCongress.com](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/RVLVhmLeIP8kfWDtDu70sA/P4NviKmuCY3Tw8WlMqcDSg).
Last week I travelled to Washington DC to do both Steve Bannon and Tim Pool's show live. It was a great opportunity to talk about my agenda and my campaign to take back a congressional seat from a woke, far-left Democrat.
But the mission can only succeed if we are able to raise the money to go on offense! Please contribute at [https://JoeKentforCongress.com](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/RVLVhmLeIP8kfWDtDu70sA/P4NviKmuCY3Tw8WlMqcDSg) to help us hit our goal before the month ends!
Respectfully,
Joe Kent
PS: We have less than 48 hours to hit our January goal. Please chip in what you can at [https://JoeKentforCongress.com](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/RVLVhmLeIP8kfWDtDu70sA/P4NviKmuCY3Tw8WlMqcDSg).

Unsubscribe: https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/unsubscribe/o2MugVE0sjPAeG1zwzE3zPwB377NamVJrtTtZu9DI892k/Aq892bLK7NUcUtSXFAg4JQAA/P4NviKmuCY3Tw8WlMqcDSg

name: Gallego for Arizona
subject: The first major test of our campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
More importantly, potential endorsers will be wondering the same thing...
#

Peter -
Tomorrow at midnight, we close the books on our first monthly fundraising deadline. This will be the first major test of our campaign.
Everyone will be asking what we have raised since launch and how many people have contributed to our campaign.
They’ll want to know if we have what it takes to compete with the millions Senator Sinema has in the bank, and the millions more she’ll raise from big-monied interests in the future.
But more importantly, potential endorsers will be wondering the same thing. Democrats and Independents on the fence about who to support.
That is why we’re hoping for as many donations as possible before this deadline ends. Because we want to be able to share massive numbers — numbers that will bring more people to our side.
These emails are the major source of that fundraising. So we’re asking:
[**Can you please make a $3 contribution to Ruben Gallego’s Senate campaign before our first end-of-month fundraising drive comes to a close tomorrow at midnight?**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-jan23.ZeANVi&refcode=em230130-1-30-VSP&t=1&akid=318%2E734936%2ETxGmFi)

name: Coach
subject: ⚠️ Biden’s border crisis comes to Alabama
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tuberville for Senate, Inc
body:
👀 You need to see this, Peter.
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/662ff208a4f8c607/384caab14fee4683c3d6b838967d376c/33013)
---
Peter, Joe Biden’s recent visit to the border has done NOTHING to stop the flood of illegal immigration we’re facing right now.
**In fact, Biden’s lawless policies are continuing to make this crisis worse.** Four million illegal immigrants have crossed the border since Joe Biden took office two years ago. And this year, federal law enforcement is expecting millions more illegal border crossings, ravaging states like Texas, Arizona, and New Mexico.
But this crisis doesn’t just affect folks living near the border. It’s fueling a violent crime wave and a fentanyl epidemic that’s claiming countless lives here in Alabama and across the country.
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/662ff208a4f8c607/87c7da9cfc10e631c3d6b838967d376c/33013)
---
[**To learn more about how Biden’s open borders agenda is hurting Alabamians and all Americans, please take a moment to read my new op-ed piece HERE.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/662ff208a4f8c607/b1e77948e67392adc3d6b838967d376c/33013)
We MUST enforce our immigration laws and give our Border Patrol officers the tools they need to secure our border...and I’m fighting every day to do just that.
\- Coach

name: Lucas Kunce
subject: I owe you a real explanation.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
I know. It’s early. And 2024 feels like a long time from now. Will you please let me explain?
#
Peter — I know. It’s early. And 2024 feels like a long time from now.
If I’m going to be emailing you **[asking for $10 toward our first end-of-month fundraising goal,](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/27418?refcode=em20230130-2794&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=2794%2E614464%2EsnrhLG)** then I owe you a real explanation. **So please, give me just a couple minutes of your time:**
I know you’ve already heard a lot about how much of a fraud and coward Josh Hawley is. When we launched this campaign earlier this month— just two years after Hawley raised his fist and then ran for his life on January 6 — we made a lot of noise. And from online and to prime time TV, we’ve kept the hits going.
But from the moment we’ve been in this race, Hawley and the corporate interests supporting him have already been hitting back — from the National Republican Senatorial Committee to Breitbart.
That’s because they know we’re a threat. They know that over the past three election cycles, Missourians voted to **raise the minimum wage** nearly 5 dollars higher than the federal level, **expand Medicaid** under the Affordable Care Act, and legalize marijuana. They know Missourians even **elected a Democrat statewide** to be our Auditor — by a 6% margin.
Missourians have been fighting hard to claw back power from corrupt politicians like Josh Hawley for years — and Hawley knows we have a grassroots movement that can harness that energy. That’s why, on the same day we launched our campaign, he sent a message to his donors warning we’d **“love nothing more than to take back Missouri. We CAN'T let that happen.”**
So here’s what that all tells us: Hawley is going to come at us hard, fast, and early. That means our best shot at winning this race is building a record-breaking movement **right from the start** so we can fight back, get our positive message in front of Missouri voters, and hold him accountable for betraying our country.
And that’s why I’ve got to ask today, even if it feels early: **[Can I count on you to make a donation of $10 or whatever amount feels right toward our very first end-of-month fundraising goal? I’m not taking a single cent from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or Big Pharma and Big Oil execs, so anything you chip in makes a big difference:](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/27418?refcode=em20230130-2794&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=2794%2E614464%2EsnrhLG)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/27419?refcode=em20230130-2794&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=3&akid=2794%2E614464%2EsnrhLG) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/27419?refcode=em20230130-2794&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=4&akid=2794%2E614464%2EsnrhLG) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/27419?refcode=em20230130-2794&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=5&akid=2794%2E614464%2EsnrhLG) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/27419?refcode=em20230130-2794&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=6&akid=2794%2E614464%2EsnrhLG) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/27419?refcode=em20230130-2794&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=7&akid=2794%2E614464%2EsnrhLG) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/27419?refcode=em20230130-2794&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=8&akid=2794%2E614464%2EsnrhLG) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/27418?refcode=em20230130-2794&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=9&akid=2794%2E614464%2EsnrhLG)
---
Thanks for being a part of this movement. This is a race we can win. And together, we’re going to beat Hawley and put everyday people in charge of our country.
Never stop fighting,
Lucas Kunce

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-email-footer?refcode=em20230130-2794-footer&t=10&refcode2=2794_614464_snrhLG&akid=2794%2E614464%2EsnrhLG)**

name: American Defense News
subject: Are universities getting it right?
body:
Are K-12 schools, colleges, and universities in your state doing enough to provide students with a proper understanding of Ameri
| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ztt6ipalh5bga32gobat24at11hot2caklhk8ho8_rp22sh2s8i66pr5chg6ep74cdh2bs)
---
| | | Fellow American, Are K-12 schools, colleges, and universities in your state doing enough to provide students with a proper understanding of American history and government--including an understanding of the purposes and principles of the Constitution? There is reason to be doubtful. There seems to be a decreasing sense of patriotism among young Americans, and an increasing attraction to socialism and other ideas destructive of liberty. And have you noticed all the disturbing incidents taking place on college campuses, with students resorting to intimidation, threats, and violence to silence speakers with whom they disagree? Hillsdale is planning to redouble its efforts for the future of liberty. We will respond to these disturbing trends by expanding our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--especially for younger Americans. And as we form our strategy we'd like to hear from you: [**Please take our brief education survey here » **](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z1mnjo4ghk19gl85i9mcmq4917to5glrs5bp6e18_rp22sh2s8i66pr5chg6ep74cdh2bs) We have done too many of our young people a disservice by failing to provide them with knowledge of our nation's great heritage of liberty. Even worse, many of our schools, corrupted by Left-wing bias, have pushed a false history of America as essentially flawed and unjust. This indoctrination will only continue once students return to campuses across the country. Hillsdale can remain independent and stay true to its mission because it refuses to accept one penny of taxpayer funding--even indirect aid like federal or state student grants and loans. This frees Hillsdale from burdensome and corrupting regulation, but it also means we are entirely dependent on the support of our friends nationwide. Will you help us understand how Americans look at education today so that we can plan our expanded outreach in the smartest way possible? [**Please take a few minutes to complete this survey and let us know your opinions on education today » **](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zoqge5r0tp7mat428i0h19rtgp84dbp04ve2gp8o_rp22sh2s8i66pr5chg6ep74cdh2bs) I am deeply grateful for your friendship.
---
Warm Regards,
Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

body:

Hello Peter,

Can you imagine what America would look like with Ron DeSantis in the Oval Office?

Leadership who will protect our. . .

. . . children from Critical Race Theory and gross sexualization in the classroom.

. . . unborn children from late-term abortion.

. . . country from forced experimental vaccines.

. . . Constitutional rights and civil liberties.

. . . schools from the teacher's unions.

. . . kids from woke doctors pushing transgender hormone therapies and surgeries.

Can you imagine that, Peter?

We need your help to make this a reality. That's why we're raising $10,000 in the next 72 hours to help draft Ron for President. Can you help us meet that goal today?

[_**You can help build a nationwide grassroots network of support to draft Ron by clicking here to donate any amount >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62269423:6Xp7DHGEN:m:1:3331421248:2BCC8289C5D20C9C83EF72E4306AF917:r)

He's bold, takes action, and can lead America to security and prosperity.

He's proven this in Florida, and he can bring the same American leadership and patriotism to our great nation.

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: CTA Jan. 30th: STOP Biden’s Unqualified Judicial Nominees and More
body:
| | |
---
This week, use our Align Act campaigns to reject the appointment of judges who are ignorant about the Constitution, pressure the Biden administration to answer questions about the border crisis, and keep Big Government away from your gas stove!
---
| | |
---
[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)
---
Do you think judges on the federal bench should be familiar with the U.S. Constitution? President Biden disagrees! His latest nominee, Charnelle Bjelkengren, confessed she has no knowledge of Article II or Article V. [**Urge your U.S. Senators**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.) to STOP this dangerous nomination for a lifetime appointment!
---
[TAKE ACTION](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.-Bj0TKN2Rr6Da2z85hhQ)
---
|
---
| | Even mathematical truths are unsafe from woke ideology. Luis Leyva, associate professor of mathematics education at Vanderbilt University's Peabody College of Education and Human Development, delivered a lecture [arguing](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._bWlkPTQ2MzQxJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/W_7LwJQMGzOW_3Cl59KDqg) that undergraduate math education is not only racist, but sexist and homophobic. During his presentation at the world's largest math conference in Boston, Leyva claimed that mathematics education "operates as a white, cisheteropatriarchal space that limits learning opportunities affirming of queer of color identities and experiences." His goal is to reimagine "undergraduate mathematics education with structural disruptions that advance justice for learners marginalized across intersections of race, gender, and sexuality."
---
| | |
---
[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.-nIRQ)
---
Stand with Rep. James Comer (R-KY) as he leads the GOP’s efforts to hold the Biden administration accountable for its worsening border crisis! While Democrats continue to lie to the American people about the security of the border, Rep. Comer is launching a series of document demands and congressional hearings to get to the bottom of Biden’s broken policies. **[Show your appreciation](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.-ew)** for Rep. Comer’s leadership by urging your own Member of Congress to support the investigation on the border!
---
[TAKE ACTION](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)
---
|
---
| | The gas stove ban recently floated by the Biden administration's Consumer Product Safety Commission (CPSC) relied on a study by [the Rocky Mountain Institute](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.), whose board is chock full of executives at green energy corporations with a financial interest in banning the use of fossil fuels. The organization also has close ties with a Chinese Communist Party organization with which it partnered to implement an "economy-wide transformation" away from oil and gas. The lead authors of the gas stove study hold no formal advanced scientific training or education. As more questions arise, Congress must demand answers from the CPSC and hold a hearing with CPSC Commissioner Richard Trumka, Jr.
---
| | |
---
[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)
---
From shutting down the Keystone Pipeline, cutting off American energy production, and ceding ground to Russia and China, the Biden administration is hellbent on destroying our affordable energy market. Now, they’ve set their sights on canceling the gas stove. [**Please sign our Align Act petition**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.-HrbXThLBpUnA) urging Congress to demand answers from the Biden administration and hold a hearing with CPSC Commissioner Richard Trumka, Jr.
---
[TAKE ACTION](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._UsX7P9L34WXjuOtOw)
---
|
---
| | A [majority of Americans](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.) want investment funds to focus more on what they do best: maximizing profit. But large investment firms such as BlackRock are relentlessly pushing components of environmental, social and governance (ESG) policies to advance progressive political agendas like fighting climate change. Polling conducted by CRC Research for the 85 Fund reveals that 59% of respondents say that these organizations should maximize money earned for retirees. In fact, 70% of respondents agree that "states should not do business with companies that help build coal plants and pipelines in China while trying to shut down coal plants and pipelines in the United States," an activity in which BlackRock [participates](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._bWlkPTQ2MzQxJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/5Ngt7l-Boui0MiQd1yVKrA).
---
| | [CONTRIBUTE](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.-nAyjpB2nUdxP3fhkZg)
---
|
---
[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6NDkxMDk0ODksImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRIiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjMwMzAtYmRiZjkwMzQ0YTRiNDNkMjk5ZWZiOTY5ZTM5MjU3ODAiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMTQiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3d3dy50ZWFwYXJ0eXBhdHJpb3RzLm9yZy8_bWlkPTQ2MzQxJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/QvZekJVF0wGM8PjPmIsYcA)
---
| | Tea Party Patriots Action, Inc. operates as a social welfare organization under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. Contributions to Tea Party Patriots Action are not deductible as charitable contributions for income tax purposes.
---
| | © 2023 [Tea Party Patriots Action, Inc.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)2295 Towne Lake Pkwy Ste 116-314, Woodstock, GA 30189 **[View This Email in a Browser](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/m/1/49109489/02-b23030-bdbf90344a4b43d299efb969e3925780/51/472/1949a2ab-834e-4318-9079-57d94c832b31)** | **[Manage Subscriptions or Unsubscribe](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)**
---

body:
Mask mandates are returning to classrooms all across America.
[View this message in your browser](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zn0438921vbse310eeo1hrpd4l5j17gg18icotrg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t56ej3fctmekp76t1heipnacpne4pqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65sr2mmq32c3imtindcjimmp31c5mesoe8ptme5hb7cr3c5jm1dpkecor4o5m6ko6fkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj32t5lm3jrcob6e2ob6o77m2qmash1k8gn48n24hhmepb4c1ie8oj4c8iv0)

| | | | | [](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zcl7geogg0cs766ckqdrf5mvfd4qud5v91pdrstg_rp22sh2s8i66pr5chg69p32chh2bs)
---
Mask mandates are returning to classrooms all across America.

Make no mistake, this has nothing to do with 'science.' Studies have already shown that masks interfere with children's brain development.

This is about the "woke" mob being power-hungry and liberal teachers' unions running amok.

As long as they can exert fear in our children and teach them to hate America then they can keep control.

That's why we must ban mask mandates in schools. Do you agree?

name: Great America Update
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c7654%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=RyCC66XXTgzRE%2bg4cjr6Cw&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78728%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=nVqMEsVkR1PCfaWrBRcBiQ&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78729%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=l0nLx8sXRoJP0T0A8NzQBQ&sysid=1)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78729%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=l0nLx8sXRoJP0T0A8NzQBQ&sysid=1)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c7654%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=RyCC66XXTgzRE%2bg4cjr6Cw&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c7654%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=RyCC66XXTgzRE%2bg4cjr6Cw&sysid=1)

**FIRST: **Katie founded HER Time with one mission: to help elect women who are overlooked and underestimated. **THEN: **This team fought like hell to protect amazing Congresswomen like Katie Porter, Lauren Underwood, and Abigail Spanberger — incumbents in close races who we needed to keep in office. We protected those seats, and kept Republicans to a historically low majority. **NOW: **HER Time needs YOUR help to carry on that work into the new cycle. We have a strategy to take back the House in 2024, but none of it will be possible if we don’t consistently hit our fundraising goals and keep our budget on track. We have our first deadline of the year **tomorrow** , and we need your support to meet our goal before it’s too late. [_**Fundraising has slowed down a lot since the election, and we get it. But early investments will make all the difference in 2024. name: Mark Kelly
subject: Humbly asking
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
Since day one, this team has been powered by generous folks like you.
#

Friends
I’m writing to ask you to make a contribution — $3 or anything you can afford — before our first fundraising deadline of the new year ends tomorrow at midnight.
Here’s the truth:
Since day one, this team has been powered by generous folks like you who give $5, $10 or even $25 to emails just like this.
And now that we’ve won a full six-year term in the Senate that same support is going to become even more important as we look to tackle critical issues facing Arizonans and Americans across the country.
And the thing is, if everyone reading this message contributed what they can, we would be able to meet and potentially even surpass our goals in no time.
**So please, I’m humbly asking:**
[**Can you make a $3 contribution before our first fundraising drive of the new year comes to a close? I wouldn’t ask if it weren’t so important.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-jan23.GMKlXM&refcode=em230130-1-7&t=1&akid=4930%2E6688874%2EtsC-ig)

name: Josh Shapiro HQ
subject: the work ahead
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHAPIRO FOR PENNSYLVANIA
body:
Hey Derek – we know the reason you got off the sidelines and worked to elect Gov. Josh Shapiro and Lt. Gov. Austin Davis was because you believed in them to make progress on behalf of Pennsylvanians.

**So we wanted to send you a brief note to let you know that the Shapiro-Davis Administration has very much hit the ground running. Here are a few of the immediate actions Gov. Shapiro and his team have taken in the two weeks since the Inauguration:**
* Signed an Executive Order announcing that 92% of state government jobs in Pennsylvania are open to folks regardless of whether they have a degree.
* Signed an ethics package to prevent improper influence on their administration.
* Established the Office of Transformation and Opportunity to reignite Pennsylvania’s economy — and help our businesses and our workers thrive.

These are big steps forward, Derek. But we also know there is a lot more to do. _We have to make sure every kid has access to a great education._ _We have to tackle gun violence and make our communities safer._ _We have to build an economy that lifts everyone up._

There’s a lot of work ahead, Derek, but here in Pennsylvania, under Governor Shapiro’s leadership, we’re going to continue to stand up for what’s right, bring people together, and get real things done. Thanks for all you do, Team Josh Shapiro

name: American Defense News
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our presi
This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zseacv10r8ikful6li803dhar7q64a5g4ukhc87o_rp22sh2s8i66pr5chi68pb1clh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z9kb7jq6ehk9ikllfva8u3qcq5ds14ehla5l84ug_rp22sh2s8i66pr5chi68pb1clh2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z8jk30mq6e22enkj10u9b3j9t66c2dk8oturdhho_rp22sh2s8i66pr5chi68pb1clh2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

clean_body: A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our presi This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection. By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below: For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty. This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include: Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;” Reaching over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty; Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people; Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and Restoring excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide. name: American Action News
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.
This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvpluo67qe3nmjdgod90ff0qalpe9884mcvqke3o_rp22sh2s8i66pr5chi64p30sjh2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zl3bifrnqj858gji08b8b9uv7lme10flgbpba978_rp22sh2s8i66pr5chi64p30sjh2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zr1cp68uphqmfmcku1jc86i26erin9rfm7u6d5m0_rp22sh2s8i66pr5chi64p30sjh2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

name: Congressman Darin
subject: 🚨 in YOUR backyard
disclaimer_text: Paid for by LaHood for Congress |
body:
The Biden Administration sent the wrong message to the world – and now Americans are suffering because of it.| | | Please see a note from our sponsors. If you would like to unsubscribe, please visit this _[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=43a664ff92cf48bcaf3abf90f1a8bc1c&_t=sPVvgJyB-Gr63g7OhGt-RKoHYrrX2-9rcF3I17TUddGXZlJstyNwK81jG2-cCulj6w9bsoT683F4IWg5EICrKU_QdlEw2Ztq9I3mQ-G0j9U%3D)_.
---
| | Peter, Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, and the Democrats ignore the crisis taking place at our southern border. They believe if they _[**ignore the problem**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=43a664ff92cf48bcaf3abf90f1a8bc1c&_e=YhYtA_HPu_hBcZXXge5vo2Jc0ACR1AW8vWnDxMHBheWkWR5ZeKp-vnUTCNTZ9DFtde8NGKPC3-tCSvcPFPXgcwa-9mKEoZb---3WrJmqlPJzCcQJu2ijR5PHKBblnqGDArXRanAdLHqQ4ouLq8hecHPlhmP52-Oqj4KBi4Zl_9Y_uURcUZbeEpWN-6aYbdD8_DYNQ4nal2pbNxAJMiZMK7Ld2OWwYNGFonwO-lTUSF2LE43eIU6rg24V7J0guWGAO-dKlbFT2PpYH3n7fSrC1EZtaUT1uoj18l4tq2K5Ak8Qp1c-v-yXisLWoCnY_Hh7xPO49c7mMPTdCmryum9C2eQQpxbm2D2Ks1agiAUi_uQUWuq99_VTLOkPeJUO1dr4KEgew0ggnNYgIDuV_AtMHA%3D%3D)_ , it’ll cease to exist. _But we both know that’s_** _NOT_** _how these things work._ In fact, the crisis has gotten much, _much_ worse since they turned a blind eye to illegal immigration.
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=43a664ff92cf48bcaf3abf90f1a8bc1c&_e=YhYtA_HPu_hBcZXXge5vo2Jc0ACR1AW8vWnDxMHBheWkWR5ZeKp-vnUTCNTZ9DFtde8NGKPC3-tCSvcPFPXgcwa-9mKEoZb---3WrJmqlPJzCcQJu2ijR5PHKBblnqGDArXRanAdLHqQ4ouLq8hecHPlhmP52-Oqj4KBi4Zl_9Y_uURcUZbeEpWN-6aYbdD8_DYNQ4nal2pbNxAJMiZMK7Ld2OWwYNGFonwO-lTUSF2LE43eIU6rg24V7J0guWGArogcHwkppIbD5M7lvAi0FBQrDEsYEe_3KtteDmH47gFQXx7wOyFxgOy0VPd2yWCBgFN0Wxk-XN-Zc96_eSBKVMZzElehJOPucEKPFuzoNRGVNnAGPhVAR1A4BQYenmUh39TSS6ywL6JTuqk_Z6mh8w%3D%3D)
---
For _year_ s, conservatives warned about the dangers of leaving our border wide open – to drug cartels, to human smugglers, and to those looking to harm our nation. _[**SECURE THE BORDER >>**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=43a664ff92cf48bcaf3abf90f1a8bc1c&_e=YhYtA_HPu_hBcZXXge5vo2Jc0ACR1AW8vWnDxMHBheWkWR5ZeKp-vnUTCNTZ9DFtde8NGKPC3-tCSvcPFPXgcwa-9mKEoZb---3WrJmqlPJzCcQJu2ijR5PHKBblnqGDArXRanAdLHqQ4ouLq8hecHPlhmP52-Oqj4KBi4Zl_9Y_uURcUZbeEpWN-6aYbdD8_DYNQ4nal2pbNxAJMiZMK7Ld2OWwYNGFonwO-lTUSF2LE43eIU6rg24V7J0guWGAxWXGczifZiwAV4llinH9Z6A4Xd1CSkFNPCmcfyB-d-LWkpkYwiMOlmJz_CKn4CG9Ve_7XTHv44wA-9P_fXO_AGrSBYSztaAZUAstg5N_eAo6jh7CFXkpbKYpoW8JJ244vCd5qrDASHa2HVOUUDwyIQ%3D%3D)_ **_Now, we’re dealing with LITERAL terrorists sneaking into the United States!_**
---
[**PROTECT OUR NATIONAL SECURITY**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=43a664ff92cf48bcaf3abf90f1a8bc1c&_e=YhYtA_HPu_hBcZXXge5vo2Jc0ACR1AW8vWnDxMHBheWkWR5ZeKp-vnUTCNTZ9DFtde8NGKPC3-tCSvcPFPXgcwa-9mKEoZb---3WrJmqlPJzCcQJu2ijR5PHKBblnqGDArXRanAdLHqQ4ouLq8hecHPlhmP52-Oqj4KBi4Zl_9Y_uURcUZbeEpWN-6aYbdD8_DYNQ4nal2pbNxAJMiZMK7Ld2OWwYNGFonwO-lTUSF2LE43eIU6rg24V7J0guWGARtg-Yr6ikT-KRt5_IPI524YkJ73Fzh0BGYddUCc_8h5EcZTevCpsTEEaxtPxlG19ygnqipxIISuU19fPnulIk3DPN5rO1Nki560gVUiy-eik5J1ms-HknRuvnrhyGrP9chQhzGe0FuzOFCO38Yhbcw%3D%3D)
---
| | Peter, the Biden Administration has sent the _wrong message_ to the world: _that our lax national security measures can be taken advantage of._ It’s time to address our border crisis, provide Border Patrol agents with the resources they desperately need, finish building the wall, and **FINALLY** **SECURE OUR BORDER!** **_[Peter, if you agree, rush in a CRITICAL donation to help House conservatives like me fight to FINALLY secure our southern border.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=43a664ff92cf48bcaf3abf90f1a8bc1c&_e=YhYtA_HPu_hBcZXXge5vo2Jc0ACR1AW8vWnDxMHBheWkWR5ZeKp-vnUTCNTZ9DFtde8NGKPC3-tCSvcPFPXgcwa-9mKEoZb---3WrJmqlPJzCcQJu2ijR5PHKBblnqGDArXRanAdLHqQ4ouLq8hecHPlhmP52-Oqj4KBi4Zl_9Y_uURcUZbeEpWN-6aYbdD8_DYNQ4nal2pbNxAJMiZMK7Ld2OWwYNGFonwO-lTUSF2LE43eIU6rg24V7J0guWGAZSjjcUKfhGxXaKCHuNS-5Xaanz15S5KD-vJIBRYt1QCtukpO4tsmF8heU7MisGzi5p7BNC7vOvfWuyMfGHnXX9xo8tEQPzafSB2kZFt0quiVYItTnEC16TR_IhHzkTHTaJsMdghPMK_8k1yoH5qqXA%3D%3D)_ **

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: We had a huge victory and heartbreaking loss in Wisconsin’s statewide elections in 2022. Which one will we get in 2024?
body:
No safe Senate seat in Wisconsin
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9acd4ef8-72c6-4b2a-a0f2-23d04f62ea1c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, _A huge victory and a painful loss. _ That's what happened in Wisconsin in the 2022 election. _We won a huge victory reelecting Governor Tony Evers over a democracy-attacking Republican. Yet, in a heartbreaking loss, _Lt. Gov Mandela Barnes lost by only 1%_ to awful Senator Ron Johnson,_ who attacks vaccines and defends AR-15s like they're part of his family. _**In 2024, real progressive, Senator Tammy Baldwin, is up for reelection. Baldwin's a trailblazer, the first open lesbian ever elected to the Senate. Even though she's from a close swing state, whether protecting women's reproductive autonomy, fighting to raise taxes on billionaires or doing all she can to keep our kids safe from guns in school,[we can always count on Senator Baldwin to lead the charge.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T042edfae-28a6-45e0-b714-b6ba24e8d737/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**_
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T21fffdb4-f9d2-4cf4-bc1b-6a82a89f07a1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| _All the prognosticators have predicted we'll lose the Senate in 2024, because we have so many tough seats to defend.** And there's no world in which we lose Senator Baldwin's seat and retain a Senate majority.**_ [**_So, for the awesome trailblazing Tammy Baldwin and our Senate majority, can you join Blue Amp Action in giving Senator Baldwin $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Teb7b082b-0d0d-4ba0-a254-edf05748e87d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you so much, Cliff
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8a32c958-4ab2-4dd6-ba7f-7e9b5d47f2e1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | |
---
| | Follow Us | [](https://twitter.com/intent/follow?screen_name=cliffschecter)| [](https://linkedin.com/in/cliffschecter-0873a448/)
---|---
| **Blue Amp Strategies**
1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/tammybaldwin-n?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc3adfd9b-8976-4a8f-97ec-9f3869c94371/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

body:

clean_body: This administration will no longer go unchecked. | Friend, The days of the Biden Administration going unchecked and leaving Americans behind are over now that Republicans have won the House majority. But as we approach the first end-of-month deadline since our new House majority took over, we have fallen behind on our goal by $10,385. We only have two days left to reach this goal to show the Left we won’t back down from this fight and I’m counting on your help. It has now been two years since Joe Biden took office and inflation is sitting at 6.5%, crime is hitting new records across the country, and he has just been caught mishandling classified documents. It’s been two years of failures, double standards, and hypocrisy from this administration. But now that we have taken back the majority, we will build back the economy, make our communities safe again, and hold Biden accountable. And by reaching our end-of-month goal we will be one step closer to a better America. Thank you, Rep. Bryan Steil Wisconsin’s 1st Congressional District PAID FOR BY STEIL FOR WISCONSIN INC 1818 MILTON AVE. #1448 JANESVILLE, WI 53545

name: Ready for Ron
subject: President DeSantis?
body:
Can you imagine what America would look like with Ron DeSantis in the Oval Office? Leadership who will protect our. . .
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zmgqmt331d8rvml0n176n009tpdvm4t475inuir0_rp22sh2s8i66pr5chi6cpj4cdh2bs)

Hello Friend,

Can you imagine what America would look like with Ron DeSantis in the Oval Office?

Leadership who will protect our. . .

. . . children from Critical Race Theory and gross sexualization in the classroom.

. . . unborn children from late-term abortion.

. . . country from forced experimental vaccines.

. . . Constitutional rights and civil liberties.

. . . schools from the teacher's unions.

. . . kids from woke doctors pushing transgender hormone therapies and surgeries.

Can you imagine that, Friend?

We need your help to make this a reality. That's why we're raising $10,000 in the next 72 hours to help draft Ron for President. Can you help us meet that goal today?

[_**You can help build a nationwide grassroots network of support to draft Ron by clicking here to donate $10, $25, $50, or any amount >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z3b59mofn0hp0m4bui2hrd5t8772cudne8mm0la8_rp22sh2s8i66pr5chi6cpj4cdh2bs)

Ron is a proven leader at a time when our country needs leadership and direction.

He's bold, takes action, and can lead America to security and prosperity.

He's proven this in Florida, and he can bring the same American leadership and patriotism to our great nation.

**Ron is the best choice to win the presidency in 2024 and reform the Washington swamp.**

But one man can't win an election alone. That's why Ready for Ron needs your help to build a large enough grassroots network to convince Ron to run for President.

As Republicans plunge further into chaos and confusion at every level, the American people are paying the price. We need to elect Democrats at all levels who will put _People_ Over Politics. We need leaders who will bring our Democratic values to life. **I know that House Democrats will continue to stand up against extremism and deliver for the American people. But extreme MAGA Republicans will try every trick in their partisan playbook to stand in the way of progress, so it’s more important than ever that we elect more Democrats in state legislatures. To ensure we have the resources we’ll need, we _must_ hit our end-of-month deadline.** **This is our first deadline of the new year, so it’s crucial we show the GOP that Democrats are standing strong and united – can I count on you to step up today?** [Rush a donation of $10 or more to be split between myself and the DLCC to help elect state Democrats who will fight for our Democratic agenda in states like yours and in Congress >> ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xtkPMy1D1zHzXpPa6X6gVJFPY_juTaUpjXUt1kpCEY98k42GT9GRf-T8wE2IjgF99CjUWNLiiqNwykXOnoTkZtsI9aKh0lFa1cCKmFHufq-i8yn2B9CIAbTHZpy8WckNF4aTb8LhZvbtFFKY4oBPYkOqYhZwXgbZFCcWmeuwfnBKzEk5_7_Qhot-ZVsF62XlV2EvH4gsn8zWfp83O6SjYss40gvghWBMykHwMjyce86pH5YHXy3oQq0tM7VJexwFCMPxbZhazcJtfAZw2L7Dd1_MpQpF5BMcs9CnZjxuKEj8LktCUMhq4eiBoT-hELFE2xBlxnbgahRDELo8-VITYrhl4rTGGmwz7MQHd7nT1uRuN4tOevgDNCRi6E51G9x6k/3ta/wlKwTJy3SOyMK-me7-FAGg/h2/n2Xw3AfGNSQ84hNhAquYaRg28X3YufcRlsujwF_D2nM) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately and be split between Leader Hakeem Jeffries and the DLCC.

I’m reaching out today to ask you to But first, let me explain why your gift today to support state Democrats is so important: I got my start in politics as a state legislator, serving in the New York State Assembly for six years. I’ve seen firsthand the power state legislatures have and the difference they can make for our communities. As Republicans plunge further into chaos and confusion at every level, the American people are paying the price. We need to elect Democrats at all levels who will put People Over Politics. We need leaders who will bring our Democratic values to life. I know that House Democrats will continue to stand up against extremism and deliver for the American people. But extreme MAGA Republicans will try every trick in their partisan playbook to stand in the way of progress, so it’s more important than ever that we elect more Democrats in state legislatures. To ensure we have the resources we’ll need, we must hit our end-of-month deadline. This is our first deadline of the new year, so it’s crucial we show the GOP that Democrats are standing strong and united – can I count on you to step up today? | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately and be split between Leader Hakeem Jeffries and the DLCC. | | | | | Democrats at all levels are building a better future for their constituents – implementing paid family leave, investing in education, fighting to lower costs for working families and so much more. We need their leadership, and they’re depending on our support. Our progressive vision for this country will only move forward if we strengthen our Democratic bench up and down the ballot – that’s why I’m asking you to split a donation between myself and the DLCC today. clean_body: | | Peter, we need your attention for just 30 seconds: Donald Trump just held his first campaign rally this cycle. He spent every second on that stage slandering Democrats, riling up his base, and spreading dangerous lies to take back the White House. = = | = Look, it’s my job to make sure Democrats raise the resources we need to compete with extreme MAGA Republicans’ massive donors and turn the House blue. = If we can overshadow Trump and Republicans’ fundraising in response to one of their most important rallies, it will signal a stunning rebuke against their radical agenda and prove that the American people value Democracy, not demagogues. We won’t get another chance like this one, Peter. Will you rush $15 to make Trump's rally backfire? | = = | = = | = = Let's get this done, Team Jeffries Hakeem Jeffries is the Democratic Leader of the U.S. House of Representatives. Like many of us, Hakeem was raised by a working-class family; His mom was a social worker and his dad was a substance abuse counselor. Now, as the top Democrat in the House, he’s fighting to stop MAGA extremism and reclaim the Majority for Democrats. Hakeem is committed to electing a record number of Democrats in the next election and beyond. But he can’t compete with Republicans’ special interest cash without our support. Is there any way you could chip in to help? = We know you’re getting a lot of emails, but that’s because Democrats have a clear path to winning back the House – and Hakeem isn’t letting a single second go to waste. | | Good morning. Your generosity in 2022 was extraordinary. I am grateful that my campaign received the most individual contributions of any rural Democrat Congressional Democrat in the state of Michigan. Last year, your contributions set the ground-work for a two-cycle strategy that we know is intimidating GOP primary candidates on the other side of the ballot. They're challenging Rep. Bergman! But, in order to sweep a primary next August and defeat the Republican nominee in November 2024, we still have a lot of work to do. That work starts now. Although we fell short of our goals to get sufficient campaign airtime on network TV last cycle, this round, we're saving every penny to ensure Democrats have a strong presence on television. I need your help getting us there. A contribution to my [Rural Fund](https://www.votedrbob.com/so/c8OO3FZas/c?w=eqvFGOZaWFDpAZqvuTuvBXFiSkbM3naXcpMvX9JLKNo.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2ZyaWVuZHMtb2YtZHItYm9iLTEiLCJyIjoiYjg1NDIwMGMtNGJlNS00MjU0LWUwN2EtZWU3NDEwMzIwM2ExIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiMTg2NjI2ZDUtY2E1ZS00NjMzLTgzNGEtZTg4M2QwYmRkZDc1In0) will help us fight for Democratic principles across Northern Michigan and the Upper Peninsula as we partner with other quality candidates up and down the ballot. Your donation will advance initiatives like a publicly financed, non-profit, national health insurance program that fully covers medical care costs for all Americans. We are also using our platform and my candidacy to champion investments in manufacturing, job creation, family tax relief, LGBTQ / Women / Minority rights, and bringing the supply-chain home to Michigan — where it belongs. Why?
* Infrastructure investment creates jobs.
* Childcare allows families to thrive.
* Healthcare saves lives.
* Education shapes the next generation.
* Affordable housing retains local talent.
* Climate mitigation protects our communities.

Hardworking Northern Michiganders and Yoopers deserve a better advocate in Congress. If you agree with the rural initiative and platform, please consider donating today. Let us know if you have any questions about my campaign or suggestions on how we can make a difference in rural America. Thank you. Yours, -Dr. Bob Bob Lorinserinfo@votedrbob.comCandidate for US CongressMichigan's 1st Congressional DistrictNorthern Michigan & the Upper PeninsulaVoteDrBob.com
---

Peter,

Tomorrow at midnight, our campaign will reach our first major fundraising deadline of 2023, and we need your support. After a tough election in 2022, building momentum early for the next election cycle is crucial - [_**will you rush a contribution to our campaign right away?**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/E0xXm0FGOjhcfkKwcPFsnkAQ_KZB6dGIkkQIwWiQzds=/S-_hsbAWbcxjECw6KvldiuCI2krh_Mz_w2wTKFwMGcw=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20230130-1-EM&amount=25)

It's never too early to begin preparations for the 2024 election. And while Abigail's out working for and delivering for the people of her district, we - her campaign team - are working hard to ensure that _**Abigail can continue advocating for us in Congress.**_

She's been our productive leader ever since she was sworn in, and the strong foundation we build now will ensure we re-elect her in 2024. name: Newt Gingrich
subject: Re: Kevin McCarthy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
| |
---
| | | Friend,

I've been doing a lot of thinking about what the new Republican majority means for America, and I've concluded that it all boils down to three words: Speaker Kevin McCarthy. As a former Speaker myself, I know how tough the job can be. That's why I chose to support Kevin from the get-go - he's a natural-born leader who's prepared to fight day in and day out for the American people.

---
| | [SUPPORT KEVIN MCCARTHY](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0981007274bf49caa8ac7dc0f4d34cdf&_e=XjpXDuxit1dlJ6vN7xBIwNqtg9xv21vpzNO8pcXfb4Dz9PPIxZs3Vd7DjYcTPbQEc9qPWlpaAvXk9Ed7XJe1DtM76T96YW2x_0YXJCZ8TvbFxFREto-0roc4s4RNfNgAYWqRcEgL0OVzm6MUUNZthBoJdotlkNA6BymoypuNqRrR5LkbEy-h1oFM2hq39esFvJvcu1Fv067-7FKNm2NGImUp2NdFnX86gZWMb7XRAqkruIUQjSe6tTr45vkQmbv95Y23kYnQt2met3copGtAeKIYpaP9qsJN5DmmwgBr2iUxT78L_cndrBIS9wwRZ5g0l_Hw31LpnVOP3kj7JI9_PElqIWK6M6T2yZRg-c3Wi1Tc3WGQkPMvb7HCKqmQH8gH650SaprmgEa1S5Kf5-JWJvemMBzRe3cTD3RQpK33aPt1UnAUczsFLN8PthQunglkRJyq4eBMRdzAs8z_xFZy-Q%3D%3D)
---

Kevin's first couple of weeks in office have confirmed what I, and millions of other Americans, have long suspected: **he 's THE politician America _desperately_ needs at this pivotal moment in history.** He's already fired 3 corrupt Dems from their committee assignments, rescinded the funding for Biden's army of 87,000 IRS agents, formed a committee to tackle the Chinese Communist threat, moved to protect our country's strategic petroleum reserve, launched an investigation into the Weaponization of the Federal Government, and take several significant actions to protect innocent life from radical abortionists.

Kevin is a man of results, not empty promises. I'm proud to call him my Speaker. name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: Remember the January 6 peaceful protesters!
body:
Those held in jail – especially the hellish D.C. jail – couldn’t celebrate Christmas last year with their spouses, childre
Those held in jail – especially the hellish D.C. jail – couldn’t celebrate Christmas last year with their spouses, children, extended families, or friends. They weren’t allowed to go to Midnight Mass or sing Christmas hymns on Sunday morning at church. | | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zl108ljlmj1l4rrhgi2cqp3bc6cksfi2j3g2t9v0_rp22sh2s8i66pr5chi6aob3clh2bs)
|
---

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2ze302hu25velurc4v3do5hl8a2utur6pc813dg8o_rp22sh2s8i66pr5chi6aob3clh2bs) Dear Patriot,

[**Please give a crucial $25, $50, $100, or more TODAY to fully fund my two critical class action lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to FREE and get JUSTICE for ALL January 6 protesters!**

](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z7omf1upahffnmdss90hbua2f0jmi8il78ei1oi8_rp22sh2s8i66pr5chi6aob3clh2bs) I hope you enjoyed a wonderful Christmas and New Year with your family and friends.

**At this time, I can’t help but think of my client, Marine combat veteran Jesus Rivera, and the other January 6 Peaceful Protesters who’ve been thrown to the wolves.**

Those held in jail – especially the hellish D.C. jail – couldn’t celebrate Christmas last year with their spouses, children, extended families, or friends. They weren’t allowed to go to Midnight Mass or sing Christmas hymns on Sunday morning at church.

**If they celebrated, they did it as political prisoners who prayed and sang...while hoping that the guards wouldn’t show up and beat them again.**

You and I know they’re being railroaded for just exercising their Constitutionally protected rights that day at the Capitol building.

Jesus Rivera didn’t even protest. He just shot video on his smart phone and a digital camera for a local news station back home in Florida. He entered the Capitol peacefully like many other patriots that day.

But Jesus has been sentenced to eight months in federal prison anyway.

Disabled Marine veteran Zach Rehl protested peacefully, but he’s been held without bail and the VA cut off his disability payments.

As you know, other January 6 peaceful protesters have been driven to such desperation by the abuse and torture they endure, that over 30 of them begged to get transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba!

**Many of these jailed patriots haven’t held or even seen their families in a year or more...some, like prisoner Peter Stager, have been jailed for over 600 days.**

That’s why I beg you to stand with me at this crucial time.

**I’m Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.**

I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.**

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents – AND WIN!**

And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten criminal regime in court.

I’m suing everyone responsible for these outrages, including FBI Director Christopher Wray.

[**Patriot, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zk8tra391gdv2iu58gifqd1sdfp6s604lmdh9c8o_rp22sh2s8i66pr5chi6aob3clh2bs)

Your best gift today will help me fight for these jailed patriots, bring them justice, and fight for the future of our Great Nation.

[**So please give what you can right away.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zv1c67j412p5ahsagd9jt1vvpsrc1ai2gahfvqh8_rp22sh2s8i66pr5chi6aob3clh2bs)

Thank you so much!

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

[**P.S. Patriot, I can’t fight for the January 6 peaceful protesters without your vital support. Please give at least a crucial $25, $50, $100, or even $250 or more immediately.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zgei8am9vkc5q7h5bog63mc11cau929sagub0118_rp22sh2s8i66pr5chi6aob3clh2bs)

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

body:

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57998833/389769531/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNTZlN2U4OS1iZmEwLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c8UDHvfypeXU0DIsP5iBwrCruA6Gi_20k5zBlc8xdXg=&emci=3422b319-609e-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=c56e7e89-bfa0-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=15820338)

Peter:

In the first month of the new Republican House majority, we've seen a glimpse of what the next two years will look like. Republicans were unable to unite around a speaker for four days and 15 rounds of voting, proving this may be a chaotic and challenging term in the House.

Republicans might be in chaos, but they're determined to pass their dangerous agenda at whatever cost. **They've already passed bills attacking abortion rights, proposed a 30% national sales tax, and proposed cuts to Social Security and Medicare.**

We might only be a few weeks into this term, but it's already clear how crucial it is that Democrats retake the House majority and make sure Kevin McCarthy is no longer speaker of the House in 2024.

clean_body: In the first month of the new Republican House majority, we've seen a glimpse of what the next two years will look like. Peter: In the first month of the new Republican House majority, we've seen a glimpse of what the next two years will look like. Republicans were unable to unite around a speaker for four days and 15 rounds of voting, proving this may be a chaotic and challenging term in the House. Republicans might be in chaos, but they're determined to pass their dangerous agenda at whatever cost. They've already passed bills attacking abortion rights, proposed a 30% national sales tax, and proposed cuts to Social Security and Medicare. We might only be a few weeks into this term, but it's already clear how crucial it is that Democrats retake the House majority and make sure Kevin McCarthy is no longer speaker of the House in 2024. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = = Thanks, Team Schrier Rep. name: Maggie Hassan
subject: why January?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
I know it may feel odd to fundraise in January, so far from the next election.
| | |
---
Look – I know it may feel odd to fundraise in January, so far from the next election.

While we don’t need to keep raising money at quite the same clip as we do when we’re “in cycle,” we need steady donations to keep our campaign active and continue talking with Granite Staters.

name: Charlie Kirk, Turning Point USA
subject: Putting them on trial
body:
I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time. And now I want to send YOU a copy of the evidence against America's col
| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zr6b15gmf94sovv01ue1k4neg3498t7h3hu85gs8_rp22sh2s8i66pr5chi66o32cth2bs)
---
Fellow Patriot, I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time. _And now I want to send YOU a copy of the evidence against America's colleges and universities -- my NEW BOOK,_**The College Scam.** [**Will you claim YOUR copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zrho0nj0m2vvks2faf5nelsj534ctrbvreti9ffg_rp22sh2s8i66pr5chi66o32cth2bs)
---
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zr18ksoohi9re9o0miso3nca3869s7geof809rbo_rp22sh2s8i66pr5chi66o32cth2bs)
---
_I was proud to share my new book,_ The College Scam,_
with President Donald Trump._
---
**I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. _And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives._ **I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_.** Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with _The College Scam_ to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. [**I'd like to send you a copy of my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_ , as a special thank-you for a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA. Will you claim your book right now?**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zl3pa984634ebmo2r1tgca6if80q1apfpdmh9ec8_rp22sh2s8i66pr5chi66o32cth2bs)
---
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zdccl1c1f2i3s8vtk5s3gbc2ej7v71ib9cihiccg_rp22sh2s8i66pr5chi66o32cth2bs)
---
I wrote this book as an ESSENTIAL GUIDE for every patriot concerned about young people and the future of our country. When you read _The College Scam,_ you'll learn:
* my 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge

* the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness

* how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain

**_And I want you to know -- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists_.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... EXTENSIVE RESEARCH into the dirty secrets of higher education (and how the government props it up!) ... and a PROSECUTOR'S INTENSITY to present my case against the College Cartel. [**Can I send you a copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY amount, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zgrs5vq7ol2sishqohse39ho28dqvomg53e3hld8_rp22sh2s8i66pr5chi66o32cth2bs) That means you'll get a copy of this exciting new book AND help support Turning Point USA's critical work to EXPOSE the Left’s college scam, DEFEAT the radical Left, and WIN the American Culture War!
---
[Get your copy](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z1chohb59mll9ci20d9cr2g3k65k2kp27dofictg_rp22sh2s8i66pr5chi66o32cth2bs)
---
The College Cartel has created and spread the WORST and MOST TOXIC beliefs behind the Left's War on American Culture. And no one has exposed the FULL TRUTH of the College Scam -- until now. [**You don't want to miss it! Please claim your copy of _The College Scam_ RIGHT NOW. All I'm asking for is a gift of any amount to Turning Point USA to help cover shipping -- and support our efforts to WIN the American Culture War.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zcue3cklqmd0prt1udj34u03nsan6l2oum8cvda8_rp22sh2s8i66pr5chi66o32cth2bs) Thank you for helping me EXPOSE the College Cartel and fight back against their toxic ideologies in the American Culture War!
---
Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA
---
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

body:
👀
#
Peter, our January end-of-month fundraising deadline is rapidly approaching, and we're cutting it close. Here's the latest:
**As of this morning, we've made it 38% of the way to our fundraising goal.** But over the last few days, our fundraising has slowed...
[](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230130-1.yvKOjj&amount=5&refcode=em20230130-2094&t=1&akid=2094%2E1082990%2ERs9K_S)
**...and there are only a few days to go until the deadline.**
We set this goal to make sure Team Cori has the resources to organize our movement, build anti-racist progressive power in Congress, and generate momentum for change. _Especially now with a Republican-controlled Congress — we simply can't afford to fall short on our fundraising goals._
**This grassroots team has always had Cori’s back, so we're counting on our supporters to come through again. After doing the math — if one out of four people reading this email right now made a $3 contribution, we’ll pull this off.[Can you chip in $5 and help us recover from this fundraising slowdown?](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230130-1.yvKOjj&amount=5&refcode=em20230130-2094&t=2&akid=2094%2E1082990%2ERs9K_S)**

In Congress, Cori has been working for the transformational change we deserve. **Unlike many other elected officials, Cori chooses to focus on fighting for this community, and that means turning down the big money that would otherwise come in from corporate PAC donations.**
We know this is the right way to fundraise to make sure Cori can continue pushing for a people-first agenda in Congress — but that also means we can't afford to fall short on incremental monthly goals like this one.
**[Will you make a donation right now to help us reach our $74,000 end-of-month fundraising goal tonight so we have the resources to power our organizing, legislative, and advocacy efforts in Congress.](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230130-1.yvKOjj&amount=5&refcode=em20230130-2094&t=4&akid=2094%2E1082990%2ERs9K_S)**

Let's do this.
—Team Cori

name: Team Trump
subject: Update from the campaign trail
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
The President’s first stops in New Hampshire and South Carolina.
| | |
---
President Trump embarked on a whirlwind campaign tour Saturday with two POWERHOUSE stops in the key states of New Hampshire – home of “First in the Nation” Primary – and South Carolina, which is “First in the South”.
|
---
_President Trump heads to Salem, New Hampshire_
[Patriots lined the highway](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJxdUcFuhCAQ_Rq9YRBd0YOHbu0mzSa99LBNLxsKo9IgEoSQ_fuOm20PDZMhvMe8GR7Qlw0_0K6jVZ2rnsmWSZnrnlFW0RKD46IF0nyko-RNS5uRsaymSdtCrVYY9R18XFwh1yWfe5BSdF3HoG5GhSK1UONhVK2s-ZeC6pCbfg7BbVn1lLETRkqpCDNMIkASNxet0mHXQmofAjdaYnIeNq3ABnLvRiwkMovFbbP2QBIYLAFF5jgBkX5Nigiz2on4NQYgHoS6kRC9_VfosQbb1Pss1SmG5YoqOi5ZNcAitMlYs4PbGr0EBKW-igcmUUToySL669Yvs9qAkyLRlrxF8GqNVnhMI_t8t9Hx-Q7OWqEPw4twl9ey4yL3vXJJG6O3hqPF0z7B3VdsZfR46zN-zBi71-En7Bayc338eGvOl_NAmKOfZGgOddpZ9ow53Bz8XX2oFI-XsYwPP_J-oWs) welcoming President Trump to the Granite State as he made his way to the annual meeting of the New Hampshire Republican Party.
At the event, President Trump spoke to a packed venue of grassroots activists, and proudly [announced](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw9UE1vgzAM_TXhBnIMJHDgsI5Vmqrt2mmXKg2hpIUQQRDqv5-p2imWnbzn-OOZiguZQ1lCmkVNhbpArSNbIWAKnEzSgYRo2UKrpShAtIgsg9W6pBmd6ptrmJbBJ3ocoq5KpVEac8l1cS5BtiXXbVYiP2ccCwXnqK-6EPzM0jeGe7J1XRM_9jZYPW41CHJmnSlsM1AAvt0Lco8-sVaDV_bi4jkYr5y9xZQfd4TOnZ1MDAAFAOcs3S9hOA2mscvA0toMyvYMxQbO4zJpQ6C2J_XEXnUJfW3_YkYXjAtEFFzSIOLketvQs7l-3-uvvDveHmBnG9qr_lD--MlLqaKpavxq-97OQpJkl22Ch07UqrftvWJyxxAf_0jUTRI8ZLufb3E4HuoYPfzGtcizdWPxnXy4e_Of-qySPDdDJus_EtOMIg) that outgoing New Hampshire GOP Chair Stephen Stepanek will serve as his campaign’s Senior Advisor for New Hampshire.
|
