_(From left to right) Former Lt. Governor André Bauer, Congressman Joe Wilson, Congressman Russell Fry, Lt. Governor Pamela Evette, Governor Henry McMaster, President Donald J. Trump, Senator Lindsay Graham, Congressman Will Timmons, Hon. Ed McMullen, and U.S. Attorney Peter McCoy. _
Among the leaders who announced their endorsements of President Trump are:
Governor Henry McMaster, Governor of South Carolina
Senator Lindsey Graham, U.S. Senator from South Carolina
Congressman Joe Wilson, U.S. Representative from South Carolina’s 2nd Congressional District
Congressman William Timmons, U.S. Representative from South Carolina’s 4th Congressional District
Congressman Russell Fry, U.S. Representative from South Carolina’s 7th Congressional District
Lieutenant Governor Pamela Evette, Lieutenant Governor of South Carolina

The Honorable André Bauer, Former Lieutenant Governor of South Carolina
The Honorable Peter McCoy, Former U.S. Attorney for South Carolina

clean_body: The President’s first stops in New Hampshire and South Carolina. | | | President Trump embarked on a whirlwind campaign tour Saturday with two POWERHOUSE stops in the key states of New Hampshire – home of “First in the Nation” Primary – and South Carolina, which is “First in the South”. | President Trump heads to Salem, New Hampshire welcoming President Trump to the Granite State as he made his way to the annual meeting of the New Hampshire Republican Party. At the event, President Trump spoke to a packed venue of grassroots activists, and proudly that outgoing New Hampshire GOP Chair Stephen Stepanek will serve as his campaign’s Senior Advisor for New Hampshire. | President Trump with the new State Party Chairman Chris Ager, right, and outgoing State Party Chairman Steve Stepanek, at the New Hampshire Republican State Committee 2023 Annual Meeting, in Salem, NH In his remarks, President Trump outlined his bold vision for a great America: a free of radical Marxist indoctrination, a country with , and a foreign policy that restores puts America First. "My personality kept us out of war," President Trump said. "And I told you before, it would have never happened with Russia. Putin would have never ever gone in. And even now I could solve that in 24 hours." President Trump also to preserve New Hampshire’s first-in-the-nation status, as he has consistently done in the face of calls to change this cherished political tradition. Granite Staters . “I’m more angry now and I’m more committed now than I ever was,” President Trump remarked. “If you think of what we’ve done, we had the largest tax cut in the history of our country, we had the largest regulation cuts in our history of our country, we had the safest Southern border in the history of our country, we had the least amount of drugs in decades and decades. Right now, it’s ten times the drugs are pouring into our Southern border as when I left.” | “As someone who has won the New Hampshire presidential primary not once, but twice, I know better than anybody what a special role this state and its people play in choosing America’s presidents.” President Donald J. Trump Aboard Trump Force One en route to South Carolina, President Trump set the record straight during a press gaggle with reporters. | President Trump speaks to travelling press pool. | President Trump deplanes Trump Force One at Columbia Metropolitan Airport At the State Capitol in Columbia, SC, President Trump unveiled his campaign’s South Carolina leadership team – a roster of the biggest names in state politics. | (From left to right) Former Lt. Governor André Bauer, Congressman Joe Wilson, Congressman Russell Fry, Lt. Governor Pamela Evette, Governor Henry McMaster, President Donald J. Trump, Senator Lindsay Graham, Congressman Will Timmons, Hon. Ed McMullen, and U.S. Attorney Peter McCoy. Among the leaders who announced their endorsements of President Trump are: Governor Henry McMaster, Governor of South Carolina Senator Lindsey Graham, U.S. Senator from South Carolina Congressman Joe Wilson, U.S. Representative from South Carolina’s 2nd Congressional District Congressman William Timmons, U.S. Representative from South Carolina’s 4th Congressional District Congressman Russell Fry, U.S. Representative from South Carolina’s 7th Congressional District Lieutenant Governor Pamela Evette, Lieutenant Governor of South Carolina Treasurer Curtis Loftis, Treasurer of South Carolina The Honorable Ed McMullen, Former U.S. Ambassador to Switzerland and Liechtenstein The Honorable André Bauer, Former Lieutenant Governor of South Carolina The Honorable Peter McCoy, Former U.S. Attorney for South Carolina | : Congressman Russell Fry Introduces President Trump at The South Carolina State Capitol Speaking at a Capitol building, President Trump vowed to return our Middle Class prosperity by and putting an end to our government’s . He also vowed to implement a historic series of reforms to save America education, including the direct election of public school principals by the parents. And he pledged to in America. | "The 2024 election is our one shot to save our country—and we need a leader who is ready to do that on Day One. We need a fighter who can stand up to the Left, stand up to the Swamp, stand up to the media, stand up to the Deep State, stand up to the RINOs, stand up to the globalists and China, and stand up for America.” President Donald J. Trump | “To change the whole system, you need a president who can take-on the whole system—and a President that can win... There is only one president who has ever challenged the entire establishment in Washington—and with your vote next year, we will do it again.” President Donald J. Trump Before leaving for Mar-a-Lago, President Trump local eatery Zesto in Columbia, South Carolina and surprised , and ! | President Trump shakes hands with a young staff member at Zesto in Columbia, South Carolina | President Trump poses with workers during his stop at Zesto in Columbia, South Carolina | Workers at Zesto say a prayer over President Trump following his speech at the State Capitol where he declared: "We need the blessings from God. Our country is in big trouble." Watch the moment The latest polls show President Trump and the MAGA movement leading the field in both and , but our mission is far from over. | | President Trump promised the good people of New Hampshire and South Carolina that he will return many times in the months ahead to share his bold and ambitious agenda. body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2301-q1-wn?refcode=230118-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2301-q1-wn?refcode=230118-email]Team,
We are coming up on the two year mark since President Biden’s inauguration. Since then, the President and House Democrats have delivered on their campaign promises. From the American Rescue Plan to the Bipartisan Infrastructure Bill, Democrats said they were going to make progress for American families, and they have.
Now that I am in Congress, and Democrats have lost the House Majority, we are going to have to keep up the hard work for the next two years to continue moving the needle forward. Your support is a critical part of this plan. Can you chip in to support my campaign and help me do my part to push Democratic priorities forward? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2301-q1-wn?refcode=230118-email]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

I ran for Congress so be the voice NC-13 needs and take action on the most pressing issues facing our community. The last two years have shown what can happen when Democrats have a majority, and it is on us to hold this seat so we can get back there in 2024.
Just like our first race, it is going to take all of us working together to win this race and races across the country. It may sound far away, but the sooner we get to work, the more prepared we can be. Donate today, and let’s work together for a better and brighter future. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2301-q1-wn?refcode=230118-email]
Thank you,
Wiley Nickel

name: Charlie Kirk, Turning Point USA
subject: See the evidence for yourself
body:
I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time.
| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ztlm1ov9mk1p6n28uspv3000dogje09hodjnvoqo_rp22sh2s8i66pr5chi66or6c3h2bs)
---
Fellow Patriot, I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time. _And now I want to send YOU a copy of the evidence against America's colleges and universities -- my NEW BOOK,_**The College Scam.** [**Will you claim YOUR copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zhvgvu6dk8qu6bmugjo9583i992ha2a6fg2b9oa0_rp22sh2s8i66pr5chi66or6c3h2bs)
---
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zc7ad7rff8gbi37baob9l4rfptbp3r8iv6ce4f10_rp22sh2s8i66pr5chi66or6c3h2bs)
---
_I was proud to share my new book,_ The College Scam,_
with President Donald Trump._
---
**I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. _And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives._ **I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_.** Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with _The College Scam_ to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. [**I'd like to send you a copy of my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_ , as a special thank-you for a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA. Will you claim your book right now?**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zq6o0r5p8j3nv6gmia2pn3l28761qrlqoue0eaa8_rp22sh2s8i66pr5chi66or6c3h2bs)
---
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zjv47mgk6mns9ug5bajcu7mcno9v4vj8h2buuojg_rp22sh2s8i66pr5chi66or6c3h2bs)
---
I wrote this book as an ESSENTIAL GUIDE for every patriot concerned about young people and the future of our country. When you read _The College Scam,_ you'll learn:
* my 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge

* the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness

* how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain

**_And I want you to know -- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists_.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... EXTENSIVE RESEARCH into the dirty secrets of higher education (and how the government props it up!) ... and a PROSECUTOR'S INTENSITY to present my case against the College Cartel. [**Can I send you a copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY amount, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2za7t4dffbs3cto9um9vj0t6ckmcgg7b74nplgj08_rp22sh2s8i66pr5chi66or6c3h2bs) That means you'll get a copy of this exciting new book AND help support Turning Point USA's critical work to EXPOSE the Left’s college scam, DEFEAT the radical Left, and WIN the American Culture War!
---
[Get your copy](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zclnan1nmm94m50aoemha0182dk12sf3942ipskg_rp22sh2s8i66pr5chi66or6c3h2bs)
---
The College Cartel has created and spread the WORST and MOST TOXIC beliefs behind the Left's War on American Culture. And no one has exposed the FULL TRUTH of the College Scam -- until now. [**You don't want to miss it! Please claim your copy of _The College Scam_ RIGHT NOW. All I'm asking for is a gift of any amount to Turning Point USA to help cover shipping -- and support our efforts to WIN the American Culture War.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6vufbphiksmtm62jk8u103ue7fimq4pbif27u18_rp22sh2s8i66pr5chi66or6c3h2bs) Thank you for helping me EXPOSE the College Cartel and fight back against their toxic ideologies in the American Culture War!
---
Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA
---
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

That means you'll get a copy of this exciting new book AND help support Turning Point USA's critical work to EXPOSE the Left’s college scam, DEFEAT the radical Left, and WIN the American Culture War! The College Cartel has created and spread the WORST and MOST TOXIC beliefs behind the Left's War on American Culture. And no one has exposed the FULL TRUTH of the College Scam -- until now. Thank you for helping me EXPOSE the College Cartel and fight back against their toxic ideologies in the American Culture War! Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044 If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Trumptrainnews, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

We can't keep up the fight without more Americans on board, and with just a day left before Kat's first End of Month Deadline tomorrow, we need you to pitch in!

subject: We’re running behind
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www
body:
|
---
Peter, We reached out a few days ago to tell you why it was so important we hit our first fundraising goal of the year. Early resources are what allow us to find candidates, staff, and organizers that have the fire we need to win races and make tangible improvements in Hoosiers’ lives. **But now, we’re running behind our goal. name: Team Durbin
subject: this is a big opportunity
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
let’s finish January strong
#
Peter,
It’s January. Congress is back to work and elections are not top of mind for most of us. But that gives us a big opportunity to get a head start on raising funds to defend our Democratic majority.
Senator Durbin needs his online supporters to step up and close the gap to our January goal. **[Will you contribute $5 or any amount you can to help finish this first month strong?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58001233/389777412/785331925?refcode=dd_em_230130_1_t1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOWI2MmFmNi1jM2EwLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=01B2Ret6p1zOQHzHw6diU5BlgqMf8IOHoNASEsKevUA=)**
Democrats won the Senate — but we can’t be complacent. We have a razor-thin majority. And MAGA Republicans are in control of the House, making our path to progress more difficult.
But Senate Democrats will be fighting tooth and nail to ensure that the Senate is doing the work the American people sent us to do. And the best way that grassroots supporters can make an impact right now is to ensure we have the resources we need to keep up the fight.
**[Donate $5 before tomorrow’s end-of-month deadline and help keep the Senate blue.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58001234/389777413/785331925?refcode=dd_em_230130_1_t1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOWI2MmFmNi1jM2EwLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=01B2Ret6p1zOQHzHw6diU5BlgqMf8IOHoNASEsKevUA=)**
Thank you,
Team Durbin
**** ******** ****
********[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58001235/389777414/785331925?refcode=dd_em_230130_1_t1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOWI2MmFmNi1jM2EwLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=01B2Ret6p1zOQHzHw6diU5BlgqMf8IOHoNASEsKevUA=)********

name: Charlie Kirk, Turning Point USA
subject: Putting them on trial
body:
I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time.
| | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z6hgqkj72t9n8npurj0u86q231u6rfalvnkh7tg0_rp22sh2s8i66pr5chi6eo71c1h2bs)
---
Fellow Patriot, I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time. _And now I want to send YOU a copy of the evidence against America's colleges and universities -- my NEW BOOK,_**The College Scam.** [**Will you claim YOUR copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z00nngvpu7ltf65kbq8b58daret5l0c4j3h2570g_rp22sh2s8i66pr5chi6eo71c1h2bs)
---
[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zaa22l3btnjmplckes08dr32shm1e0j0d0nl85o0_rp22sh2s8i66pr5chi6eo71c1h2bs)
---
_I was proud to share my new book,_ The College Scam,_
with President Donald Trump._
---
**I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. _And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives._ **I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_.** Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with _The College Scam_ to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. [**I'd like to send you a copy of my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_ , as a special thank-you for a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA. Will you claim your book right now?**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2ze62bpdgln25i2tm371r50mmb7pap9ovbnv5tgrg_rp22sh2s8i66pr5chi6eo71c1h2bs)
---
[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zli0770fq0l6c7gojl26bds18cpo335do3a9plc8_rp22sh2s8i66pr5chi6eo71c1h2bs)
---
I wrote this book as an ESSENTIAL GUIDE for every patriot concerned about young people and the future of our country. When you read _The College Scam,_ you'll learn:
* my 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge

* the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness

* how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain

**_And I want you to know -- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists_.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... EXTENSIVE RESEARCH into the dirty secrets of higher education (and how the government props it up!) ... and a PROSECUTOR'S INTENSITY to present my case against the College Cartel. [**Can I send you a copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY amount, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z74aemufruddrh1mt3cnfdj0u0gn2n8otl657i80_rp22sh2s8i66pr5chi6eo71c1h2bs) That means you'll get a copy of this exciting new book AND help support Turning Point USA's critical work to EXPOSE the Left’s college scam, DEFEAT the radical Left, and WIN the American Culture War!
---
[Get your copy](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zu8vhf05nfbl9jk31j7j9jcpr2tcmgvcbqfrsa4g_rp22sh2s8i66pr5chi6eo71c1h2bs)
---
The College Cartel has created and spread the WORST and MOST TOXIC beliefs behind the Left's War on American Culture. And no one has exposed the FULL TRUTH of the College Scam -- until now. [**You don't want to miss it! Please claim your copy of _The College Scam_ RIGHT NOW. All I'm asking for is a gift of any amount to Turning Point USA to help cover shipping -- and support our efforts to WIN the American Culture War.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zv55tt0mdn1utefp9tsv54sjcfth2e8kqrbc6v28_rp22sh2s8i66pr5chi6eo71c1h2bs) Thank you for helping me EXPOSE the College Cartel and fight back against their toxic ideologies in the American Culture War!
---
Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA
---
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

We must be able to defend our homeland, our allies, and our military assets around the world from the threat of hypersonic missiles, no matter where they are launched from. Just as President Trump rebuilt our military, President Trump will build a state-of-the-art next-generation missile defense shield to defend America from missile attack.

Under Joe Biden the world has become **vastly more dangerous** , and there is no greater danger than the deadly menace of **nuclear weapons and hypersonic missiles**.

World War Three would be a **catastrophe unlike any other**. The best way to ensure that such a conflict ever happens is to **be prepared with unmatched technology and unrivaled strength**.

President Trump will work with Congress and our great military leaders to **build a state-of-the-art, next generation missile defense shield** , just as Israel is now protected by the Iron Dome.

America must have an impenetrable dome to **protect our people**.

President Trump **rebuilt our military at a level that nobody thought possible** , but we must **take that further step**.

name: Maxwell Frost
subject: A future without gun violence is possible, but only if we work together
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
When I was 16, my life was changed when I learned about the shooting at Sandy Hook Elementary School in Newtown, Connecticut.
#

[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-jan23.1ic_u0&refcode=em230130-1-15&t=1&akid=4178%2E3935704%2EMMDbMl)
---
Hi friend -
My name is Maxwell Frost. This month, I was sworn in to the 118th Congress to represent Florida’s 10th District. I’m the first Gen-Z member of Congress, and I’ve been involved in the gun violence prevention movement for over a decade.
When I was 16, my life was changed when I learned about the shooting at Sandy Hook Elementary School in Newtown, Connecticut.
I was eating with my friends before a high school band concert when I saw the news. The tragedy called me to action, and I attended the vigil in Washington, D.C. where I met some of the loved ones of those who lost their lives.
Seeing their pain, I knew that I could not rest until we see a future free from gun violence. And so I became an organizer in the gun safety movement. Then three years after Sandy Hook, I became a survivor myself.
I was just appointed a vice chair of the Gun Violence Prevention Task Force in Congress—a position I’m honored to hold. We must enact transformative, commonsense legislation to end our country’s gun violence epidemic. That’s why I’ll work hard every day in Congress to make gun safety a reality in our nation.
I’m grateful that organizations like Giffords will be there to help me with this important effort. Giffords is one of the organizations leading the fight to keep our communities safe from gun violence. Like me, Gabby Giffords was inspired to dedicate her life to gun violence prevention a decade ago after the tragedy at Sandy Hook.
The team at Giffords had my back during my election, and now I’m asking if you can step up today and support them before their important January fundraising drive comes to an end tomorrow.
[**Will you make a donation of any amount you can to Giffords PAC? It all adds up to help fuel the work they do to help pass stronger gun laws and support candidates like me who will have the courage to act.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-jan23.1ic_u0&refcode=em230130-1-15&t=2&akid=4178%2E3935704%2EMMDbMl)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://go.giffords.org/go/17016?c0=giffords-em-jan23.C46tVD&refcode=em230130-1-15&t=21&akid=4178%2E3935704%2EMMDbMl)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://go.giffords.org/go/17017?c0=giffords-em-jan23.7iD0Mu&refcode=em230130-1-15&t=22&akid=4178%2E3935704%2EMMDbMl)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://go.giffords.org/go/17010?c0=giffords-em-jan23.5RCsE0&refcode=em230130-1-15&t=23&akid=4178%2E3935704%2EMMDbMl)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://go.giffords.org/go/17011?c0=giffords-em-jan23.CbkSJK&refcode=em230130-1-15&t=24&akid=4178%2E3935704%2EMMDbMl)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://go.giffords.org/go/17012?c0=giffords-em-jan23.bUZFep&refcode=em230130-1-15&t=25&akid=4178%2E3935704%2EMMDbMl)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-jan23.4kE3Tp&refcode=em230130-1-15&t=26&akid=4178%2E3935704%2EMMDbMl)**
---
****
A future without gun violence is possible, but only if we work together. Thank you for joining me in this fight and supporting Giffords.
\- Congressman Maxwell Frost

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=27&akid=4178%2E3935704%2EMMDbMl) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

In case you missed it, **Wes was on MSNBC’s _Morning Joe_ this morning for the first time as Governor of Maryland.** | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58037689/389824673/-1232107597?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOWMxNDY5Yy1lZWEwLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_0d2IlLnjT6OGo1xIbGNXEDBEK36E8UuG3D015pxJ3k=&emci=a8c1469c-eea0-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=b9c1469c-eea0-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=24635485)
---
As the only Black governor in the country right now, Wes responded to the horrific video of Memphis police killing Tyre Nichols, and called for several measures to create better trust between communities and law enforcement.
Wes also talked about President Biden’s visit to Baltimore today to kick off the new rail tunnel project being funded by the infrastructure bill signed into law last year. It’s a historic investment in Maryland’s mass transit that will create 30,000 jobs and increase rail speed and reliability.
**[You can watch the full interview and share here →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58037691/389824675/-1232107597?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOWMxNDY5Yy1lZWEwLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_0d2IlLnjT6OGo1xIbGNXEDBEK36E8UuG3D015pxJ3k=&emci=a8c1469c-eea0-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=b9c1469c-eea0-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=24635485)**
As you can see, week two of the Moore-Miller administration is off to a fast start, with much more to come. Stay tuned here for more to follow shortly!
— Team Moore-Miller

clean_body: | In case you missed it, Wes was on MSNBC’s Morning Joe this morning for the first time as Governor of Maryland. | As the only Black governor in the country right now, Wes responded to the horrific video of Memphis police killing Tyre Nichols, and called for several measures to create better trust between communities and law enforcement. Wes also talked about President Biden’s visit to Baltimore today to kick off the new rail tunnel project being funded by the infrastructure bill signed into law last year. It’s a historic investment in Maryland’s mass transit that will create 30,000 jobs and increase rail speed and reliability. As you can see, week two of the Moore-Miller administration is off to a fast start, with much more to come. Stay tuned here for more to follow shortly! — Team Moore-Miller Use of military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement from the Department of Defense. | By Authority: Wes Moore for Maryland, Mary Tydings, Treasurer Wes Moore for Maryland PO Box 50123 Baltimore, MD 21211 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: A very personal note.

body:
The first night I slept on the floor in the apartment my mother got for us after my father left.

| Fight for Progress is dedicated to building a more progressive America and has raised over $300,000 for Democratic candidates. If you would like to donate to a deserving Democrat, you can do so _[here.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58001560/389778392/838935893?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVmNTJhMmY1LWM1YTAtZWQxMS05OTRjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=j04VLQ1a_XEFWuR_RVy8W-x1c8YAMOgk-A1PYy8GCp0=&emci=5211129c-b4a0-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=5f52a2f5-c5a0-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=22408598#candidate-inner)_ And of course, you can [unsubscribe](https://secure.everyaction.com/p/z4lkEUrOvESaGxr1QVEGJw2?unsubscribedata=JMfZlkuUeurYnlALT1YTPK8yVv3lghz1Xb2d%2BrYhgZEYnE7yb93UOdrlYx4f6lnItBU1t4Wdr0izoKeg0hwPSaOI8fD7WsW%2FY1LQTRqmR9YaFFjv2EwqT5X2CrncVojz%2BFochCtU73ClFCbtaS86X%2Ft6R6BdAiqF3p6L70gX2rNqdlh%2Fg31z972n1lJl%2BSS6xBljgUOIB0qJb5JxwLphdUvY7Eq5IVfKBFlc57yaiSzgXC59f75b24JdAG%2FNOw%2FFlkPY98Hh7yKDIrwyimBN26JDGJeKZb0AJBGPM7Hik%2FSdjQNMmjxm21yySAFCXG0fOlQQ0wLe8zriO8gWQFlLM%2FKOMuC84oqNHTTUnVJ2d6e4vAc1ttwsP9dnT1cqOeVVAskWu20yvmj5F%2BV7CgDa3MTmJvQmgAwIi%2FbqZarphhg%3D) at any time.

| Peter -

I can trace my drive for success to the first night I slept on the floor in the apartment my mother got for us after my father left.

Lying there, I could honestly say that my life sucked and I was not going to stand for that.

Growing up poor, I took advantage of the things Democrats championed and the people of our country provided: Pell Grants and school lunch programs to name just two.

Those helping hands gave me (and people like me) a debt of gratitude I worked to pay back through service — first in the Marines, and now in Congress.

The things I want today are not exotic. I am not looking to own a yacht, the Hope Diamond, or to have billionaires throw money at me. I want loving relationships with family, I want to help my constituents, and I want an America that lives up to its ideals.

As I think about the challenge ahead in this Senate race, what I learned growing up and in the Marines is that I can’t do this alone.

I’m going to need your help, because unless we’re in this together we’re going to get swallowed up fast by Senator Sinema’s big money. So please:

[_**Can you please split a $5 contribution between Fight for Progress and my United States Senate campaign today? I would not ask if this was not so important.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58001561/389778393/880176479?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230130-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVmNTJhMmY1LWM1YTAtZWQxMS05OTRjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=j04VLQ1a_XEFWuR_RVy8W-x1c8YAMOgk-A1PYy8GCp0=)

Ruben

clean_body: The first night I slept on the floor in the apartment my mother got for us after my father left. | Fight for Progress is dedicated to building a more progressive America and has raised over $300,000 for Democratic candidates. If you would like to donate to a deserving Democrat, you can do so And of course, you can at any time. | Peter - I can trace my drive for success to the first night I slept on the floor in the apartment my mother got for us after my father left. Lying there, I could honestly say that my life sucked and I was not going to stand for that. Growing up poor, I took advantage of the things Democrats championed and the people of our country provided: Pell Grants and school lunch programs to name just two. Those helping hands gave me (and people like me) a debt of gratitude I worked to pay back through service — first in the Marines, and now in Congress. The things I want today are not exotic. I am not looking to own a yacht, the Hope Diamond, or to have billionaires throw money at me. I want loving relationships with family, I want to help my constituents, and I want an America that lives up to its ideals. As I think about the challenge ahead in this Senate race, what I learned growing up and in the Marines is that I can’t do this alone. I’m going to need your help, because unless we’re in this together we’re going to get swallowed up fast by Senator Sinema’s big money. So please: = | | | = | = | = | = | = The fourteen-year-old kid with tears in his eyes because he had no bed to sleep in wouldn’t believe these last forty-eight hours. I’m not sure I do yet, either. Thank you, and adiós, Ruben | = * | | = Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee. Building a reelection fund throughout 2023 will be key to fighting the frivolous spending and insane agendas the left has in store for Minnesota. January is almost over, and we've reached our first fundraising deadline. It would be a shame if we couldn't hit our first goal of 2023. Why does this matter? 👉🏻 The twin cities are taking over our rural representation, and we need to ensure we are gearing up to protect Minnesota values. Your contribution will help us identify voters and get our Conservative messages out by investing in new technologies for future get-out-the-vote campaigns. As soon as Brad secured his election victory, he went straight to work in order to deliver on the promises he made to Minnesotans throughout his campaign. Although it's an exciting time, we can't proceed without donor support. Thank you, Aaron E Finstad Campaign Manager | | | | | | | | ---|---|---

name: American Action News
subject: “What happened to my country?”
body:
Our newest online course opens with the question, “What happened to my country?”

| | | This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6cnp1gpm2059i5rabb2qg7bu89pj4occ57ssmk0_rp22sh2s8i66pr5chi69p36c9h2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

Our newest online course opens with the question, "What happened to my country?"

It's a question I've asked myself many times over the last few years as I've read the latest reports on radical gender ideology pushed in our elementary schools, speech squashed by the media and corporate class, basic rights left unprotected in many of our cities, and economic opportunity diminished for millions of Americans.

To understand the source of these radical changes that undermine the rights of American citizens, we've produced the new online course, **" The American Left: From Liberalism to Despotism."**
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znra7cl1r2brtrm83bof9luv8rs2elbbk9b2unag_rp22sh2s8i66pr5chi69p36c9h2bs)
---
In this course, Dr. Kevin Slack, associate professor of politics at Hillsdale College, traces the transformation of the American left over the last 100 years. You'll learn how post-sixties radicals rejected the midcentury liberalism of Franklin Roosevelt; you'll discover the origins of modern gender ideology, identity politics, and today's global elite; and, you'll explore how these movements overtook America's key institutions.

You can watch the trailer for the course and preregister today using the secure link below:

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/american-left-preregister/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkl22f10lv97q7u35tt4gv5ldlhs838nhl68ukf8_rp22sh2s8i66pr5chi69p36c9h2bs)**

I hope you'll join us to better understand--and learn how to confront--the woke ideologies that dominate American politics today.
Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for American Action News, [please use this preferences page](http://e.americanactionnews.com/prefs/9z2z734qjpfv50scbth0vv8914u3n5v9iqu0fp316l0).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Chrissy
subject: Delivering for PA-06 and building a brighter future for all of us
body:
A note from Chrissy

I have asked a lot of my friends in Chester and Berks Counties — from donations, to yard signs, to door knocking, and various other ways of support. I am reminded time and again of our community’s willingness to be there for one another as we continue to build a better future that works for us all. Thank you for being there for me. Being officially sworn in for the 118th Congress, I am thrilled to honor your trust in me and to continue to serve and prioritize your needs and those of your families. And indeed, while we have much work still to do, we have so much to celebrate, so I’d like to update you on what we’ve accomplished recently.

https://www.chrissyhoulahanforcongress.com/

Securing over $10 million for important community improvements.
Last year I advocated for federal funding for 14 important community projects across Chester and Berks Counties; I was gratified to learn in late December that our efforts were successful. Recipients include community service organizations, municipal projects, and first responders. These 14 were selected from a larger pool of applicants by an independent nonpartisan review board — I look forward to advocating for our community this way again in 2023!

Implementing military parental leave program for families and businesses.
As a mother, I know just how vital parental leave options are for families. I had my first child serving active duty in the Air Force, and the wait for child care on base was months long. So it is to my delight that the Pentagon announced it is fully implementing my 12 weeks of paid parental leave for all service members and their spouses! I can’t describe how impactful this policy will be to families across the military. This policy ensures that families won’t have to choose between a paycheck and caring for their newborn child. I am genuinely proud of this effort and those who have supported it, including my friend and former colleague in the House, Defense Under Secretary Gil Cisneros.

Protecting our strategic petroleum reserves from our adversaries.
During one of my town halls last year, I was asked why China is permitted to buy oil from our nation’s Strategic Petroleum Reserves (SPR). Great question! As gas prices were going up and President Biden was releasing oil from the SPR in as effort to bring them down, we learned that a Chinese-affiliated company had purchased oil form the SPR. Oil from the SPR should be used for strategic purposes to the benefit of Americans, not to enrich our adversaries. In response, I worked with colleagues on both sides of the aisle to introduce a bill to prevent this from happening again. A similar bill passed the House earlier this month and I will stay on the issue until the loophole is closed.

Meeting the needs of entrepreneurs and small businesses.
Recently, I toured the Made in Coatesville small business incubator. I met with several small business owners to learn more about their needs and the continued economic development of downtown Coatesville. I’ve said it before, and I’ll repeat it: Small businesses are the backbone of our local economy. As someone who grew businesses, I understand the challenges facing entrepreneurs and how critical support can be as they develop and grow. This small business incubator will provide a helping hand, and I look forward to seeing all it will do for the people of Coatesville and our surrounding communities.

As we kick things into gear and drive full steam ahead, I am excited to see what the future holds for our resilient community. I want to ensure we continue this upward trajectory, foster local economic growth, and build on our continued progress. As always, we invite you to call one of our offices or message us through our contact form. Feel free to pass this update to friends of our community so they can keep in touch too, There is work to be done.

https://houlahan.house.gov/connect/

— Chrissy

The 118th Congress has officially been sworn in, and Chrissy is ready and eager to help working families and businesses in PA-06. Chrissy is committed to delivering for her community, but a divided Congress means that this year has challenges ahead. We must all work together to have any chance of creating a better future that works for everyone.

Today we hope you join Chrissy by donating what you can to help build her momentum going into 2023. We simply can’t do this work without you. Thank you for your support.

https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/houlahan-digital?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk782-fr-text

Chrissy is a former Captain in the United States Air Force. Use of her military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of Defense or Department of the Air Force.
clean_body: A note from Chrissy I have asked a lot of my friends in Chester and Berks Counties — from donations, to yard signs, to door knocking, and various other ways of support. I am reminded time and again of our community’s willingness to be there for one another as we continue to build a better future that works for us all. Thank you for being there for me. Being officially sworn in for the 118th Congress, I am thrilled to honor your trust in me and to continue to serve and prioritize your needs and those of your families. And indeed, while we have much work still to do, we have so much to celebrate, so I’d like to update you on what we’ve accomplished recently. Securing over $10 million for important community improvements. Last year I advocated for federal funding for 14 important community projects across Chester and Berks Counties; I was gratified to learn in late December that our efforts were successful. Recipients include community service organizations, municipal projects, and first responders. These 14 were selected from a larger pool of applicants by an independent nonpartisan review board — I look forward to advocating for our community this way again in 2023! Implementing military parental leave program for families and businesses. As a mother, I know just how vital parental leave options are for families. I had my first child serving active duty in the Air Force, and the wait for child care on base was months long. So it is to my delight that the Pentagon announced it is fully implementing my 12 weeks of paid parental leave for all service members and their spouses! I can’t describe how impactful this policy will be to families across the military. This policy ensures that families won’t have to choose between a paycheck and caring for their newborn child. I am genuinely proud of this effort and those who have supported it, including my friend and former colleague in the House, Defense Under Secretary Gil Cisneros. Protecting our strategic petroleum reserves from our adversaries. During one of my town halls last year, I was asked why China is permitted to buy oil from our nation’s Strategic Petroleum Reserves (SPR). Great question! As gas prices were going up and President Biden was releasing oil from the SPR in as effort to bring them down, we learned that a Chinese-affiliated company had purchased oil form the SPR. Oil from the SPR should be used for strategic purposes to the benefit of Americans, not to enrich our adversaries. In response, I worked with colleagues on both sides of the aisle to introduce a bill to prevent this from happening again. A similar bill passed the House earlier this month and I will stay on the issue until the loophole is closed. Meeting the needs of entrepreneurs and small businesses. Recently, I toured the Made in Coatesville small business incubator. I met with several small business owners to learn more about their needs and the continued economic development of downtown Coatesville. I’ve said it before, and I’ll repeat it: Small businesses are the backbone of our local economy. As someone who grew businesses, I understand the challenges facing entrepreneurs and how critical support can be as they develop and grow. This small business incubator will provide a helping hand, and I look forward to seeing all it will do for the people of Coatesville and our surrounding communities. As we kick things into gear and drive full steam ahead, I am excited to see what the future holds for our resilient community. I want to ensure we continue this upward trajectory, foster local economic growth, and build on our continued progress. As always, we invite you to call one of our offices or message us through our contact form. Feel free to pass this update to friends of our community so they can keep in touch too, There is work to be done. — Chrissy The 118th Congress has officially been sworn in, and Chrissy is ready and eager to help working families and businesses in PA-06. Chrissy is committed to delivering for her community, but a divided Congress means that this year has challenges ahead. We must all work together to have any chance of creating a better future that works for everyone. Today we hope you join Chrissy by donating what you can to help build her momentum going into 2023. We simply can’t do this work without you. Thank you for your support.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Tyler=20B.=20Jones?=
subject: A Women's Bill of Rights Luncheon
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/leadershipacademy-8132784?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
Dear Friend,
Radical ‘woke’ ideologues are trying to redefine womanhood as a subjective state unrelated to biology. This has real implications and needs to be stopped.

**Come to this lunch and listen to Riley Gaines, a 12x All-American swimming champion, and Mandy Gunasekara from the Independent Women's Forum, explain why Mississippi needs a Women’s Bill of Rights.**
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=1ff39c5629&e=5703353baa)
---
_Click on the image above to reserve a ticket_
| **Riley Gaines, US swimming champion** Riley is a recent graduate from the University of Kentucky where she was a 12x All-American swimmer. This past year, Riley competed and tied with transgender swimmer Lia Thomas at their NCAA championships. Since directly experiencing the injustice of allowing men in women's sports, Riley has been outspoken on why this issue is blatantly unfair and harmful to females in so many ways. **Mandy Gunasekara, Independent Women’s Forum** Mandy served as Chief of Staff of the U.S. Environmental Protection Agency, helping set environmental policy priorities for the Trump-Pence Administration. In addition to IWF, she is a visiting fellow at the Heritage Foundation, she has also worked as a Senior Fellow for the Texas Public Policy Foundation, and regularly appears on Fox News. A sixth-generation Mississippian, she and her husband and two children call Oxford, Mississippi, home.
With a Women's Bill of Rights being a hot topic during the 2023 Mississippi Legislative Session, tickets will sell fast. [CLICK HERE](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=b238d5c2e9&e=5703353baa) to book now.

I look forward to seeing you!
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=b9680b3f98&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
All the best,

Tyler B. Jones
Director of Communications and Legislative Affairs

---
|
---

**Our mailing address is:**
Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013
[Add us to your address book](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/vcard?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd)

Want to change how you receive these emails?

name: Deroy Murdock
subject: Watch the new free course now
body:
Our newest online course opens with the question, “What happened to my country?”

| | | This sponsored message from Deroy Murdock is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zc5sif104juh2g12ap1js2up5r9kcdh46q8p2gm0_rp22sh2s8i66pr5chh60pr1c9h2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

Our newest online course opens with the question, "What happened to my country?"

It's a question I've asked myself many times over the last few years as I've read the latest reports on radical gender ideology pushed in our elementary schools, speech squashed by the media and corporate class, basic rights left unprotected in many of our cities, and economic opportunity diminished for millions of Americans.

To understand the source of these radical changes that undermine the rights of American citizens, we've produced the new online course, **" The American Left: From Liberalism to Despotism."**
---
| | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zscg40jblcbe3ip714i67p11tam4dre429cu3ah0_rp22sh2s8i66pr5chh60pr1c9h2bs)
---
In this course, Dr. Kevin Slack, associate professor of politics at Hillsdale College, traces the transformation of the American left over the last 100 years. You'll learn how post-sixties radicals rejected the midcentury liberalism of Franklin Roosevelt; you'll discover the origins of modern gender ideology, identity politics, and today's global elite; and, you'll explore how these movements overtook America's key institutions.

You can watch the trailer for the course and preregister today using the secure link below:

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/american-left-preregister/](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zoniqevd6mms43ic45eeqcml3n4k65ebbv1s6hfo_rp22sh2s8i66pr5chh60pr1c9h2bs)**

I hope you'll join us to better understand--and learn how to confront--the woke ideologies that dominate American politics today.
Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Deroy Murdock, [please use this preferences page](http://e.deroymurdock.com/prefs/9z2zgonnv3s7mb50ale20ccdko27lkkjfm6gtknsbc8).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

body:

name: Adam Schiff
subject: I’m not going to just wait around and see what happens
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| I’m not going to wait around and see what happens with the most dangerous president in the history of our country on the ballot. I’m going to fight.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=1717%2E5257348%2EZ16Rhq)
Derek, last week I announced that I’m running for the U.S. Senate in California in 2024.
Why?
The 117th Congress was the first in over a decade with unified Democratic control and a Democratic president in the White House.
And Senate obstructionists, including some from within our own party, prevented us from taking the necessary steps to end partisan gerrymandering that just handed House control back to Kevin McCarthy and the Republicans.
We could get another chance to fix these problems in two more years. **But I’m not going to wait around and see what happens with the most dangerous president in the history of our country on the ballot. I’m going to _fight._**
I’m running for Senate because we need to push back hard against the Ted Cruzes, the Josh Hawleys, the Lindsey Grahams and all of the Trump enablers who have put our democracy in jeopardy.
And more than that, we need to abolish the filibuster, codify _Roe v. Wade_ , expand the Supreme Court, pass a Constitutional Amendment overturning _Citizens United_ , and protect voting rights if we are to address the deep structural problems within our democracy.
Above all else, we need to make the economy work for all Americans. If our democracy is to survive for the next two hundred years — let alone the next two decades — we have to give everyone the chance to succeed. Not just the wealthy and powerful.
**[And it’s why I hope you’ll join me today by making a $10 contribution to become a Founding Donor of Schiff 2024.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=jan2023_abs_em_launch._tD9LH&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_LAU_GEN_AC_20230130_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=4&akid=1717%2E5257348%2EZ16Rhq)**
[DONATE $10](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=jan2023_abs_em_launch._tD9LH&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_LAU_GEN_AC_20230130_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=5&akid=1717%2E5257348%2EZ16Rhq)
---
Thank you,
— Adam
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=jan2023_abs_em_launch._tD9LH&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_LAU_GEN_AC_20230130_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=6&akid=1717%2E5257348%2EZ16Rhq)
| | [DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1032?c0=jan2023_abs_em_launch.WzdlEl&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_LAU_GEN_AC_20230130_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=7&akid=1717%2E5257348%2EZ16Rhq)
---

name: LCV Membership Team
subject: LCV membership deadline tomorrow -- please renew your membership today.
body:
__Your impact goes three times as far when you renew today. |
---

|
[JANUARY 31 DEADLINE IMMINENT:
Claim your 3X match by renewing your LCV membership for just $5 today >>](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/w_)
Here's the situation: In a vote of 221 to 205, Republicans in the House have just passed legislation that forces oil and gas drilling on federal lands.

We're campaigning to block this awful legislation from becoming law, but there is a real chance that moderate Senators could take up the House's bill. We need as many LCV members as possible to join our campaign to protect public lands and the clean energy transition.****_****_

The truth is that we aren't where we need to be, Peter. We really need to close the gap before our Membership Drive ends tomorrow. So we're asking: [Renew your LCV membership for just $5 today. For a limited time, every gift makes 3X the impact >>](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/w_)

| | **
** **_DEADLINE APPROACHING:_
League of Conservation Voters
2023 Membership Drive **

Supporter Record: Peter Willis
Match Status: [_TRIPLE MATCH ACTIVE_](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/04wrMW_DzkT-)

Deadline: January 31, 2023
Fundraising Goal: $35,000

**Member Status:**[EXPIRED -- renew your membership today -- it only costs $5 right now](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/04wrMW_DzkT-)**** |
---|---|---

LCV is doing all we can to oppose Republicans' dirty energy agenda and win new environmental reforms. We're launching new campaigns, driving letters into Congress and key agencies, and pressuring pro-environmental legislators to hold the line.__

It's LCV's members that make this work possible, Peter. To go toe-to-toe against corporate polluters _and win_ , our entire movement needs to stand together and make our voices heard.****

The best thing you can do right now to help is to [renew your LCV membership for just $5 today -- it'll go 3X as far to directly to fund this campaign, but this offer ends soon >>](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/w_)

As always, thank you for your tireless support. None of our work would be possible without you.

LCV Membership Team
Alex, Annie, and Norita

---
**[**RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP**](https://links.messages.lcv.)**

subject: become a founding member

While the new House Republican majority focuses on the wrong priorities and picking partisan fights, I am working with Republicans, Independents, and Democrats to find common ground on important issues like fighting inflation, bringing back manufacturing, and economically competing with China.

In the last Congress, we passed historic _bipartisan_ legislation to reduce prescription drug costs, deliver for our veterans, invest in our infrastructure, and so much more. In this new Congress, I’ll keep striving to work with members on both sides to get things done.

**[Your support is critical to my work (and Democrats' ability to take back the House in 2024), so please chip in $15 or any amount today to become a founding member of Team Kildee 2023.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58039897/389831800/-630289467?amount=15&contactdata=551WEHS4OZ0vGwZJgN1gNDCEW0xN7MKKJ2zANCE%2Bqz32VNhHPzanLJF95Gl%2FZj8Cc7vRIffLXVVazJb%2B3XLSIc%2FF2%2FME4C2SMoGJlDz2pOhUAROyP%2BGvMLB9rd61wwKcDxcN1DrU5cjOGtlTNgq%2BvA%3D%3D&refcode2=21094821-f7a0-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&source=EM_NBI_DK_20230130_FR_1.1_0_3MO_candidate_NA_NA_eom_membership&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTA5NDgyMS1mN2EwLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QIejYedhNxedEVw1fdUXfk6cxaDs52TssmdFeSNHBI0=)**

Last November, we saw what Michigan Democrats can do when they invest early and run smart campaigns. Help us start this cycle strong and keep the blue wave going into 2024!

Thank you so much for your support,
Dan

* * *
Congressman Dan Kildee – a Flint native – is proud to represent mid-Michigan. As a Democratic party leader, Dan is fighting hard to ensure every American has access to quality health care, clean water and a good-paying job. The path to take back the Democratic majority in the House runs right through the Midwest, and Dan is dedicated to protecting and electing Democratic candidates. But we can’t do it without you! name: Team IDCCA
subject: Our kids come first
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Illinois Democratic County Chairs' Association
body:
Illinois extremists are campaigning on hate, lies, and ignorance.

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/_O9lH2tJyf4_RqHhi10aIaMh8wTfZ81M0RsZIn_f1CI=/_jfjjMM69cKqx-xK84q-FpYkHNlv8ugQ01szmW1DY50=?refcode=EM_FR_230130EOM2_TEAM_90DO_4_NG_A_Logo)
Fellow Democrats -- we're down to less than 48 hours until our first major fundraising deadline of the year, and we're not where we need to be.

With help from top IL Republicans like Darren Bailey, far-right extremists are trying to scheme their way into our upcoming local elections across the state to spread hatred, lies, and ignorance, particularly in our schools.

But these races aren't getting the attention they deserve. Frankly, far too many people are not aware of the radical agenda being pushed in their own schools.

We're working around the clock to change that, but it takes resources to effectively spread the word.

**[Our children are our future, and we cannot stand by and idly watch this. We must stop these extremists and their agendas. name: Team Jayapal
subject: Committed to bold progressive leadership
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Here's what we stand for:
#
Peter,
_**Did you know that Pramila is leading the largest Progressive Caucus ever?**_
Throughout Donald Trump's presidency, a global pandemic, and negotiations for historic legislation, Pramila has been a fearless advocate for change. Now the Progressive Caucus is **the biggest Democratic caucus** in the House of Representatives.
In just 6 years, Pramila has championed Medicare for All, affordable housing, immigration reform, reproductive and voting rights, bold climate action, and more — leading our progressive coalition and blazing the trail forward for the Democratic Party.
During the midterm elections, Pramila was _**key**_ in helping to elect ten bold, new progressives to Congress and building the largest progressive delegation ever to exist in the House of Representatives.
Now that Republicans have a small minority in the House, we must do everything in our power to fight for the progressive future we deserve. [**Will you pitch in $3 or any amount today so Pramila can continue to push our progressive vision forward?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/27633?refcode=em20230130-2093&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=2093%2E420207%2Ez-TBTn)
**[Chip in »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/27633?refcode=em20230130-2093&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=2093%2E420207%2Ez-TBTn)**
Under Pramila's leadership, progressives have been hard at work delivering results for working people across the country. In the past two years, we:
* Passed the Inflation Reduction Act, which capped the price of insulin at $35 per month and made the largest climate action in history.
* Passed a comprehensive infrastructure bill to invest in communities that have been left behind and create good-paying union jobs to grow our economy.
* Led the effort to protect marriage equality by enacting the Respect for Marriage Act.

Meanwhile, Republicans continue to show us how out of touch they are with the American people by proposing national abortion bans, glorifying more tax cuts for the wealthy, and continuing to undermine our democracy.
We had major wins last term, but now we have to fight to defend them. Pramila won't turn her back on our people — but she can't do it all of this work on her own.
Our community is empowered by the strength and support of our grassroots base. [**If you're able to, can you make a $3 contribution to support Pramila's work and expand our progressive coalition?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/27633?refcode=em20230130-2093&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=2093%2E420207%2Ez-TBTn)
**[Contribute $3 »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/27633?refcode=em20230130-2093&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=2093%2E420207%2Ez-TBTn)**
In solidarity,
— Team Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20230130-2093-footer&t=23&refcode2=2093_420207_z-TBTn&akid=2093%2E420207%2Ez-TBTn)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=24&akid=2093%2E420207%2Ez-TBTn)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=2093%2E420207%2Ez-TBTn)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

As Democrats and progressives, we know that there is so much that we need our leaders in Congress to act on:
Making health care, housing, and child care universal and affordable for all of Vermont’s families, paying our workers dignified wages, reining in corporate greed, stopping the rise of fascism and hate, tackling the climate crisis, and so much more.
**But instead, Republicans have hijacked Washington’s legislative agenda, turning it into a place to fight divisive culture wars, attack our earned benefits, and undermine the ways that we can hold our government and elected officials accountable to the people. **
**If this is a sign of what’s ahead, then I need you to stand with me as we push for progress.[Take a moment to watch this video message to my supporters, and then pitch in $5 or more to help us hit our end-of-month goal before tomorrow’s deadline.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58040022/389832329/-558779617?refcode=E20157-20230130-DeadlineVideo-SL-DeadlineEOM-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YWEzZmYxYS1mOGEwLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DBvHx66FID-5pYyLPPlCxJs6PGPyRQy8vQtxdbcj4fA=)**

**Becca believes the best thoughts are not always from the loudest voices in the room.** As President Pro Tem of the Vermont State Senate, she's led the charge to invest in affordable housing, fight climate change, enshrine reproductive freedom into our state's constitution, and so much more. Now, she's making history as the first woman and openly LGBTQ person to ever serve Vermont in Congress. clean_body: Take a second to watch this video message to my supporters | | Hey Peter: Becca here. My first month in Congress has been exciting – but also extremely alarming. Republicans are already trying to use their House majority to restrict abortion rights, reduce oversight into political corruption, and gut Social Security and Medicare. = I recorded a quick message to my supporters speaking to everything that’s at stake – and why your small-dollar contributions are mission-critical in keeping up the fight to protect our priorities in Congress. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = As Democrats and progressives, we know that there is so much that we need our leaders in Congress to act on: Making health care, housing, and child care universal and affordable for all of Vermont’s families, paying our workers dignified wages, reining in corporate greed, stopping the rise of fascism and hate, tackling the climate crisis, and so much more. But instead, Republicans have hijacked Washington’s legislative agenda, turning it into a place to fight divisive culture wars, attack our earned benefits, and undermine the ways that we can hold our government and elected officials accountable to the people. If this is a sign of what’s ahead, then I need you to stand with me as we push for progress.= = Thank you for standing with me, Becca Balint Becca believes the best thoughts are not always from the loudest voices in the room. As President Pro Tem of the Vermont State Senate, she's led the charge to invest in affordable housing, fight climate change, enshrine reproductive freedom into our state's constitution, and so much more. name: Gabe Vasquez
subject: What I’ve been up to
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GABE VASQUEZ FOR CONGRESS
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58004570/389786935/1850399781?refcode=fl_email_fr_20230130eom3_gv_od30ds_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMzJiNmFmOC1jZWEwLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6rNFthRYjDXLVn3HCS5ilY8TAs0L-TmHe7X6IGtfjyo=)
---
Hi friends, My first month in Congress is already coming to a close. January began with a major delay when far-right Republicans stalled our swearing-in with a five-day long battle for Speaker of the House. It was a complete waste of taxpayer dollars and something our country hasn’t witnessed in more than 100 years. That’s why I introduced the McCARTHY Act, my first bill to prevent members of Congress from being paid until a speaker is elected in the future. With far-right Republicans in power, I’ve already cast votes to defend New Mexicans’ rights and well-being, voting against a rules package that attacks reproductive rights, Social Security and Medicare, and working families. I also made my first visit back to the 2nd District, meeting with small businesses and entrepreneurs, veterans, and other constituents. It was a pleasure to meet with New Mexicans across the district and hear from them first-hand. Now, I’m back in Washington working every day to make progress for the people of NM-02 and the country. I just learned last week that I’ve been assigned to the House Armed Services Committee and the House Committee on Agriculture, and I’m looking forward to focusing on these two issues important to our district. While I continue to work for you, I hope you can help me with something. **Tomorrow is our campaign’s first fundraising deadline of 2023, and my team tells me we’re still $5,273 short of reaching our goal for the month.** **[I’m humbly asking: will you make a grassroots contribution of $10 or whatever you can afford today to help us hit our goal and refuel our people-powered movement?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58004578/389786936/1850399781?refcode=fl_email_fr_20230130eom3_gv_od30ds_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMzJiNmFmOC1jZWEwLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6rNFthRYjDXLVn3HCS5ilY8TAs0L-TmHe7X6IGtfjyo=)** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

clean_body: | = Hi friends, My first month in Congress is already coming to a close. January began with a major delay when far-right Republicans stalled our swearing-in with a five-day long battle for Speaker of the House. It was a complete waste of taxpayer dollars and something our country hasn’t witnessed in more than 100 years. That’s why I introduced the McCARTHY Act, my first bill to prevent members of Congress from being paid until a speaker is elected in the future. With far-right Republicans in power, I’ve already cast votes to defend New Mexicans’ rights and well-being, voting against a rules package that attacks reproductive rights, Social Security and Medicare, and working families. I also made my first visit back to the 2nd District, meeting with small businesses and entrepreneurs, veterans, and other constituents. It was a pleasure to meet with New Mexicans across the district and hear from them first-hand. Now, I’m back in Washington working every day to make progress for the people of NM-02 and the country. I just learned last week that I’ve been assigned to the House Armed Services Committee and the House Committee on Agriculture, and I’m looking forward to focusing on these two issues important to our district. While I continue to work for you, I hope you can help me with something. Tomorrow is our campaign’s first fundraising deadline of 2023, and my team tells me we’re still $5,273 short of reaching our goal for the month. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = I can’t thank you enough for your support. — Gabe | Gabe Vasquez is a first-generation American, former City Councilor, and conservation champion who flipped New Mexico’s 2nd Congressional District from red to blue in 2022 with the help of this people-powered movement. Now, he's taking his experience in office and passion for economic opportunities, the environment, and immigrant and civil rights to Congress to fight for the people of New Mexico. | = | PAID FOR BY GABE VASQUEZ FOR CONGRESS Gabe Vasquez for Congress Drawer L Mesilla, NM 88046 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

The Democratic trifecta has arrived, and we’re getting to work right out of the gate. Last week, during my State of the State Address, I proposed some big plans for Michigan’s future that would make our state a better place for our families and small businesses.

But here’s the truth, we can’t get these proposals and so much more done if we don’t hold on to and expand our slim majorities in the State House and Senate. **That’s why I’m launching Building Bridges PAC – an organization aimed at electing strong Democratic leaders up and down the ballot here in Michigan.**

**[Today, I’m asking you to become a founding donor by pitching in $5 or whatever you can to help us get it done. Your support will ensure that Michigan stays on the path towards ** Michiganders spoke with a clear voice in November. We want the ability to raise a family without breaking the bank. Strong protections for our fundamental rights to vote and control our own bodies. Leaders who will work across the aisle to solve problems and deliver on the issues that make a real difference in our lives.

That’s why we elected Democrats up and down the ticket in November, and that’s why I’m focusing on continuing to build off our momentum and progress.

Michiganders are ready to roll up their sleeves to get things done – I pledge that’s how I’ll spend the next four years, and with your support, we can make big things happen for our state.

**[So, can I count on you to join me in this critical mission by contributing $5 or more today? We need strong leaders up and down the ballot, and I’m ready to help them win with your support.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58040274/389832973/-1067816794?refcode=EM_FR_230130BB1_N_GW_90DA_7_NG_N_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzcvMS85MDA5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjODljM2Y4ZC1mOWEwLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TGSoNWho1QPE0wxd0LHO3eESulkCLE-dyq0kGn6Q018=)**

Thank you,

Gretchen Whitmer

body:

Hello, It's been _**one year**_ since Vladimir Putin gave the order to invade Ukraine. In the last year, we've seen the devastation, sorrow, and death that war brings. Now, Many Americans are asking themselves what is to be done, and what our role is in this ongoing conflict. We turn to you with an important question... [_**Do you think President Biden should be doing more to help defeat Russia and assist Ukraine?**_](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=96b171ff8fa34eb89314b2433106dae3&_m=6b828383063c49eabe383ea51e02fe58&_e=YaRYOWLg_2R6WDhDZjPYqyfcACkX-moIxGeKg_-a74ryYk8Ku2oQNep1NsOZOhr4h6pkwjvuV1PFLyJnyzpHnynTYyCiGtJVGHaeGMEvr2e-Srde6IhEPVSq7Rj64Tx6b5yd9AkgT_hp4_MS4KeLg1kEUFSPupg8wtws0whGoGFfEdzT_6jdFEK52kgGPiLaC9rEYzMQVE5XLIguvosFrsjOylCrKb2CByBmWpGVx4nH28wK31SvTDezdt7iWp0SLnjfma74e15Gr7mwZpsl0g%3D%3D)
