name: =?utf-8?Q?Illinois=20Review?=
subject: BREAKING: DeVore Intervenes in Rep. Caulkins' Suit Against Pritzker's Gun Ban
body:
This morning, former Republican AG candidate Thomas DeVore filed a motion to represent plaintiffs in Rep. Caulkins' suit against Gov. JB Pritzker.

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/1d8dc751e35f/breaking-devore-intervenes-in-rep-caulkins-suit-against-pritzkers-gun-ban?e=1cb5fdae9e)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=2e82acd586-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_30_06_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2e82acd586-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

BREAKING: DeVore Representing Plaintiffs Solicited to Join State Rep. Dan Caulkins' Lawsuit Challenging Pritzker's Assault Weapons Ban (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/breaking-devore-representing-plaintiffs-solicited-to-join-state-rep-dan-caulkins-lawsuit-challenging-pritzkers-assault-weapons-ban.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=2e82acd586-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_30_06_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2e82acd586-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

On Monday, attorney Tom DeVore filed in Macon County, an appearance to represent plaintiffs who joined an assault weapons ban lawsuit filed by Illinois Republican State Rep. Dan Caulkins, Decatur.

============================================================
** (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/breaking-devore-representing-plaintiffs-solicited-to-join-state-rep-dan-caulkins-lawsuit-challenging-pritzkers-assault-weapons-ban.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=2e82acd586-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_30_06_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2e82acd586-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
On January 26th, Caulkins ** filed (https://www.decaturtribune.com/2023/01/27/state-representative-dan-caulkins-files-lawsuit-to-defend-second-amendment-rights/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=2e82acd586-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_30_06_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2e82acd586-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
a nearly identical lawsuit to the one filed by ** DeVore (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/breaking-former-il-ag-candidate-tom-devore-files-lawsuit-against-pritzkers-assault-weapons-ban-seeks-immediate-restraining-order.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=2e82acd586-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_30_06_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2e82acd586-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
on January 17th challenging the constitutionality of the assault weapons ban, and named Gov. JB Pritzker, D, Attorney General Kwame Raoul, D, and Senate President Dan Harmon, D, as defendants.

On January 20th, Effingham County Judge Joshua Morrison
** granted (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/breaking-judge-rules-in-favor-of-former-ag-candidate-tom-devore-and-over-860-plaintiffs-halts-pritzkers-assault-weapons-ban.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=2e82acd586-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_30_06_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2e82acd586-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
DeVore’s motion and halted Pritzker’s assault weapons ban effective immediately while the lawsuit proceeds. The suit represents 860 plaintiffs across the state.

DeVore is representing a group of plaintiffs in the Caulkins lawsuit who believed their financial donations required to join the suit were going to cover attorney fees, but instead were deposited into Caulkins’ political campaign account.

Defenders of Caulkins say that he planned to pay for the legal fees associated with the lawsuit from his campaign account.

Plaintiffs also allege that not everyone was added to the lawsuit, and instead were included as members of a pro-gun organization called Law-Abiding Gun Owners of Macon County – an association that none of them had heard of before, or agreed to join. In other words, plaintiffs were led to believe that they would be named as individual plaintiffs in the lawsuit, and not lumped together under an umbrella organization that they were unfamiliar with.

A copy of DeVore’s Petition to Intervene can be accessed
** here (https://devorelawoffices.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/01/01.30.22-PR_Presser_State_Rep_Caulkins_Documents.pdf?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=2e82acd586-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_30_06_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2e82acd586-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
.

Please continue to follow Illinois Review and
** DeVore Law Offices (https://devorelawoffices.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=2e82acd586-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_30_06_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2e82acd586-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
for more updates as they become available.

** (https://youtu.be/SC6wMmA0YNY?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=2e82acd586-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_30_06_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2e82acd586-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

Ryan Cunningham, former campaign manager of Republican AG candidate Thomas DeVore, joined Mark Vargas on "Mark My Words with Mark Vargas" on AM 560 The Answer, where he describes his ongoing daily fight to get healthy, and what the outrageous comments from Chicago GOP Chairman Stephen Boulton mean to him.

** Schimpf: Re-Electing Ronna McDaniel Was a Mistake (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/schimpf-re-electing-ronna-mcdaniel-was-a-mistake.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=2e82acd586-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_30_06_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2e82acd586-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

On Friday, January 27th, the Republican National Committee (RNC) re-elected Ronna McDaniel as its leader for a record fourth term. The vote, 111-51-4, was not particularly close and I am told that all of the Illinois delegates on the RNC voted in favor of McDaniel.
** (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/schimpf-re-electing-ronna-mcdaniel-was-a-mistake.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=2e82acd586-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_30_06_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2e82acd586-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
The Chairman of the Illinois Republican Party, Don Tracy, provided the rationale for his vote in favor of McDaniel in an email on Saturday morning. I am grateful to Chairman Tracy for providing this explanation of his vote, as it is a welcome bit of transparency from our Chairman and he should be commended for providing it.

But that doesn’t change the fact that he voted the wrong way.

In the explanation for his vote, Chairman Tracy spends most of his time talking about qualifications and accomplishments of Ms. McDaniel and that is precisely what is wrong with his argument—this decision shouldn’t have been about her.

The Republican Party she purports to serve and the United States of America that the Republican Party looks to improve are both bigger and more important than any one individual.

No one is irreplaceable.

Irrespective of her talent, Ronna McDaniel as the titular head of the Republican Party has now presided over three straight election defeats. She cannot unify our party and her re-election sends the message that the national Republican Party is not sufficiently committed to winning.

Frankly, she should have resigned her position immediately after the disappointing election results this past November.

The fact that Ms. McDaniel is keeping her job reflects the reality that while the 2022 election was a punch to the gut for Republican voters, it was a financial bonanza for Republican political operatives and consultants both nationally and in Illinois.

The RNC owns a portion of that failure.

Regardless of the “infrastructure” efforts cited by Chairman Tracy, the RNC failed to adequately prepare for the new vote by mail rules. More importantly, the RNC failed to put forth a vision or message of what it meant to be a Republican in 2022 or now.

Just as in war, where you cannot win every battle, we will not win every election. But long-term success requires that after a loss, we must be brutally honest about why we lost, hold ourselves accountable, and resolve not to repeat the same mistakes.

Republicans cannot win in Illinois or elsewhere unless they are unified. The re-election of Ronna McDaniel makes that unity all the more elusive.

The average American feels real consequences from the 2020 and 2022 losses. They should at least know that their Republican leaders recognize their pain and are not engaging in business as usual.

Regardless of how frustrated we are with the current state of the Republican Party, we can’t give up. Secretary of Defense Don Rumsfeld famously said, “you go to war with the Army you have, not the Army that you might want or wish to have at a later time.”

Our Republican Party, no matter how flawed or imperfect, is the only thing standing between progressives and their vision for an unrecognizable, socialist country. We must stay committed to a better Republican Party that can win elections by being united and standing for individual freedom.

That commitment starts with learning from defeat and holding accountable those who led us to it.

The RNC should have changed course.

Paul Schimpf is a former Marine Corps infantry officer and prosecutor. He was the Republican candidate for Illinois Attorney General in 2014, a Republican State Senator from 2016-2020, and a Republican candidate for Illinois Governor in 2022.

** (https://youtu.be/uSUe3ZWh-Nw?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=2e82acd586-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_30_06_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2e82acd586-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

8th Ward Republican Committeewoman Lynn Franco joined Mark Vargas on "Mark My Words with Mark Vargas" on AM 560 The Answer, where she describes her source of strength in the face of fierce opposition from Chicago GOP Chairman Stephen Boulton.

** IL GOP Chair Don Tracy Votes for RNC Chair Ronna Romney, Says She's Done an "Excellent Job" Despite Losses in 2018, 2020 and 2022 (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/il-gop-chair-don-tracy-votes-for-rnc-chair-ronna-romney-says-shes-done-an-excellent-job-despite-losses-in-2018-2020-and-2022.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=2e82acd586-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_30_06_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2e82acd586-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

Back in 2017, when Republican National Committee chairman Reince Priebus handed over the reins to newly elected chairwoman Ronna Romney-McDaniel, he ** said (https://www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news/former-michigan-gop-chair-ronna-romney-mcdaniel-elected-lead-rnc-n709011?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=2e82acd586-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_30_06_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2e82acd586-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
,

“We’ve got record levels of red all over the country.”

And he was right.

As
** NBC News (https://www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news/former-michigan-gop-chair-ronna-romney-mcdaniel-elected-lead-rnc-n709011?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=2e82acd586-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_30_06_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2e82acd586-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
reported after the 2016 presidential election of Donald Trump, Republicans controlled “both the House and the Senate, as well as both chambers in 32 state legislatures. In 25 of those states, Republicans held both statehouse chambers and the governorship.”

By contrast, the Democrats held a “trifecta in only five” states.

But under the leadership of Ronna Romney-McDaniel, the niece of Never Trumper and Utah Sen. Mitt Romney, Democrats have dominated at the national level – reversing the winning streak under Priebus’ leadership.
** (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/il-gop-chair-don-tracy-votes-for-rnc-chair-ronna-romney-says-shes-done-an-excellent-job-despite-losses-in-2018-2020-and-2022.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=2e82acd586-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_30_06_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2e82acd586-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

As conservative attorney and Townhall columnist Kurt Schlichter wrote in a recent ** column (https://townhall.com/columnists/kurtschlichter/2023/01/23/the-case-for-another-term-for-win-free-ronna-mcdaniel-n2618587?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=2e82acd586-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_30_06_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2e82acd586-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
,

“Five rounds of elections – three cycles and two Georgia primaries – and not a win among them.”

During the 2018 midterm elections, Democrats flipped control of the US House of Representatives away from the Republicans – handing the Speakership back to Rep. Nancy Pelosi for the
** second (https://www.cnn.com/2018/11/28/politics/nancy-pelosi-house-democrat-leadership-elections-speakers-race/index.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=2e82acd586-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_30_06_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2e82acd586-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
time.

The losses even prompted Romney-McDaniel to admit that the party would do a “
** deep data dive (https://www.politico.com/story/2018/12/11/gop-deep-data-dive-2018-losses-1057605?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=2e82acd586-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_30_06_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2e82acd586-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
” of the 2018 midterm election and get to the bottom of why Republicans suffered so many defeats across the country.

In 2020, Romney-McDaniel oversaw election efforts where Republicans witnessed
** widespread voter fraud (https://2000mules.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=2e82acd586-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_30_06_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2e82acd586-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
in key battleground states across the country; Democrats regained control of the US Senate where liberal Democratic Sen. Chuck Schumer was elected ** Senate Majority Leader (https://thehill.com/homenews/senate/524322-schumer-becomes-new-senate-majority-leader/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=2e82acd586-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_30_06_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2e82acd586-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
; ** Speaker Pelosi (https://www.politico.com/news/2021/01/03/pelosi-speaker-election-454076?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=2e82acd586-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_30_06_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2e82acd586-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
maintained her grip on power in the House; and an incoherent man with obvious health issues and numerous moments of ** confusion (https://www.cnn.com/videos/politics/2020/03/04/joe-biden-speech-wife-sister-super-tuesday-2020-vpx.cnn?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=2e82acd586-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_30_06_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2e82acd586-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
was elected president – despite rarely leaving his ** basement (https://www.pbs.org/newshour/politics/biden-makes-1st-in-person-appearance-in-more-than-2-months?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=2e82acd586-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_30_06_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2e82acd586-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
to campaign.

In 2022, after overseeing another disappointing midterm election cycle, Romney-McDaniel launched a new
** advisory council (https://www.politico.com/news/2022/11/29/rnc-tactics-disappointing-midterm-results-00071065?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=2e82acd586-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_30_06_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2e82acd586-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
that would review RNC political strategy to avoid more losses and be better prepared in 2024, saying in a ** statement (https://www.politico.com/news/2022/11/29/rnc-tactics-disappointing-midterm-results-00071065?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=2e82acd586-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_30_06_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2e82acd586-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
,

“As we assess the midterms and plan for 2024, we are gathering a diverse range of respected leaders in our movement to join together and help chart a winning course in the years to come.”

And while Romney-McDaniel has overseen
** massive (https://www.opensecrets.org/news/2021/05/dnc-rnc-breaking-records-2022/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=2e82acd586-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_30_06_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2e82acd586-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
fundraising efforts, all money in the world still can’t buy her an election victory. And that’s a problem.

It’s no wonder Romney-McDaniel was seeking re-election as RNC chair, her salary has nearly doubled since she was elected in 2017.

In 2017, according to
** Federal Election Commission (https://www.fec.gov/data/disbursements/?data_type=processed&committee_id=C00003418&recipient_name=MCDANIEL%2C+RONNA+R&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=2e82acd586-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_30_06_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2e82acd586-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
reports, her salary was $122,582.

In 2020, the year Joe Biden took office and the Democrats regained control of the US Senate, Romney-McDaniel’s salary was
** $410,640 (https://justthenews.com/politics-policy/elections/rncs-inflation-problem-mcdaniels-salary-more-doubled-chair-higher-prior?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=2e82acd586-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_30_06_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2e82acd586-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
.

By contrast, former RNC chair Reince Priebus was paid a salary of $152,874 during his first year as chair in 2011; and $257,782 in his final year in 2016.

Romney-McDaniel has also come under fire for a report that showed the RNC
** spending millions (https://redstate.com/jenvanlaar/2022/12/14/exclusive-analysis-of-rnc-spending-since-2017-shows-millions-were-spent-on-private-jets-limousines-luxury-retreats-broadway-shows-and-more-n673852?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=2e82acd586-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_30_06_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2e82acd586-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
of dollars on private jets, limousines, luxury retreats and Broadway shows since her election as RNC chair in 2017.

Financial records also showed $100,000 for hair and makeup, and dry cleaning services – for Romney-McDaniel’s media appearances.

It’s no wonder Romney-McDaniel doesn’t want to leave – the RNC credit card has become her own personal piggy bank; she flies on private jets; and she stays at only the most luxurious of hotels when traveling and she’s the highest paid RNC chair in history, despite a record of losses.

So it is no surprise that embattled Illinois GOP chairman Don Tracy voted for Romney-McDaniel for a historic fourth term as RNC chair – marking her tenure as the longest serving RNC leader since the 19th century – and a record of losses under her belt. They both want to be rewarded for overseeing widespread losses.

Alongside Tracy, national committeeman Richard Porter and national committeewoman Demtra DeMonte also voted for Romney-McDaniel.

In his weekly Chairman’s Memo, Tracy explained on Saturday why he voted for Romney-McDaniel, writing,

“I call Ronna an infrastructure leader because that is what the RNC is, a political infrastructure support system. By next week, I will have served as Illinois State Chairman for two years. During that time, I have had an inside view of the great work Ronna has done on national Republican infrastructure and how much it has improved under her watch.”

Tracy then heaped praise on Romney-McDaniel for her leadership as the Michigan GOP chair for helping to elect Trump in 2016, even though Trump narrowly defeated Hillary Clinton by only 10,000
** votes (https://www.nytimes.com/elections/2016/results/michigan?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=2e82acd586-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_30_06_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2e82acd586-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
in Michigan.

“Her creative and determined leadership of the Michigan party is a reason Donald Trump won in 2016, and she has set records for fundraising and support of state parties as RNC chairman.”

Tracy then concluded,

“The bottom line is that Ronna McDaniel has done an excellent job in every element of what an RNC Chairman is supposed to do in an environment that has been uniquely challenging. She’s a proven grass-roots leader with a solid plan for the next two years.”

Like Romney-McDaniel, Tracy’s record in Illinois resembles his race in 2002 when he ran as a
** Democrat (https://www.elections.il.gov/ElectionOperations/CandidateDetailEO.aspx?CandidateID=R%2fbzwrvri7J3D7vdz10qXA%3d%3d&ElectionID=pq0YmF3ui0Y%3d&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=2e82acd586-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_30_06_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2e82acd586-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
and lost.

As the
** Chicago Tribune (https://www.chicagotribune.com/opinion/editorials/ct-editorial-illinois-republican-drubbing-midterm-elections-trump-20221111-zo4qahohojcydftvpwrhkmlkme-story.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=2e82acd586-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_30_06_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2e82acd586-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
Editorial Board pointed out in a Nov. 11 editorial,

“Republicans lost every state constitutional office – governor, attorney general, secretary of state, comptroller and treasurer – and 14 of 17 congressional seats. In the General Assembly, not only did the GOP fail to gain any ground on Democrats’ supermajority, Democrats notched a record number of seats in the Illinois House. And in the Illinois Supreme Court, where Republicans had an opportunity to gain two seats...they came up short. Democrats now have a comfortable 5-2 edge in the state’s high court.”

Last Monday, Tracy joined
** Bishop on Air (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/don-tracy-says-il-gop-will-re-evaluate-neutrality-in-primary-after-blaming-bailey-for-midterm-election-losses.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=2e82acd586-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_30_06_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2e82acd586-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
on WMAY radio on Monday and blamed former Illinois State Senator and Republican nominee for governor Darren Bailey for midterm election losses, and said the IL GOP needs to re-evaluate their primary election neutrality policy moving forward.

“And a lot of these great candidates we had this past time put their heart and soul and their family treasure into these races only to be impacted by the top of the ticket, something they have no control over...So I think we almost have a fiduciary duty to look at our primary and determine whether neutrality is the best policy.”

Shocking and a slap in the face to the over
** 1.7 million (https://elections.il.gov/electionoperations/ElectionVoteTotals.aspx?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=2e82acd586-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_30_06_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2e82acd586-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
Illinoisans who voted for Bailey in the general election.

During the primary election, Bailey defeated the IL GOP’s preferred candidate, Richard Irvin by a shocking
** 43 points (https://www.nbcchicago.com/news/local/chicago-politics/illinois-primary-election-results-republican-darren-bailey-to-face-jb-pritzker-in-race-for-illinois-governor-in-november/2869100/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=2e82acd586-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_30_06_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2e82acd586-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
.

Tracy also reiterated during the interview that the IL GOP remained
** neutral (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/il-gop-attacks-illinois-review-over-postage-discount-says-gop-strictly-neutral-during-governor-primary.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=2e82acd586-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_30_06_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2e82acd586-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
during the governor primary, despite a pile of evidence that suggests otherwise.

And just a few days ago, Illinois Review reported that Chicago GOP chair Stephen Boulton – a close ally and advisor to Tracy, in a thread of Facebook comments a year ago, dissed the
** unvaccinated (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/chicago-gop-chair-disses-the-unvaccinated-says-they-should-pay-for-own-covid-hospitalization-costs-considers-saving-a-life-wasteful-spending.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=2e82acd586-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_30_06_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2e82acd586-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
, said they should pay for their own hospital costs out-of-pocket, and considered saving the life of an unvaccinated person in a hospital, was “wasteful” spending.
** (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/il-gop-chair-don-tracy-votes-for-rnc-chair-ronna-romney-says-shes-done-an-excellent-job-despite-losses-in-2018-2020-and-2022.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=2e82acd586-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_30_06_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2e82acd586-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
Illinois Review then followed up with another article, highlighting Boulton’s ** history (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/chicago-gop-chair-stephen-boulton-has-a-history-of-attacking-women-conservatives-on-social-media-using-personal-and-official-gop-accounts.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=2e82acd586-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_30_06_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2e82acd586-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
of attacking women and conservatives online – misogynist behavior unbecoming of man, let alone the leader of the Chicago Republican Party.

And on Friday, Illinois Review followed up with another article of Boulton attacking a respected African American woman and 8th Ward Republican Committeeman
** Lynn Franco (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/stephen-boulton-addicted-to-attacking-conservatives-rules-chicago-gop-like-a-third-world-dictator-and-its-time-to-go.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=2e82acd586-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_30_06_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2e82acd586-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
– a frequent target of Boulton’s vicious attacks.
** (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/il-gop-chair-don-tracy-votes-for-rnc-chair-ronna-romney-says-shes-done-an-excellent-job-despite-losses-in-2018-2020-and-2022.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=2e82acd586-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_30_06_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2e82acd586-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
Chicago Republican Party chairman Stephen Boulton (left), an advisor and close friend of Illinois Republican Party chairman Don Tracy, and Republican 8th Ward Committeeman Lynn Franco (right), a frequent target of Boulton’s attacks.
Boulton has since responded by going on a tirade on social media, responding to articles about how he attacks people, by attacking people. You can’t make this up.

And where is IL GOP chair Don Tracy on this? He remains silent – an indication of his continued support for his dear friend Boulton and his misogynistic behavior.

Illinois Review has always said that it was time for Tracy to go. It’s time for Boulton too.
To learn more about Illinois Review, visit ** www.illinoisreview.com (https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=2e82acd586-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_30_06_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2e82acd586-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
** Twitter (http://www.twitter.com/illinoisreview?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=2e82acd586-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_30_06_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2e82acd586-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
** Facebook (http://www.facebook.com/illinois.review?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=2e82acd586-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_30_06_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2e82acd586-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
** Website (https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=2e82acd586-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_30_06_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2e82acd586-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

clean_body: This morning, former Republican AG candidate Thomas DeVore filed a motion to represent plaintiffs in Rep. Caulkins' suit against Gov. JB Pritzker.

name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: “What happened to my country?”
body:
It’s a question I’ve asked myself many times over the last few years as I’ve read the latest reports on radical gender ideology pushed in our elementary schools

| This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7141eb4e5ea74b978d73aac958aa7aad&_e=10qNqANjJi0cWgrrkOUBk3Dqqk9YHlPovhMqtl-CHv_8YYmMqUfkJQc3e1ACc1NwagaMtWiznTKipfrWrqtU1wOuNx2yw5T_-hhwRGwpiOn9BmlwWdDhKZl5WKwczCtkf7eaJgXy4s17LiMD5e0nCeqAy66sfNhtmWY3S2axFzg8PRfEwNrljuZMfSGR0C__Eqheb_Q6gtdsflku0Hb3XpTdkUS8I11IpBu9cFkfM6wC2qcWAID3xX0aoquVE-1oxN3LOpeesugl6WN5rKiTTTA2IuMuwQB87SSs6GE7VMK70h6tH4C3HHQijj1zzZgHqf4piEzx491Ul_DavPpxjQZ_6eJ-9EkZtgD4rTra4pABdXJCBFLRsqX8587jKyefl29RaZBPvO-fqtUk1Zf8cA%3D%3D)
---
| | Dear Friend,

Our newest online course opens with the question, "What happened to my country?"

It's a question I've asked myself many times over the last few years as I've read the latest reports on radical gender ideology pushed in our elementary schools, speech squashed by the media and corporate class, basic rights left unprotected in many of our cities, and economic opportunity diminished for millions of Americans.

To understand the source of these radical changes that undermine the rights of American citizens, we've produced the new online course, **" The American Left: From Liberalism to Despotism."**
---
| | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7141eb4e5ea74b978d73aac958aa7aad&_e=10qNqANjJi0cWgrrkOUBk3Dqqk9YHlPovhMqtl-CHv_8YYmMqUfkJQc3e1ACc1NwagaMtWiznTKipfrWrqtU1wOuNx2yw5T_-hhwRGwpiOn9BmlwWdDhKZl5WKwczCtkf7eaJgXy4s17LiMD5e0nCeqAy66sfNhtmWY3S2axFzg8PRfEwNrljuZMfSGR0C__Eqheb_Q6gtdsflku0Hb3XpTdkUS8I11IpBu9cFkfM6wC2qcWAID3xX0aoquVE-1oiQ6LoUoUXui5dQW-ze_7h79rjEwwn9qX6Y1fpjZdH7zw8Orgm65hBLS-Oe2aAXS5552MscQBFRgeqPvGq1SvXs-Hj3-vKl474zJ4FHNTHFBUu4DFXmmotqyajGXvsb71oOfoPn5GqRWHPfvUvFLolQ%3D%3D)
---
In this course, Dr. Kevin Slack, associate professor of politics at Hillsdale College, traces the transformation of the American left over the last 100 years. You'll learn how post-sixties radicals rejected the midcentury liberalism of Franklin Roosevelt; you'll discover the origins of modern gender ideology, identity politics, and today's global elite; and, you'll explore how these movements overtook America's key institutions.

You can watch the trailer for the course and preregister today using the secure link below:

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/american-left-preregister/](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7141eb4e5ea74b978d73aac958aa7aad&_e=10qNqANjJi0cWgrrkOUBk3Dqqk9YHlPovhMqtl-CHv_8YYmMqUfkJQc3e1ACc1NwagaMtWiznTKipfrWrqtU1wOuNx2yw5T_-hhwRGwpiOn9BmlwWdDhKZl5WKwczCtkf7eaJgXy4s17LiMD5e0nCeqAy66sfNhtmWY3S2axFzg8PRfEwNrljuZMfSGR0C__Eqheb_Q6gtdsflku0Hb3XpTdkUS8I11IpBu9cFkfM6wC2qcWAID3xX0aoquVE-1olOTAbaREZXynIwj9FwJmdXEvqpkfIVqZRHEMWKOS6TVJBBshe3H8Xm_o06Smg7wvI4b1pFXa4vd4Gs6nhTGtRM3bCzysFw_co39uCMAnlg48_ktP-ejyIMCfaMzMMx1sPpNzd2ALkvTSmWlpQkYiOw%3D%3D)**

I hope you'll join us to better understand--and learn how to confront--the woke ideologies that dominate American politics today.
Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---

Sent to Freedom Nation Today subscribers.
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

**Derek,** Right now, Virginia is **THE** battleground when it comes to abortion rights. There is no doubt about it, folks — Virginia is the only battleground state with state assembly seats on the ballot this year — and defending **YOUR** bodily autonomy will take winning a majority of those seats come November. We need buy in from everyone, every Democrat across every part of the Commonwealth. The 2021 and 2022 elections proved that Virginia is a key battleground state that can flip either way. Doing our part means pitching in all the support we can to make sure Democrats win in November. subject: This is ridiculous

body:
Eric will always stand up to bullies, and we can't let McCarthy win. |

Hoosier Republican, We’re not letting up for a moment to elect Republicans up and down the ballot.
Our strong and united Indiana Republican Party got the job done to keep our great state **dark red** on November 8, 2022, and now is the time to prepare for the fight ahead.
To keep Indiana moving forward, it’s vital that we continue building on our successes.
So today, we’re reaching out urge you to secure your **2023 digital membership.**
Now is the time to renew or sign up – you’ll receive a membership card in the mail and be an official part of our team of digital supporters that’s helping us keep Indiana a Republican stronghold.
[**SECURE YOUR GOLD MEMBER STATUS ($1,000 DONATION)**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/ec3f1526bb978838/c10b5b76f1ea543ec3d6b838967d376c/40313)

Peter, I don’t just do this anytime.

We can only afford to pull out all the stops when it’s most important: and right now, our mission depends on this.

name: Team Patty
subject: [SIGN] Fix the child care crisis
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
Join Patty Murray’s fight for affordable child care.
#
Peter,
Senator Murray has said many times that the issue she hears the most about – no matter where she is or who she’s talking too – is that child care is out of reach for too many families. It’s plain unaffordable and too hard to find for families, and child care providers are struggling to keep their doors open.
**[We have a child care crisis and Senator Murray is leading the charge to make sure we solve it. Add your name now if you stand with Patty in this fight.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58041823/389847518/1610725158?refcode=pm_em_230130_1&ms=pm_em_230130_1&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZWNlMGM2My1mZWEwLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VSn_VAqJUB65SitME0UNiYdh2eNncJktOChAqgwl1i8=&emci=0c44a631-d49c-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=fece0c63-fea0-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=13116610)**
As a former teacher, and a mom and grandmother, Senator Murray knows how important solving this crisis is not just for families, but for businesses and our economy. That’s why she fought hard to increase child care funding at the end of last year to help more providers and families – but there’s still more to do.
**[Senator Murray will keep fighting tooth-and-nail to make child care affordable for families and support providers – but she needs to know you have her back. Will you add your name now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58041824/389847519/1610725158?refcode=pm_em_230130_1&ms=pm_em_230130_1&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZWNlMGM2My1mZWEwLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VSn_VAqJUB65SitME0UNiYdh2eNncJktOChAqgwl1i8=&emci=0c44a631-d49c-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=fece0c63-fea0-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=13116610)**
Thank you,
Team Patty

clean_body: Join Patty Murray’s fight for affordable child care. Peter, Senator Murray has said many times that the issue she hears the most about – no matter where she is or who she’s talking too – is that child care is out of reach for too many families. It’s plain unaffordable and too hard to find for families, and child care providers are struggling to keep their doors open. As a former teacher, and a mom and grandmother, Senator Murray knows how important solving this crisis is not just for families, but for businesses and our economy. That’s why she fought hard to increase child care funding at the end of last year to help more providers and families – but there’s still more to do. Thank you, Team Patty ** As Washington's senior U.S. Senator, Patty Murray is working to help families, solve problems, and defend our progressive values. PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY

Derek, our Senate campaign’s first end of month fundraising deadline is tomorrow at midnight. _**[If you’re ready to chip in right now you can do so with this link.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230130-1?refcode=EMAF30_1_QNA_20230130_V1_F&refcode2=16839_3422442_KK9RW4&akid=16839%2E3422442%2EKK9RW4)**_
Keep reading to learn why we’re emailing you and why we’re asking for your support. ⬇️
**Why donate right now?**

Reporting strong fundraising numbers early on shows the strength of our movement and can deter super PACs from attacking us. **Our opponent started this race with three times the cash we did, so we need to catch up in order to compete in this race.**
---
**Why donate to Katie Porter?**

Katie’s the warrior Californians need to fight for them. She’s spent her career standing up to powerful special interests and delivering for working people. But this will be a competitive race, and running in the most populous state in the nation takes serious resources, so we need your help.
---
**Why we’re asking you and not a lobbyist:**

Katie is the only candidate in this race who has never taken a dime from corporate PACs and who doesn’t take any money from federal lobbyists or executives at Big Oil, Big Pharma, or Wall Street Banks. We’re truly people-powered, and most of our donations are of $25 or less.

subject: The Voter Confidence Restoration Act; TOMORROW 15 Minutes After Session

body:
FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE Chase sponsored SB884 Presented TOMORROW
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001egnTPXoiWd8kKA7UKMvOOUCQ8R3dB6OmtqIuwwRG61O-Vl_EBlP6HUqJmc48dZgefH_QseX9Ph_nZiefCykY35hUgg4TMY6q0EDfaAUybgrUrwq7vS7sQvyPfeqvLPbg7HdopiZPGTkP9ZTplbMWaMnQBUcXgDZFIVuDBOlXKww=&c=l-9H_ggO-9F4V-XBnVBlMzW6aQ-Sm01oP7MiwJKq8t1Cx8BEz7Ml3g==&ch=9mEDl1PCM_EYG8ztr6wXBgONPO7JSqqTMco6uBBNW3O0gKUpPy5gaw==)

|
FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE
January 30, 2022

Press Contact:
Jody Pyles
jody@chaseforva.com
804 912 6007

Scheduling Press Interview:
Debbie Gwynn
debbie@chaseforva.com
804 393 2715

Most Virginians
Don't Trust That We Have Safe,
Secure Elections
SB884 Chase-sponsored
Voter Confidence Restoration Act Attempts to Restore That Confidence

SB884 Chase Bill Restores Voter Confidence By Putting the Guardrails Back on Virginia's Elections to include Eliminating Voter Computers and Tabulators

Senator Amanda Chase will present SB884 The Voter Confidence Restoration Act, Tomorrow, Tuesday Afternoon at the Capitol, Before a Senate Privileges & Elections Committee

CHESTERFIELD, VA. Virginia Senator Amanda Chase will present [SB884](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001egnTPXoiWd8kKA7UKMvOOUCQ8R3dB6OmtqIuwwRG61O-Vl_EBlP6Ha8FqSyluaXHzdIngLkLpUiV4zwC7Dz56dbxTTvUTaoPTlI7wmkO6OW0ox2w0ORgSEkE_aTrB1QPaA0zClyx_fP-QGovO5m2vqnlgkU_n_Uc8l29O2r2B4-8-J7pENdMkrCh-zn15Dr7jgeEMtGd-a0=&c=l-9H_ggO-9F4V-XBnVBlMzW6aQ-Sm01oP7MiwJKq8t1Cx8BEz7Ml3g==&ch=9mEDl1PCM_EYG8ztr6wXBgONPO7JSqqTMco6uBBNW3O0gKUpPy5gaw==) An Election Integrity Omnibus bill called The Voter Confidence Restoration Act before the Senate Privileges and Elections Committee, Tuesday afternoon in an effort to restore Virginians' confidence in their elections.

Tune into The John Reid Morning on 1140 WRVA tomorrow morning at 7:05am as Senator Chase discusses the details of the bill.

SB884 The Voter Confidence Restoration Act recognizes that most Virginians don't trust our election processes and therefore the results. This bill understands the importance of restoring that confidence by getting back to the basics of election integrity and ensuring safe, transparent elections that all voters can trust.

SB884 addresses many of the concerns voters experienced during the 2020 Presidential Election and seeks to ensure these issues never happen again.

The Voter Confidence Restoration Act repeals provisions of the law permitting same day registration; requires a legitimate excuse to vote absentee in limited cases like active duty military serving overseas . Anyone who meets the limited criteria for voting absentee will have to notarize their mail in ballot.

Voter are encouraged to vote in person on Election Day and present a valid government issued photo identification. The 45 day election season is completely eliminated. Absentee drop boxes are completely eliminated.

All ballots must be received by the general registrar by 7pm, the close of polls on election day in order to be counted.

This Act requires presentation of a form of identification containing a photograph in order to vote; repeals the provisions of law permitting a voter who does not have one of the required forms of identification to vote after signing a statement that he is the named registered voter he claims to be.

The Voter Confidence Restoration Act eliminates the use of electronic poll books and voting machines and requires that ballots be manually tabulated in order to determine the results of an election.

An amendment will be added to the bill to eliminate the use of Soros sponsored [Electronic Registration Information Center (ERIC)](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001egnTPXoiWd8kKA7UKMvOOUCQ8R3dB6OmtqIuwwRG61O-Vl_EBlP6HSRt8ny9B8H1s6bKbv6-6rwch5q5MV1c75iWwrOy1ZhkEnqztRYl3OZ2JHHvYeAQq6KUYb1EvrAlRjbpGAB5TMIWC-Q7Kyd5AQ==&c=l-9H_ggO-9F4V-XBnVBlMzW6aQ-Sm01oP7MiwJKq8t1Cx8BEz7Ml3g==&ch=9mEDl1PCM_EYG8ztr6wXBgONPO7JSqqTMco6uBBNW3O0gKUpPy5gaw==)

"In 2020, many Virginians either went to the polls to cast a vote only to find out that for the first time since they registered to be a voter, that their sacred vote had already been cast. Election officials reported nefarious and questionable thumb drives that just happened to have enough votes to change the results of a Congressional race and the list goes on.

The bottom line is that beginning in 2020, many Virginians for the first time ever questioned the sanctity, processes and results of our elections and we've yet to restore that trust. After listening statewide to many Virginians, I'm doing something about it. Virginians don't trust voting computers and tabulators. They want hand counts and ballots that have a serial number for tracking purposes. They want a return to showing a government issued photo identification to vote and an end to mail-in ballots and drop boxes which do not protect the chain of custody of voter's sacred ballot. They also don't trust all the moving pieces involved with a 45 day voting season. It's time to return to a voting day with an actual deadline. Life is full of deadlines and Election Day shouldn't be the exception. " Senator Amanda Chase

Virginia Senator Amanda Chase will present SB884 The Voter Confidence Restoration Act, before the Senate Privileges and Elections Committee, Tomorrow, Tuesday afternoon, 15 minutes after session adjourns at approximately 1pm, at the Capital in Senate Room 3.

Please reach out to the Senators who serve on the Senate Privileges and Elections Committee and ask them to support SB884 The Voter Confidence Restoration Act.

Public comments can be made in person or online at:
[https://virginia-senate.granicus.com/ViewPublisher.php?view_id=3](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001egnTPXoiWd8kKA7UKMvOOUCQ8R3dB6OmtqIuwwRG61O-Vl_EBlP6HfUiMRcpEkSwHjssLq6aqAHHDvPx3GuK8lxdglqwZrMyFuN4fuK_75DcUNDbn2b8mnpG7B8jDr22GwefCcikKEIDlxxE72rANSBQkKW9IYDTV5cvNLhFdExXnW3Fw1K_vzwJVoAjDGp6cyozcpGzC5I=&c=l-9H_ggO-9F4V-XBnVBlMzW6aQ-Sm01oP7MiwJKq8t1Cx8BEz7Ml3g==&ch=9mEDl1PCM_EYG8ztr6wXBgONPO7JSqqTMco6uBBNW3O0gKUpPy5gaw==)

name: Firearms Policy Coalition
subject: We're suing the ATF (again)!
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.-gowTxBZCQg)
---
Friend, Your freedom is on the line! The ATF gun-grabbers are about to turn 40 MILLION+ Americans into FELONS with a brand-new federal rule. And if peaceable Americans like you and me don't speak up now, this will be _just the beginning_ of the biggest gun grab in American history. [**Friend, will you sign Firearm Policy Coalition's citizens' petition against the Biden Disarmament Regime right now?**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._HCfv2A) Firearm Policy Coalition (FPC) is the most aggressive and most active NO-COMPROMISE pro-Second Amendment organization in the country. FPC's legal team recently won an injunction against the ATF's receiver rule ban in federal district court -- and now, we're gearing up for ANOTHER fight for YOU against the Biden ATF.
---
[Say NO to the Biden Disarmament Regime](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)
---
Just days ago, the Biden Disarmament Regime -- and the gun-grabbing bureaucrats at the ATF -- published a MASSIVE new Final Rule (2021R-08F) that could put TENS OF MILLIONS of gun owners at risk of serious criminal liability and restrict your rights. **The ATF's new rule -- imposed by bureaucrats, NOT our elected officials -- is designed to turn MILLIONS of gun owners into felons and discourage you from exercising your rights.** **Friend:** This INSANE and UNCONSTITUTIONAL federal rule change MUST BE STOPPED. As the leading NO-COMPROMISE, PRO-2A organization in the country, FPC is gearing up for ANOTHER big legal battle against the ATF. We beat them in the last round. But the fight is not over. We MUST beat them again soon - or gun owners you know and love will be in the ATF's crosshairs. **That's why we** '**re emailing you today: we're counting on every freedom-loving gun owner and patriot to speak up in defense of liberty RIGHT NOW.**
---
[Say NO to the Biden Disarmament Regime](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.-le-p7CZTWNaaxZg)
---
Our FPC Law team - the nation's first and largest public interest legal team focused on the right to keep and bear arms, with DOZENS of major cases around the country - is preparing to fight the ATF and their unconstitutional rule change in court, filing suit to protect YOUR rights and property against Joe federal gun-grabbers. But while FPC is preparing to defend YOUR rights even as we speak, we must know how many freedom-loving Americans we can count on to support us in this fight. [**Please sign Firearm Policy Coalition's citizens' petition AGAINST the Biden Disarmament Regime right now to show that you're ready to join FPC in standing against the ATF's new gun control regulations AND the gun-grabbers' attempt to turn gun owners into felons.**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.) Working together through FPC, We the People CAN stop this government overreach and protect your Second Amendment rights, our Constitution, and our natural rights as a free people. Thank you for committing to join us in this critical legal battle. For Freedom,
---
Your Firearms Policy Coalition Team
---
[Stop the Biden Disarmament Regime](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.-C7nalqZ7x_SJs-IQ)
---
5550 Painted Mirage Road, Suite 320, Las Vegas, Nevada 89149
---
Freedom First Project P.O. Box 523692 Springfield, VA 22152If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMDMwLWRiMzY3ZGEyMDEyZDRkNmRiNDRlZTY0ZmNiYmUxMDI1IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlfQ/isXkyPYSjc3R7QUoI4DTeA) to unsubscribe.

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Shrink the GOP House Majority NEXT MONTH and make Kevin McCarthy miserable by electing Jennifer McClellan in Virginia!!
body:
Special House election!
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T08650779-7b1f-45a2-9365-7a3edf5b71bb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **_GOOD NEWS:_ [We can shrink the GOP House Majority NEXT MONTH and make Kevin McCarthy miserable by electing Jennifer McClellan in Virginia!!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T987d1ed5-1753-4350-adb3-56f2930b0df3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **[](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te5af9b65-fc54-4ce9-98ff-2ca9769d7660/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** _It's been painful watching the clown show in Congress, led by Weaker (as I like to call him) McCarthy. He's brought chaos, stupidity and incompetence to the House, and endangered us by putting Marjorie Taylor Greene on the Homeland Security Committee._ _Yet, his weakness is opportunity._ _House Republicans have one of the smallest majorities ever and we can shrink it further. There's an open seat in Virginia, sadly, vacated when Rep. Donald McEachin passed away in November. **Progressive Democrat Jennifer McClellan is running for it, and the election's less than a month away!**_** ** [**_Will you join Blue Amp Action in making history and adding another Democrat to the House? Can you please give $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can elect Democrat Jennifer McClellan to Congress?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td1ff3388-3363-4fa2-9757-7b76aded9110/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **Yes, it's a Democratic seat. Yet, so was George Santos' seat. We MUST NEVER take anything for granted. **
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tda892c64-4691-4c1e-a5bc-f398de27eed4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| **_McClellan would be the first Black woman elected to the House from this district. __She has a long history of civil rights activism and was elected to the state assembly, then state senate, where now she serves. This Includes her role as Vice-Chair of the Virginia Legislative Black Caucus._** _McClellan's opponent is a MAGA nut who attacked our democracy and endangered election workers by claiming the 2020 election was stolen. He would ban abortion and eliminate all gun laws._ [**_Will you join Blue Amp Action in making history and adding another Democrat to the House? Can you please give $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can elect Democrat Jennifer McClellan to Congress?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5ca587f3-bac0-4eda-9520-b9448b1abc37/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you for helping Democrats thrive, passing progressive policy and increasing Kevin McCarthy's suffering as he manages an even smaller caucus._ Cliff

Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! name: Brittany Pettersen HQ
subject: tomorrow is our first big test
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brittany Pettersen for Colorado
body:
Tomorrow we face our first big fundraising deadline of 2023, and we are behind on our fundraising goal.

Hey Team, we need to get straight to the point. Tomorrow we face our first big fundraising deadline of 2023, and we are behind on our fundraising goal. [**Just $25 from 18326 would help us catch up and put us in a strong position. Can we count on you to pitch in today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58018759/389804547/-373509776?refcode=email_013023_bigtest&amount=20&amounts=5,20,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDIyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MjAxMmIyYS1kY2EwLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Be_ee8JxQS6BUWSZbtzXe6zyplHcxnpZ2zJ8tFgMGhE=) | | [DONATE $25 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58018767/389804548/-1145763526?refcode=email_013023_bigtest&amount=25&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDIyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MjAxMmIyYS1kY2EwLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Be_ee8JxQS6BUWSZbtzXe6zyplHcxnpZ2zJ8tFgMGhE=)

| [DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58018773/389804549/-1145763526?refcode=email_013023_bigtest&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDIyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MjAxMmIyYS1kY2EwLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Be_ee8JxQS6BUWSZbtzXe6zyplHcxnpZ2zJ8tFgMGhE=)

Here’s why we really need to make sure we hit our goal this month:
In 2022, Brittany faced a barrage of false and deeply personal attacks from multiple right-wing super PACs. Our grassroots supporters came through and helped us fight back. When we came to our supporters to ask for help, we promised you we’d use your hard-earned money to keep this seat in Democratic hands. And that’s exactly what we did.
But fighting back against those attacks took a lot of resources — and we are starting this election cycle back at square one. That means we need to scale up fast if we’re going to fight off the next wave of GOP attacks, keep this seat blue, and retake our Democratic majority next year.
[**Meeting our goal before tomorrow’s deadline is our first test of our campaign’s ability to do exactly that, and we could really use your help to get there. name: Sen. Chris Murphy
subject: I’m running for re-election.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Chris Murphy
body:
I wanted you to hear this directly from me first: I am officially running for re-election.
#

Friends -
I wanted you to hear this directly from me first: I am officially running for re-election.
I love this work — being your voice and representing Connecticut in the U.S. Senate means the world to me.
So much has happened in these two years. Most importantly for me, we defied the odds and passed the first major gun safety bill in 30 years. As the author and champion of the bill, I know that the gun lobby is coming after me. And after we passed climate legislation and drug pricing legislation, I know the oil companies and drug industry are coming too. So I am counting on a lot of grassroots support as we kick off this race.
[**Will you please make a $3 contribution to my re-election today to make sure we’re ready for whatever comes our way? Grassroots donations are the heart of our campaign. It is what allows me to focus on — and deliver — meaningful progressive change in the U.S. Senate.**](https://act.chrismurphy.com/go/380?c0=csm-em-jan23.BPVh8l&refcode=em230130-1-obmk&t=1&akid=767%2E1711221%2EpywEAd)
When I came to the Senate, there was a feeling of defeat amongst progressives. For decades, we had tried unsuccessfully to pass transformative legislation to lower carbon emissions. We had struck out, again and again, trying to give Medicare the power to negotiate down the cost of prescription drugs. And we had been stymied, for three long decades, by the gun lobby.
I ran for the Senate to be part of the group that would upend this status quo. And we did. We passed the biggest gun safety bill in nearly three decades, lowered prescription drug costs, made major investments in America’s infrastructure, and delivered the most aggressive climate action bill ever. Slowly but surely, we are shifting the power back from billionaires and corporations to the American people.
But the status quo fights back. And I know that the billionaires and the gun companies are going to throw the kitchen sink at me this campaign.
So I cannot do this alone. The truth is Senate campaigns require significant resources, so I am asking for your support to help me start this re-election campaign strong:
[**Please contribute $3 or any amount you can afford to my re-election today. It’s important that we send a powerful message about the strength of our movement, and the donation itself is just as important as the amount.**](https://act.chrismurphy.com/go/380?c0=csm-em-jan23.BPVh8l&refcode=em230130-1-obmk&t=2&akid=767%2E1711221%2EpywEAd)
When we win, I plan to build on the success of the past two years. We need to pass voting rights legislation, restore the right to an abortion, and build on our 2022 gun safety bill by passing universal background checks and an assault weapons ban.
Thank you in advance for having my back. It means the world to me that so many people like you step up to answer the call when we need it.
There’s a lot of work ahead of us, but together, I know that we will be ready for anything.
Every best wish,
Chris Murphy
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.chrismurphy.com/go/380?c0=csm-em-jan23.BPVh8l&refcode=em230130-1-obmk&t=3&akid=767%2E1711221%2EpywEAd)**

Paid for by Friends of Chris Murphy
Friends of Chris Murphy
PO Box 230987
Hartford, CT 06123
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update your contact info, [click here](https://act.chrismurphy.com/signup/update-contact-info/?t=4&akid=767%2E1711221%2EpywEAd). We try to send only the most important info and opportunities to participate via email, but if you want to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.chrismurphy.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=5&akid=767%2E1711221%2EpywEAd). If you would like to support Senator Murphy's fight for our shared values, please consider [making a donation](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/csm-web?refcode=em-footer&t=6&refcode2=767_1711221_pywEAd&akid=767%2E1711221%2EpywEAd) today.

name: Mark Takano
subject: I'm Asian-American.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P
body:
This is a very personal story to me.

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58020623/389805977/-2042826227?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiY2ZmMjM4ZS1kZGEwLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9abZBUqpa0xADbhOFhVWLt6Rd9CVpNoXOFe7ptX0ioQ=)
---
Hey Peter, I’m Mark Takano and I’m proudly Japanese-American.

Like many Americans, my family pursued the American Dream. Eventually, they were successful. But, there was no shortage of obstacles.

Painfully, my grandparents and parents were all sent to Japanese internment camps during World War II because of racist, fear-mongering policies. They lost everything and had no choice but to rebuild their entire lives after the war.

**But now, I’m a U.S. Congressman -- and I’m asking for your support.**

American families like mine have come so far due to progressive and inclusive policies. And I’m working everyday in Congress to keep fighting for policies that further uplift and protect our diverse communities. [**But Peter, I can’t do it without your support -- so can I count on you to chip in $3 right now and help me build an America that is welcoming and prosperous for all families? clean_body: This is a very personal story to me. | = Hey Peter, I’m Mark Takano and I’m proudly Japanese-American. Like many Americans, my family pursued the American Dream. Eventually, they were successful. But, there was no shortage of obstacles. Painfully, my grandparents and parents were all sent to Japanese internment camps during World War II because of racist, fear-mongering policies. They lost everything and had no choice but to rebuild their entire lives after the war. But now, I’m a U.S. Congressman -- and I’m asking for your support. American families like mine have come so far due to progressive and inclusive policies. And I’m working everyday in Congress to keep fighting for policies that further uplift and protect our diverse communities. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = Thank you -- so glad to know I can count on you. \-- Mark Takano | | Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P.O. name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: Survey on an urgent matter.
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7efd425f2f524969bfffbc63762e957c&_e=TNRaCGZ04FJ1yil_ls_acMqoqVgLZkA7u6c4qUhJBxEb32HkV5iAqWgnaVjGutpFZrebUPTbU3omquLefdFWWVcsIebkIUWUAebMEs0lj3OHdgDmercinAXjWCpHShficlnaj8ohtht2_kHx6X5LksG3jF21qQib8kLCDfsTTEYvUqSDYAwb03JliCje5OxOCH2WSagk4PohIVyNPjDnj22DpfM_PBY-WZr1Qjgw4WH9Snkcd8WdmkUd0UfjBgXAXH6NdK3Fntx6YQivvISviI0p6CuEQqIc7xd4OVPtCo2PCzZ0HBUnq5y-RJbtAsGmtiRAQKi7bIK6eSea0rap82V6ac8HEC0JWNKgjU3yep2CPu5GqaL4w9tvr1CrzsoMouwlMnbjeuzm98jkXydOEg%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7efd425f2f524969bfffbc63762e957c&_e=TNRaCGZ04FJ1yil_ls_acMqoqVgLZkA7u6c4qUhJBxEb32HkV5iAqWgnaVjGutpFZrebUPTbU3omquLefdFWWVcsIebkIUWUAebMEs0lj3OHdgDmercinAXjWCpHShficlnaj8ohtht2_kHx6X5LksG3jF21qQib8kLCDfsTTEYvUqSDYAwb03JliCje5OxOCH2WSagk4PohIVyNPjDnj22DpfM_PBY-WZr1Qjgw4WHalYYwxomzcf9hA0DRouw1VaUeCZgjhcfNFZ-l97OwfFjZQYOWaCag0d4ZJ-FIyyBGnOoK41Ycvu9KZs0y1oAtYV8d2rgKmawhjNxx1Y0lZiLOVnSDA2uNfJW_wkEKlVX0mNKyUnSkd_Lo0OFeoXj9vBfS_LqOGRQl24w07Taybw%3D%3D)** For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale's Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7efd425f2f524969bfffbc63762e957c&_e=TNRaCGZ04FJ1yil_ls_acMqoqVgLZkA7u6c4qUhJBxEb32HkV5iAqWgnaVjGutpFZrebUPTbU3omquLefdFWWVcsIebkIUWUAebMEs0lj3OHdgDmercinAXjWCpHShficlnaj8ohtht2_kHx6X5LksG3jF21qQib8kLCDfsTTEYvUqSDYAwb03JliCje5OxOCH2WSagk4PohIVyNPjDnj22DpfM_PBY-WZr1Qjgw4WHm33qzxJGFWqHW4xoJGN5tnLTftkpYOQCHAQ3XJNmLgGmjoYjGjd4kOJ9GevPULzJiJD70D_1-r_eLuK2v4jq5g16GeUrgmgefbdJ_96f7H4w2VXJNEoma2x6-DVax3H710ERBBuEJSxmTP77Tp-pNKGQcTru0lwxErvIs3QjTjw%3D%3D)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

clean_body: I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection. By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below: For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty. This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states. Look, I’ve always known that keeping NV-03 blue and battling the House GOP Majority wasn’t going to be a walk in the park. In fact, I fully expected that we'd have our fair share of obstacles to overcome.
But what I didn’t expect is how much of a concerted effort we'd need to reach our fundraising goals. **With just one day left, we're not in a comfortable spot to reach our January end-of-month goal by midnight tomorrow.**
Let me be clear when I say that the GOP isn't slowing down their fundraising _at all_. They’ve made it clear that they’re going to target my district to flip and expand their House Majority in doing so.
To make matters even more urgent, my finance team has seen a slowing of support. If we want to reach this goal, I need each of my supporters to step up in a huge way.
There’s a lot more work left to be done for folks across NV-03, and your support today will help me do just that.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Carla=20Sands?=
subject: Happy New Year from Carla Sands!
body:
View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/e4d36e8da472/happy-new-year-from-carla-sands?e=b254a3b575)
Happy New Year!

For many of us, the election of 2022 was a profound disappointment. In the spirit of living in the World as it is and not as we wish it to be, let us continue to press on and work to make our country, states, and cities the best they can be.

I am continuing to speak and promote common-sense policies, a return to American energy dominance, and the importance of countering our greatest adversaries Russia and China.

Last week America First Policy Institute (AFPI) held its first-ever Twitter space on energy and we were joined by some of the smartest leading advocates on sound energy policy.

I have recently written two op-eds on energy policy. One, on the government's overreach in attempting to ban gas stoves (https://carlasands.com/banning-gas-stoves-thats-too-many-government-cooks-in-your-kitchen/) in the United States, and the other, on the impact of wealthy western countries, including the U.S., attempts to prevent African nations (https://www.shorenewsnetwork.com/2022/12/16/carla-sands-lets-hope-african-leaders-will-see-through-the-biden-admins-anti-prosperity-agenda/) from prospering and industrializing by withholding the benefits of fossil fuel usage.

Next month, I will be speaking in Panama about "Why emerging economies should choose the U.S. over the CCP as their trading partner of choice.".

As we enter the New Year, I am thinking a lot about Freedom of Speech and how essential it is to preserve our constitutional rights and our "republic if you can keep it" as Ben Franklin famously said upon exiting the Constitutional Convention of 1787.

Keep the Faith,
Carla Sands
US Ambassador to the Kingdom of Denmark (ret.)

In 2021, the radical Left was riding high and Washington elites were confident that the America First movement was finished. They could not be more wrong.

Three former Trump Administration officials, Brooke Rollins, President and CEO, Linda McMahon, Chair of the Board, and Larry Kudlow, Vice Chair of the Board, realized the America First movement needed a permanent home. In April 2021, the America First Policy Institute was born.

Day 1 of the America First Policy Institute - Arlington, VA
Less than two years later, our team has expanded to over 160 - America First Experience and Gala at Mar-a-Lago

Now, as we conclude our first full year together, let us take a moment to reflect on our achievements and the impact we had in advancing the America First movement on every level of government:

** WE CREATED THE LONG-TERM HOME OF
THE AMERICA FIRST MOVEMENT
------------------------------------------------------------

** Unifying
------------------------------------------------------------

** Agenda Summit
------------------------------------------------------------

and state levels.

** Inspiring

elected officials in their districts.

** WE ARE ON THE OFFENSE IN STATE &
LOCAL COMMUNITIES
------------------------------------------------------------

** In The States
------------------------------------------------------------

** Model Legislation
------------------------------------------------------------

Published Model Legislation for state leaders on restoring
excellence in schools, healthcare price transparency,
restricting China’s purchase of agricultural land, and more.

** For The Next Generation
------------------------------------------------------------

------------------------------------------------------------

Advanced fatherhood, school choice, election integrity,
and more key America First policies in states, including in
Arizona and Florida.

** With Families

members’ information and parent resources.

** With the People

conservative movement in key groups, including Hispanics,
African Americans, women, and social media influencers.

subject: I’m trying to work toward a better Arizona for everyone

body:
| | | Flipping the AZ legislature starts today | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zJ7b5wNyzKPLhTo-AgqfOTTnFjqiiqtXGFjXqPt0ZI2cr1j1rrLq4LRik-bMM_RHx_YuzZouVN4H68VaAL5ztNuyBjsNvpmY0HKpqHPO9j-x1VB2gg76hj8LAAPdDdt_tWMtJ_CRJzrq-pxPfn7a5S3sjW2Ykpayc1CGF1_Fi-as78PZ-TU3DnUBGrL99W4f3vMZAPkkt2a6HwOumeP9_EWWhiqL6YtN7jcH51-gVhyjCWHdeU0WwXScQ41ITqbq3hoOFLxfLv44C30C0ulvhcDJLFPAU1U1tbGgR-dxt6X62WyWocGgQK0AfDNGBtvKUQkHRplIAlLLGfi02IZaffeScDvqCd5ysVS4twCS8T1q2BcSVChUY8nYrXcVJt1VxBvYtPPLM9VBxpm3Jy89hX5uS8oqhGdskvRLIA1NCBwQ/3ta/B3bHXb_kTOWJqnW0hXk-Tw/h0/KSz7TFy2ELXc5Ozx1mlIxjrck0pGGa39mzKF06Vivy4)

---
| Team,

It’s been a whirlwind first month as Governor of Arizona, but I’ve been excited by the challenge of finally building an Arizona that works for everyone.

In some of my first actions as governor, I reinstated protections for LGBTQ+ Arizonans in state employment or under state contract. In my State of the State address, I revealed we have serious problems with our water supply, and with our housing – and I committed to tackling these tough problems with transparency and honesty.

In my first budget, I committed to putting public education at the forefront again, and to making education funding more equitable for all districts.

**None of that should be controversial.** But for the Arizona GOP that narrowly controls Arizona’s legislature, their response to my moves was to threaten lawsuits, turn their backs on Arizonans, and throw multiple fits to get media attention.

I’ve said from Day One that I will work with anyone to make our state a better place for all Arizonans, but it’s becoming pretty clear our GOP legislators are not interested in working together to do that. So, we’ve got to work together to vote them out.

Nearly 10 years ago as a state legislator, I co-founded the ADLCC with the mission to elect more Democrats to the state legislature. Now, we’re just one seat away from a Democratic majority in each chamber, and I’m making it my top electoral goal to finally win those seats in 2024 to flip control.

**[Team, you’ve heard from the AZ Dems team about why it’s important we start this work right now. Now you’re hearing it from me. If you can afford to, will you donate $10 to help us build resources to flip the Arizona legislature and finally get to work on building a better Arizona?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zJ7b5wNyzKPLhTo-AgqfOTTnFjqiiqtXGFjXqPt0ZI2cr1j1rrLq4LRik-bMM_RHx_YuzZouVN4H68VaAL5ztNOqp6MENbmqUgTcBzEl5E1VJhdgNDf0ps-gMmWRIs9aDYolbYPlgMIFndYD2UQ2I6zCbnBNBw8k1tvWZkRJR1Yu-DxySJYK89UJMUUFYDqsxdUuMaz4UzU3_5f6MwUFAGZ7FlUvjprgtAqWhWiamYuJbGvLycfn6Hy-JJlVnw3aBkUeVPTdb7_u_yh2sxXS77Z7KzEGm32HKJydrQiDO7iMFDCTgVt4P5wXfZedvUmB11KCCMmm6-Ua1UkZ3CmpZsVo8gP57ondKmZ5ED2lX-sRbXll-9lXsZRJpNY2D5brcMlkBsuN9-a2smDd2wApjf/3ta/B3bHXb_kTOWJqnW0hXk-Tw/h1/uoMM9qJnFWXlXz2BOug_-2Z87LwEKwSxexKvMk55rQU)**
