In some of my first actions as governor, I reinstated protections for LGBTQ+ Arizonans in state employment or under state contract. In my State of the State address, I revealed we have serious problems with our water supply, and with our housing – and I committed to tackling these tough problems with transparency and honesty. In my first budget, I committed to putting public education at the forefront again, and to making education funding more equitable for all districts. None of that should be controversial. But for the Arizona GOP that narrowly controls Arizona’s legislature, their response to my moves was to threaten lawsuits, turn their backs on Arizonans, and throw multiple fits to get media attention. I’ve said from Day One that I will work with anyone to make our state a better place for all Arizonans, but it’s becoming pretty clear our GOP legislators are not interested in working together to do that. So, we’ve got to work together to vote them out. Nearly 10 years ago as a state legislator, I co-founded the ADLCC with the mission to elect more Democrats to the state legislature. Now, we’re just one seat away from a Democratic majority in each chamber, and I’m making it my top electoral goal to finally win those seats in 2024 to flip control. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Thank you for supporting our shared goals, Governor Katie Hobbs Paid for by the Arizona Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Rick McGuire Treasurer. Arizona Democratic Party 2910 North Central Ave Phoenix AZ 85012 United States | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Arizona Democrats, please .

name: Our Revolution
subject: TONIGHT! Ro Khanna, Larry Cohen, new AZ Party Chair Yolanda Bejarano, and more
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8288?t=1011&akid=3945%2E5885482%2E5JHFVE ][IMG]

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/340?t=1012&akid=3945%2E5885482%2E5JHFVE ]RSVP

Join our National Organize-to-Win Broadcast TONIGHT for a discussion with
US Rep. Ro Khanna on the fight for One Fair Wage and progressive strategy
in Congress.

Then, we’ll hear from newly elected AZ Party Chair Yolanda Bejarano and OR
Chair Larry Cohen on progressive organizing inside the Party, and Tara
Mosely on her run for Mayor of Akron, OH! It all kicks off at 8:30 pm
ET/5:30 PT TONIGHT.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/340?t=1013&akid=3945%2E5885482%2E5JHFVE ]RSVP

★ ★ ★
Insider News from the Political Revolution!

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

HEADLINES: Chairman Bernie Sticker | One Fair Wage: NY Kickoff! | Taking
on The ‘Other NRA’ | Sinema’s Challenger | 2024 Senate Outlook | Strategy
Inside the Party | & MORE!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8288?t=1014&akid=3945%2E5885482%2E5JHFVE ][IMG]

Folks! We’re releasing a new commemorative sticker celebrating Bernie
Sanders’ new position as Chairman of the Senate HELP Committee (Health,
Education, Labor, and Pensions).

This is a big deal and gives Bernie the power to expose corporate greed,
take on Big Pharma, and support workers and their unions!

As Chairman, Bernie will be taking the HELP Committee on the road and he
has big plans for this year, so Our Revolution is ramping up our
organizing to have his back.

Claim your Chairman Sanders sticker with a one-time donation of $10 — or
with a $5 recurring gift to invest in our work to carry out Bernie’s
vision.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8289?t=1015&akid=3945%2E5885482%2E5JHFVE ]CLAIM YOUR STICKER

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8288?t=1016&akid=3945%2E5885482%2E5JHFVE ][IMG]

Founded by Bernie in 2016, Our Revolution is America’s largest
grassroots-funded political organizing group. In this new year, we’re
building on our work, expanding our grassroots organizing, and growing our
influence in the party.

With a Republican House, we’re pushing President Biden to deliver for
working people through executive action ahead of 2024. And, we’re backing
up Bernie as he takes on corporate power as Chair of the HELP Committee.

We’re also training our focus at the state and local level — where we have
amazing opportunities this year to elect powerful progressives and pass
life-changing legislation like higher wages for millions.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/7070?t=1017&akid=3945%2E5885482%2E5JHFVE ]We have a lot of exciting work planned for 2023, and we welcome you to
get engaged in our actions and become an Our Revolution member today.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8288?t=1018&akid=3945%2E5885482%2E5JHFVE ][IMG]

★ ★ ★

MEDICAL DEBT

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8288?t=1019&akid=3945%2E5885482%2E5JHFVE ][IMG]

This issue of Medical Debt is a uniquely American problem among the
so-called “developed world" — and a big one that has been largely
neglected by politicians and the media.

Bernie put it into focus in his recent address on the [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8290?t=1020&akid=3945%2E5885482%2E5JHFVE ]State of the
Working Class, noting that half of all bankruptcies in the U.S. stem from
medical debt and 38% of Americans are putting off healthcare because they
don’t want to go into debt.

We are compiling the stories of real people to bring pressure to bear on
this great healthcare injustice. Do you owe a hospital money for care you
needed but couldn't afford? If you are one of the many who owe money to a
hospital, please speak out and tell your story!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/medical_debt_sv/?t=1021&akid=3945%2E5885482%2E5JHFVE ]SHARE YOUR STORY

★ ★ ★

ONE FAIR WAGE

A top issue for Our Revolution members is raising wages. That’s why we’re
partnering with One Fair Wage to pass legislation in 10 states this year
to eliminate the subminimum wage for tipped workers — and put it on the
ballot in AZ, OH, and MI in 2024.

We will pass #OneFairWage because feeding your kids shouldn't depend on
the kindness of strangers.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8288?t=1022&akid=3945%2E5885482%2E5JHFVE ][IMG]

On Monday, our team introduced the bill in New York — the first of our 10
states for 2023 — where we rallied and lobbied NY lawmakers to raise the
wage and not leave tipped workers behind!

Our coalition of workers and activists was joined by dozens of NY
lawmakers, folks like NY Sens. Gustavo Rivera and Robert Jackson who we
worked to help elect in November!

NY would be the 9th state to End the Subminimum Wage for tipped workers —
on Monday, we’ll launch the bill in Colorado, and on Feb. 8 do it again in
Illinois!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8288?t=1023&akid=3945%2E5885482%2E5JHFVE ][IMG]

Our Revolution-NYPAN’s Jenny Almanzar spoke at the One Fair Wage event
about her experience in the restaurant industry. “I’ve come out of shifts
making less than the minimum wage,” she said. “Most workers at the
establishment have quit.”

We need to hear from you! If you’ve ever worked in the food service
industry and experienced low wages, we encourage you to speak out — and
we’ll have your back!

Leaders like Bernie Sanders and Ro Khanna are bringing these issues to the
forefront, and we can help bring change by sharing our horror stories in
the industry.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/tipped_wage_sv/?t=1024&akid=3945%2E5885482%2E5JHFVE ]SHARE YOUR STORY

★ ★ ★

THE ‘OTHER NRA’ vs. WORKERS

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8288?t=1025&akid=3945%2E5885482%2E5JHFVE ][IMG]

Not only are we organizing to pressure elected officials, but we’re also
going after the National Restaurant Association — because lobbyists
shouldn’t be able to use workers’ money to keep their wages low!

On Thursday, Our Revolution activists protested in NYC and Maryland
against the ‘Other NRA’, which the [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8256?t=1026&akid=3945%2E5885482%2E5JHFVE ]New York Times recently exposed has
taken millions from low-wage workers and used it to fund lobbying against
wage increases.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8288?t=1027&akid=3945%2E5885482%2E5JHFVE ][IMG]

All elected officials must reject dirty money from ‘Other NRA’ which has
used this scheme to stagnate the federal minimum wage at $7.25/hr since
2009 and the federal tipped wage at $2.13/hr since 1991!

US Rep. Ro Khanna was the first to sign our NO NRA Money pledge, and we
need his colleagues in Congress to follow suit!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8247?t=1028&akid=3945%2E5885482%2E5JHFVE ]CALL YOUR REP!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8288?t=1029&akid=3945%2E5885482%2E5JHFVE ][IMG]

Raising the Wage is popular — and necessary! Last year restaurant workers
won the fight to make Michigan the 8th state to end the subminimum wage
for tipped workers. And, in DC, 76% voted to raise the wage to $16.75.

This year we’re working with One Fair Wage to end the subminimum wage in
NY, MD, MA, CT, RI, VT, HA, CO, PR, and CA. We’ll also be collecting
signatures this year to put the measure on the ballot in AZ, OH, and MI in
2024.

Sign up to be part of our Raise the Wage Team chance to help millions of
workers in each of these 13 states win higher wages.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8222?t=1030&akid=3945%2E5885482%2E5JHFVE ]JOIN OUR RAISE THE WAGE TEAM

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8288?t=1031&akid=3945%2E5885482%2E5JHFVE ][IMG]

With a Republican House, we must also push President Biden to deliver on
through the Power of the Pen.

Our Revolution’s Federal Action Team members zeroed in on the following
top three issues areas: Combat the Climate Crisis, Lower Healthcare Costs,
and Expand Worker Power.

Just some things Biden can do include giving sick leave to rail workers,
ensuring union rights for federal contractors, and closing tax loopholes
for the wealthy!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8220?t=1032&akid=3945%2E5885482%2E5JHFVE ]JOIN OUR FEDERAL ACTION TEAM

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8288?t=1033&akid=3945%2E5885482%2E5JHFVE ][IMG]

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8288?t=1034&akid=3945%2E5885482%2E5JHFVE ][IMG]

SINEMA OFFICIALLY HAS A CHALLENGER!

Progressive US Rep. Ruben Gallego is officially running against Kyrsten
Sinema for the US Senate in Arizona — and Our Revolution is all-in to make
sure the Senate has one less corporate villain.

For too long Sinema has used her power to help those who already have it
all — standing in the way of raising the minimum wage, protecting voting
rights, lowering the cost of prescription drugs, and more.

Gallego came directly at Sinema for repeatedly selling out working people,
saying, "The rich and the powerful, they don't need more advocates."

However, corporate Democratic leadership has not yet come out in support
of Gallego and has even refused to rule out endorsing Sinema! Which means
we have work to do.

With Sinema raking in big money rewarding her for her obstruction of
progress, it’s going to take a historic grassroots effort to win. Donate
now to our Stop Sinema Fund to jumpstart this work!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8291?t=1035&akid=3945%2E5885482%2E5JHFVE ]STOP SINEMA

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8288?t=1036&akid=3945%2E5885482%2E5JHFVE ][IMG]

2024 SENATE RACES

Looking ahead to the 2024 Senate races, Our Revolution Executive Director
Joseph Geevarghese told [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8292?t=1037&akid=3945%2E5885482%2E5JHFVE ]The Hill that “the progressive voting bloc in
the Senate is poised to become stronger.”

“Look, it’s a very tough map. It is going to be difficult for Democrats to
hold the majority,” Joseph explained, “but even if Democrats don’t do
well, progressives will, and we’ll have more influence.”

Democrats didn’t win the House in 2022, but the Congressional Progressive
Caucus got stronger, which shows that “economic populists, candidates who
put bread-and-butter issues at the center of their campaigns, can win,”
Joseph said

“I think that’s incredibly encouraging,” he added. “We need more Bernies
and Warrens — and Fettermans.”

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8288?t=1038&akid=3945%2E5885482%2E5JHFVE ][IMG]

While we prepare to take out Kyrsten Sinema in 2024 — unlike other groups
— we’re not skipping critical races in 2023.

Power is up for grabs this year in major cities all across America, and we
plan to elect progressive city leaders in St. Louis, Chicago, NYC, Philly,
Nashville, Dallas, and more.

Join Our Revolution’s Elect Progressives Team to give us insight into
what’s happening in YOUR city or town, and help us make key endorsements!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8223?t=1039&akid=3945%2E5885482%2E5JHFVE ]JOIN OUR ELECT PROGRESSIVES TEAM

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8288?t=1040&akid=3945%2E5885482%2E5JHFVE ][IMG]

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8288?t=1041&akid=3945%2E5885482%2E5JHFVE ][IMG]

Ahead of the DNC winter meeting in February, Our Revolution Board Chair
Larry Cohen penned an inside look at progressive work to transform the
Party for [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8293?t=1042&akid=3945%2E5885482%2E5JHFVE ]In These Times.

We have more progressive reformers inside the party than ever before, and
they’ll be re-submitting the resolution to get dark money out of primaries
at the meeting.

Disgraced crypto billionaire Sam Bankman-Fried funneled nearly $40M to
‘centrist’ Democrats in the primaries — and he was one of many. “Getting
this kind of corrupt corporate cash out of primaries is critical if we
want to elect grassroots challengers,” Larry said.

“For those of us who believe we must fight in every possible way to
advance progressive issues and win real power, we ignore party reform at
our peril,” Larry said.

“Without change within the Democratic Party, we won’t win the advances in
healthcare, childcare, workers’ rights, and climate change that are
desperately needed,” he explained. “Progressive party-building requires a
dedicated inside-outside strategy.”

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8288?t=1043&akid=3945%2E5885482%2E5JHFVE ][IMG]

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8288?t=1044&akid=3945%2E5885482%2E5JHFVE ][IMG]

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/340?t=1045&akid=3945%2E5885482%2E5JHFVE ]RSVP

Join our National Organize-to-Win Broadcast TONIGHT for a discussion with
US Rep. Ro Khanna on the fight for One Fair Wage and progressive strategy
in Congress.

Then, we’ll hear from newly elected AZ Party Chair Yolanda Bejarano and OR
Chair Larry Cohen on progressive organizing inside the Party, and Tara
Mosely on her run for Mayor of Akron, OH! It all kicks off at 8:30 pm
ET/5:30 PT TONIGHT.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/340?t=1046&akid=3945%2E5885482%2E5JHFVE ]RSVP

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8288?t=1047&akid=3945%2E5885482%2E5JHFVE ][IMG]

The corporate wing is using any tactic it can to push back against the
growing power of progressives inside the Party.

If you’re a party member, delegate, precinct captain, or chair of your
local party — we’d love for you to help us further our progressive
strategy!

Sign up for our Party Transformation Team to connect with our broader
reform movement and help us organize the left of the party!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8227?t=1048&akid=3945%2E5885482%2E5JHFVE ]JOIN OUR PARTY TRANSFORMATION TEAM

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8288?t=1049&akid=3945%2E5885482%2E5JHFVE ][IMG]

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8288?t=1050&akid=3945%2E5885482%2E5JHFVE ][IMG]

As the country’s largest grassroots-funded progressive political
organization, we are carrying out Bernie’s mission in 2023 through our
4-Point Plan to Win:

Organize the Grassroots
Elect Progressive Champions
Transform the Dem Party
Fight for Progressive Issues

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/7070?t=1051&akid=3945%2E5885482%2E5JHFVE ]Let’s head into 2023 as strong as possible. As a Movement Builder,
you’ll power the meaningful and strategic work we have planned for the
year ahead.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8288?t=1052&akid=3945%2E5885482%2E5JHFVE ][IMG]

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/7070?t=1053&akid=3945%2E5885482%2E5JHFVE ]WHEN WE ORGANIZE, WE WIN!

★ ★ ★

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=3945%2E5885482%2E5JHFVE ]Facebook | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1002&akid=3945%2E5885482%2E5JHFVE ]Twitter | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1003&akid=3945%2E5885482%2E5JHFVE ]Instagram | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=1004&akid=3945%2E5885482%2E5JHFVE ]Youtube | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=1005&akid=3945%2E5885482%2E5JHFVE ]Website |
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/signup_2109/?t=1006&akid=3945%2E5885482%2E5JHFVE ]Sign Up

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5923?c0=OR_EM_NEWS_DONOR_20230128_1_1.hhmGA3&t=1007&akid=3945%2E5885482%2E5JHFVE ]Our membership swag

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5924?c0=OR_EM_NEWS_DONOR_20230128_1_1.sOL9bK&t=1008&akid=3945%2E5885482%2E5JHFVE ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to a recurring donation of just $5 or more a
month!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5925?c0=OR_EM_NEWS_DONOR_20230128_1_1.n2Eefj&t=1009&akid=3945%2E5885482%2E5JHFVE ]GIVE MONTHLY

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5926?c0=OR_EM_NEWS_DONOR_20230128_1_1.uyoSEC&t=1010&akid=3945%2E5885482%2E5JHFVE ]GIVE ONCE

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ourrevolution.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-2/?akid=3945%2E5885482%2E5JHFVE

Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe

PO Box 66208
WASHINGTON, DC, 20035

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a
501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as
charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are
made to support Our Revolution’s general mission and are not designated for
any specific activity.

With Sinema raking in big money rewarding her for her obstruction of progress, it’s going to take a historic grassroots effort to win. Donate now to our Stop Sinema Fund to jumpstart this work! It is going to be difficult for Democrats to hold the majority,” Joseph explained, “but even if Democrats don’t do well, progressives will, and we’ll have more influence.” Democrats didn’t win the House in 2022, but the Congressional Progressive Caucus got stronger, which shows that “economic populists, candidates who put bread-and-butter issues at the center of their campaigns, can win,” Joseph said “I think that’s incredibly encouraging,” he added. “We need more Bernies and Warrens — and Fettermans.” ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] While we prepare to take out Kyrsten Sinema in 2024 — unlike other groups — we’re not skipping critical races in 2023. Power is up for grabs this year in major cities all across America, and we plan to elect progressive city leaders in St. Louis, Chicago, NYC, Philly, Nashville, Dallas, and more. Join Our Revolution’s Elect Progressives Team to give us insight into what’s happening in YOUR city or town, and help us make key endorsements! [ ]JOIN OUR ELECT PROGRESSIVES TEAM ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Ahead of the DNC winter meeting in February, Our Revolution Board Chair Larry Cohen penned an inside look at progressive work to transform the Party for [ ]In These Times. We have more progressive reformers inside the party than ever before, and they’ll be re-submitting the resolution to get dark money out of primaries at the meeting. Disgraced crypto billionaire Sam Bankman-Fried funneled nearly $40M to ‘centrist’ Democrats in the primaries — and he was one of many. “Getting this kind of corrupt corporate cash out of primaries is critical if we want to elect grassroots challengers,” Larry said. “For those of us who believe we must fight in every possible way to advance progressive issues and win real power, we ignore party reform at our peril,” Larry said. “Without change within the Democratic Party, we won’t win the advances in healthcare, childcare, workers’ rights, and climate change that are desperately needed,” he explained. “Progressive party-building requires a dedicated inside-outside strategy.” ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] [ ][IMG] [ ]RSVP Join our National Organize-to-Win Broadcast TONIGHT for a discussion with US Rep. Ro Khanna on the fight for One Fair Wage and progressive strategy in Congress. Then, we’ll hear from newly elected AZ Party Chair Yolanda Bejarano and OR Chair Larry Cohen on progressive organizing inside the Party, and Tara Mosely on her run for Mayor of Akron, OH! It all kicks off at 8:30 pm ET/5:30 PT TONIGHT. [ ]RSVP ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] The corporate wing is using any tactic it can to push back against the growing power of progressives inside the Party. If you’re a party member, delegate, precinct captain, or chair of your local party — we’d love for you to help us further our progressive strategy! Sign up for our Party Transformation Team to connect with our broader reform movement and help us organize the left of the party! [ ]JOIN OUR PARTY TRANSFORMATION TEAM ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] As the country’s largest grassroots-funded progressive political organization, we are carrying out Bernie’s mission in 2023 through our 4-Point Plan to Win: Organize the Grassroots Elect Progressive Champions Transform the Dem Party Fight for Progressive Issues [ ]Let’s head into 2023 as strong as possible. As a Movement Builder, you’ll power the meaningful and strategic work we have planned for the year ahead. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] [ ]WHEN WE ORGANIZE, WE WIN! ★ ★ ★ [ ]Facebook | [ ]Twitter | [ ]Instagram | [ ]Youtube | [ ]Website | [ ]Sign Up [ ]Our membership swag Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive group in America. [ ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the establishment by committing to a recurring donation of just $5 or more a month! [ ]GIVE MONTHLY [ ]GIVE ONCE You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION PO Box 66208 WASHINGTON, DC, 20035 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution’s general mission and are not designated for any specific activity.

subject: Stop the Covid Mandates! Senator Chase Presents Several Senate Bills Tomorrow to Push Back Against Covid Mask and Vaccine Mandates
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase
body:
FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE Senator Chase Presents Several Bills Before a Senate Health Subcommittee Tomorrow
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QvwmYJZWtWmmtZIdVjT9md-ESH2H6oogBzbzemHtMtHa_ddrneRxclljtQ4k2Q8RBjJTciW0DCyLjEygl7cgJdccCwgqzhw7CPQ_HkbknBs46LxlS0cQR14Y9RMEgsZ5bgWp7rCfmDSeyGyrDDDJQ_087OqIxFd_bdlOUms0Hkg=&c=PD0TPSFvCb9kraNzbbFwdU88ec3Ag-Dl_YnrxJzu2P3JBHCG9lhVOA==&ch=S3uGkbF6yRc2xQwlidofCOtgx8RcYt5IQ6UpG4SaMb4Kf9_ZDAF4lg==)

|
FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE
January 30, 2022

Press Contact:
Jody Pyles
jody@chaseforva.com
804 912 6007

Scheduling Press Interview:
Debbie Gwynn
debbie@chaseforva.com
804 393 2715

Why Are Employers Still Allowed to Discriminate Against Virginians Who Make a Conscientious Decision Not to Get the Covid Vaccine or Wear a Mask?

Several Chase Sponsored Bills SB792/SB833 and SB1315 Will be Presented Tomorrow, Tuesday.
Makes It Illegal for an Employer to Discriminate Against Employees Who Chose Not To Get the Covid Vaccine or Wear a Mask

Senator Amanda Chase will present SB792/SB833 and SB1315, which make it Illegal for an Employer to Discriminate Against Employees Who Chose Not To Get the Covid Vaccine or Wear a Mask, Tomorrow, Tuesday Afternoon at 4pm on the 5th Floor of the Pocahontas Building at 4pm, Before a Senate Health Subcommittee

CHESTERFIELD, VA. Virginia Senator Amanda Chase will present several bills tomorrow before a Senate Health Subcommittee to push back against Covid vaccine and mask mandates. No employer should be able to mandate that an employee be forced to get a Covid vaccine in light of recent studies by the CDC that show there are more vaccine injuries in the past 2 years from the Covid-19 vaccine than the entire 30 years of all childhood vaccines combined. Masks have been proven to be ineffective and actually increase risks of contracting Covid-19.

"Why are employees being forced to chose between keeping their job or getting the jab, which has not stopped the spread of Covid-19 and has been known to cause increase risk of myocarditis, miscarriages, strokes and even death?" asked Senator Amanda Chase.

According to Dr. Paul Marik:
1."Vaccine" kills 2 per 1,000 (estimated 500,000 killed in America)
2\. "Vaccine" has killed 30 per 1,000 of 65 and older
3\. "Vaccine" has killed more people than the COVID virus by at least 5:1
4\. 5 to 10% of our healthiest soldiers have been DISABLED by this "vaccine"
5\. On average 8% of recipients of these "vaccines" have suffered a serious adverse event
6\. Vaccination during the first trimester results in a miscarriage rate of over 80%
7\. Vaccination has led to a decline in new births (fertility rate) of about 20% across the globe

It's time to end the mandates.

Virginia Senator Amanda Chase will present SB792/SB833 and SB1315 before the Senate Health Subcommittee, tomorrow, Tuesday afternoon at 4pm, at the Pocahontas Building, 5th Floor in Senate Subcommittee Room 2. Unfortunately, in subcommittee rooms there is no technology to accept online testimony. All who wish to present testimony must show up in person.

Please reach out to the Senators who serve on the Senate Health Subcommittee and ask them to support freedom from Covid mandates.

Public comments can be made in person or online at:

"Vaccine" has killed more people than the COVID virus by at least 5:1 4\. 5 to 10% of our healthiest soldiers have been DISABLED by this "vaccine" 5\. On average 8% of recipients of these "vaccines" have suffered a serious adverse event 6\. Vaccination during the first trimester results in a miscarriage rate of over 80% 7\. Vaccination has led to a decline in new births (fertility rate) of about 20% across the globe It's time to end the mandates. Virginia Senator Amanda Chase will present SB792/SB833 and SB1315 before the Senate Health Subcommittee, tomorrow, Tuesday afternoon at 4pm, at the Pocahontas Building, 5th Floor in Senate Subcommittee Room 2. Unfortunately, in subcommittee rooms there is no technology to accept online testimony. All who wish to present testimony must show up in person. Please reach out to the Senators who serve on the Senate Health Subcommittee and ask them to support freedom from Covid mandates. Public comments can be made in person or online at: == | | | | | | | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | Authorized and Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase | | Friends of Amanda Chase | P.O. Box 5811, Midlothian, VA 23112 | | Sent by mailto:amanda@chaseforva.com powered by

name: Catherine Cortez Masto
subject: We need to do everything in our power to keep Nevada blue
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
What happens in Nevada over the coming months will again decide Senate control...
| | |
---
Friend, I know a thing or two about winning tough races.

In 2016, I overcame $50 million in GOP spending to win my first Senate race by 2 points. And in 2022, I defied the polls and pundits again – winning by _less than 1 point_ – and defended our Democratic Senate majority.
**What happens in Nevada over the coming months will again decide Senate control – so we need to do everything in our power to keep this battleground state blue. That's why I'm writing to you today.**

My friend and colleague Sen. Jacky Rosen is back on the ballot, and experts at _The Hill_ say the GOP is zeroing in on her as one of its TOP targets for defeat. Jacky is the fighter Nevada needs in the Senate – but she simply cannot fight back and WIN without grassroots supporters like you by her side.

subject: Watch the new free course now
body:
It’s a question I’ve asked myself many times over the last few years as I’ve read the latest reports on radical gender ideology pushed in our elementary schools

| This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8e2567f57d2e45069a65070cc6d69ccc&_e=B09FLNJHsVg8fp0Nh5ZM2PZkHCVlEglGIaQvsRIYCTxm4YDwunn-ln6gp7jmNN1cpdZa8FcW3r3QdxtUH_SkLpXTOA5Wb3htoq6btmVRNKXyIjKkl5lJtiRAmKNmErtO2ozbtNqUlxga0_ddfvYAWtLMCKHCcrjYlZdGcZg1S1PC4E6OM4vXs9Mq8FZ2kYwUvvEZdZEgjVBK0HlP7Uye2su73TbwuXXuOklRzy3H52trcuUpqeGyh_UYGmIzb_PsbUGRqSyNdj2f4hbG6hP51AP8qFG3OBYnHwCejzb3we74RphHymsx2lTc6WrQ6nh4LWlfXS0sN50-oBtFwBS-MUwkICzFYpIUMATetOjPozgLa857L__apXt37ejvwNxB4EEkZRnDXj2pPsdpJaMKLw%3D%3D)
---
| | Dear Friend,

Our newest online course opens with the question, "What happened to my country?"

It's a question I've asked myself many times over the last few years as I've read the latest reports on radical gender ideology pushed in our elementary schools, speech squashed by the media and corporate class, basic rights left unprotected in many of our cities, and economic opportunity diminished for millions of Americans.

To understand the source of these radical changes that undermine the rights of American citizens, we've produced the new online course, **" The American Left: From Liberalism to Despotism."**
---
| | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8e2567f57d2e45069a65070cc6d69ccc&_e=B09FLNJHsVg8fp0Nh5ZM2PZkHCVlEglGIaQvsRIYCTxm4YDwunn-ln6gp7jmNN1cpdZa8FcW3r3QdxtUH_SkLpXTOA5Wb3htoq6btmVRNKXyIjKkl5lJtiRAmKNmErtO2ozbtNqUlxga0_ddfvYAWtLMCKHCcrjYlZdGcZg1S1PC4E6OM4vXs9Mq8FZ2kYwUvvEZdZEgjVBK0HlP7Uye2su73TbwuXXuOklRzy3H52trcuUpqeGyh_UYGmIzb_Ps1fzGmGzqLKX4oL_AD9_7Bx8R33USzDlmUxLR6uiIrJGYdiyq8VKr20eIKDml2CD7kjXu-3E2eeHP_JiakSthYNJuePWLQNsrpajAw6GZQaNZ4IuWZ2k43Hc0fhrVV_lxUH_T9MAJHkbh0xaa5kVR3w%3D%3D)
---
In this course, Dr. Kevin Slack, associate professor of politics at Hillsdale College, traces the transformation of the American left over the last 100 years. You'll learn how post-sixties radicals rejected the midcentury liberalism of Franklin Roosevelt; you'll discover the origins of modern gender ideology, identity politics, and today's global elite; and, you'll explore how these movements overtook America's key institutions.

You can watch the trailer for the course and preregister today using the secure link below:

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/american-left-preregister/](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8e2567f57d2e45069a65070cc6d69ccc&_e=B09FLNJHsVg8fp0Nh5ZM2PZkHCVlEglGIaQvsRIYCTxm4YDwunn-ln6gp7jmNN1cpdZa8FcW3r3QdxtUH_SkLpXTOA5Wb3htoq6btmVRNKXyIjKkl5lJtiRAmKNmErtO2ozbtNqUlxga0_ddfvYAWtLMCKHCcrjYlZdGcZg1S1PC4E6OM4vXs9Mq8FZ2kYwUvvEZdZEgjVBK0HlP7Uye2su73TbwuXXuOklRzy3H52trcuUpqeGyh_UYGmIzb_PsZl2dqWqYWPxEKn9u686oQQ5nxmkqHJQ16FbvwZAFTlHcjWTMmRVffXlxsthW6X8zy8JJxHwz7y8oYE7-9fa91clBv5hGyjX6OknruXQMdOSHSPlOD81M5SO7ee6w8Q1H06OUlTf217PLy8nKZPDd_g%3D%3D)**

I hope you'll join us to better understand--and learn how to confront--the woke ideologies that dominate American politics today.
Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

Peter,

Thanks to your support last cycle, Linda is back in Congress doing what she does best: “kicking ass for the working class.”

With Republicans in control of Congress, we need your help more than ever. After their failed red wave, you can bet Republicans are already laying the foundation to make this a reality in 2024.

And with working families across the country struggling to put food on the table, we cannot afford to have them prioritizing corporate interests.

_**Think about it this way:**_

In 2022, a **Democratic House majority** passed landmark legislation on gun control, took action on climate change, reduced costs for families, created more jobs, and took swift action on reproductive rights when they came under threat.

In 2023, a **Republican House majority** is planning to cut funding for essential services and set working families up for failure.

**Our opportunity to take back the House begins now.** And you can be a key contributor to that success by becoming a Founding Donor.

name: DLCC Membership Team
subject: Your time is running out to join our January membership list
body:
It's time to keep this momentum going and elect more Democratic state legislators in 2023. | | |
---
| | Are you ready to recommit to this Democratic movement? Don’t waste any time, there are only **48 hours left** to get your name on our January membership list: [ ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wllHyGNe2HDyIs5WdLo8tL2Vm_fpYa78vmtI4v8IipV6DLZFck8ZFy0lFQ_W3uQz_nGHrjNXv9EHDeZZnLFAXbraf04PxC69K0ds_DaOucrrkmNVTW1m7w0Kj6O3BI2b4XZZ_iWIts3BT1c-iGYrkDwIY8h9khtYhLD5tn_7Exp-e8BPWkYh3vFI3ROQYUM1ubbq6ENjGkSWJHZwtOPUB3SfEeNGoQdOkg6vsrWcs80PLTKJ1vmMyr4-_gg8_CDPFTuc8TQf68848EnaD66KdD5GHhKKtjQQQTaVIEFovz6eRgaDfd5iO9WUQ3HfAhN18Fnxe6LQ4nP2omLknWFX50ZN_kog5mFtbFEx8CWLHa-vWvYSS8n_71zwhkKKKwAShiNXdOq71YYF9u2bHpAOWJmlSDGjKLNEB3ZHcvB6ZSOvr-y8Giv4uAClIW3DeYuCwFyydEAcP6_RHr7xHAfxPe/3ta/gyypGoT5THOxCjbsgyG73w/h0/S936mZcSHFje4L1nbYllN8Nb68TUv-rRlgsu1Dyea0M) [](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wllHyGNe2HDyIs5WdLo8tL2Vm_fpYa78vmtI4v8IipV6DLZFck8ZFy0lFQ_W3uQz_nGHrjNXv9EHDeZZnLFAXbraf04PxC69K0ds_DaOucrrkmNVTW1m7w0Kj6O3BI2b4XZZ_iWIts3BT1c-iGYrkDwIY8h9khtYhLD5tn_7Exp-e8BPWkYh3vFI3ROQYUM1sGO_IPEG7G9jHrAqGX2pbxxWWlZ4i3UZKwCq0Ac3szrVZ2_PwhzwNCf3a6JsW6JOnWYqkxDlREHQb4MsK1IrGkTsOq0pTHcdZ6SVBmvZnv2E1NcI_-SSgOxlfkgF8q3yQs8JI2aMIBVqoDehGtJHcJ-FWYthQerDjaF34jSi1cJcpLS7xdy9RquRrh7LIysUYZwsS-SebiignIUyAtNdrbc50Zlopr8ur2tOm3Yn75BCniGgAEq02KsfoPEP0sNqkhLJj1e1ZkIGiuylWB_p42/3ta/gyypGoT5THOxCjbsgyG73w/h1/bx3qIuYwKDjcEVuqPrJ3lQAnQuvvDqec-MEnkYYAwUc) State Democrats have accomplished so much in January alone – from winning a critical special election in battleground state Virginia, to taking steps to protect abortion access and expanding workers’ rights. But Republicans continue to attack our every move – so we need to keep this momentum going and elect more Democratic state legislators this year – each of them critical allies for the Biden-Harris administration and the American people writ large. **Right now, we're locking down our strategy to keep flipping chambers and building our momentum in 2023, 2024, and beyond – including competing in critical special elections in the coming weeks – and what we raise before our January deadline will determine just how big we can go in these fights to come. That's why we have to ask:** [Will you chip in $10 today to receive your very own 2023 DLCC Membership card in the mail and join our family of grassroots Democrats? name: Ritchie Torres
subject: I'm teaming up with Dan to hold George Santos accountable
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York**
body:
We should never allow this corruption to happen again. |
#
---
Peter— As an elected official, I believe integrity is paramount to public service. So when GOP Rep. George Santos defrauded Congress by lying about every facet of his life, I knew he must be held accountable – **and that we should never allow this corruption to happen again.** That’s why I joined forces with Dan Goldman to take action, and **[today I’m hoping you’ll split a $10 donation between our campaigns to support our work to scrub Santos’ stain of lies and deception on our Democratic process.>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58034601/389814196/333560463?amount=10&refcode=AU_DSG_FR_TAN_EOM_AC_20230130_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZjYyZDRlZi1lNWEwLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cwNgRbJhvatQJw53uaalML1qhsh-bUx09czdUjc1kdY=)** | [SPLIT $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58034602/389814197/333560463?amount=10&refcode=AU_DSG_FR_TAN_EOM_AC_20230130_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZjYyZDRlZi1lNWEwLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cwNgRbJhvatQJw53uaalML1qhsh-bUx09czdUjc1kdY=)
---
Earlier this month, Dan and I called for a full investigation into Santos’ suspicious financial disclosures.
But we both knew this wasn’t enough – we needed to do more to ensure candidates can never deceive their voters again.
That’s when we introduced the __Stop Another Non-Truthful Office Seeker (SANTOS) Act__ , legislation which will legally require candidates to disclose key parts of their biography when running for office.
**Santos’ service in Congress diminishes the institution, and reflects the far-right rot that lies at the core of the Republican Party.**
As the GOP deepen their rot, Dan and I will never stop fighting to defend our democracy and the rule of law.
But with MAGA Republicans like Kevin McCarthy in the majority, it’s not going to be easy.
**[So Peter, will you split $10 between my campaign and Dan’s to fuel our efforts? clean_body: We should never allow this corruption to happen again. | Peter— As an elected official, I believe integrity is paramount to public service. So when GOP Rep. George Santos defrauded Congress by lying about every facet of his life, I knew he must be held accountable – and that we should never allow this corruption to happen again. That’s why I joined forces with Dan Goldman to take action, and = | = Earlier this month, Dan and I called for a full investigation into Santos’ suspicious financial disclosures. But we both knew this wasn’t enough – we needed to do more to ensure candidates can never deceive their voters again. That’s when we introduced the Stop Another Non-Truthful Office Seeker (SANTOS) Act , legislation which will legally require candidates to disclose key parts of their biography when running for office. Santos’ service in Congress diminishes the institution, and reflects the far-right rot that lies at the core of the Republican Party. As the GOP deepen their rot, Dan and I will never stop fighting to defend our democracy and the rule of law. But with MAGA Republicans like Kevin McCarthy in the majority, it’s not going to be easy. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Ritchie Torres and Dan Goldman will go through immediately: ** | = = | = = | = = Thank you, Ritchie Dan Goldman for New York PO BOX 3306 New York, NY 10008 United States | mailto:info@dangoldmanforny.com | Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York

name: Rep. Dana Criswell
subject: Action Alert! Save Rural Healthcare
body:
|
---
| | |
---
| I know its late but we need your help to save rural healthcare in Mississippi. Tomorrow, January 31 is the last day to pass this bill out of committee.
---
| [Take Action NOW!](https://www.votervoice.net/BroadcastLinks/2dIk0OuNDL8TitTFfddYrg)Everyone remembers the COVID healthcare crisis of 2019 and 2020 and the Mississippi Department of Health lamenting the lack of hospital beds in Mississippi. Everyone also remembers the fear that if you contracted the virus there might not be a hospital with a bed for you. But what most Mississippians don't know is that the number of hospital beds in the state is controlled by the Department of Health. While they were telling you there were not enough hospital beds to take care of the sick, the rules and laws of our state were the reason for the lack of beds.Mississippi has the most restrictive and most socialistic approach to medicine of almost any state in our union. It is time for that to change. Mississippi Freedom Caucus member Chris Brown has authored a bill to repeal the socialist rules of the Mississippi Department of Health and allow free market principles to take over. If Mississippi simply follows the Republican platform, access to healthcare in our state will improve.The Mississippi Republican Platform says,
> "We believe our health care system can be improved by moving away from the current bureaucracy driven, heavily regulated third-party payment system to a new patient-centered system of consumer choice. We can have an affordable, accessible and quality health care system by empowering individuals and families, promoting free-market competition and embracing the benefits of technology, innovation and a fair legal climate. "
We need your help. Tell your Representative that you want to end government-controlled socialized medicine in Mississippi. Ask them to support House Bill 1494 and repeal the liberal Certificate of Need regulations that have ruined healthcare in Mississippi.[Click Here and Take Action!](https://www.votervoice.net/BroadcastLinks/2dIk0OuNDL8TitTFfddYrg)During business hours, you may also call **601-345-1211** and leave a message for Speaker Philip Gunn asking him to save rural healthcare by passing HB 1494 - CON reform.
---
| You are receiving this email because you signed up for alerts from Mississippi Freedom Caucus.
Click [here](https://www.votervoice.net/BroadcastLinks/y5dF59wioaa3BrkdWckF5w) to unsubscribe from this mailing list.

---
| | [ ](https://www.votervoice.net)
---

subject: Remember the January 6 peaceful protesters!
body:
Those held in jail – especially the hellish D.C. jail – couldn’t celebrate Christmas last year with their spouses, children, extended families, or friends. They weren’t allowed to go to Midnight Mass or sing Christmas hymns on Sunday morning at church. [**Please give a crucial $25, $50, $100, or more TODAY to fully fund my two critical class action lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to FREE and get JUSTICE for ALL January 6 protesters!**

](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8945460abb20418e80ea173e8c547c8c&_e=kLCI2i7-ujdblLBCwx919GNs7TdkxjHBsdQ0cZX9AbyWOqpCYmgdloqK2MPaEwJMpt1mBpmUumJSTQftASGG-EmZo5jjf_lVj184nYWPFB2U7fROY1r0a6BGM2taU6qzf-4C4mbtHYtgGca53teHPft8YTExHZp04OkHSJq0hHG4fTz5mYNRYZHcDSJfZHciVykbehaHv_EtgrwwUPFLPtd0_f_svR9F5Z086aBbfk-Mqsx5dLwfLvPKsaBq_77KVG-cfWHLQRLc-k3h8oC4F08q7WARsjoXvP4RIVpxzwAkMOUyZREPuWuGetEVLaVHFS-xowS13ofZ8i9NTTYAQw%3D%3D) I hope you enjoyed a wonderful Christmas and New Year with your family and friends.

**At this time, I can 't help but think of my client, Marine combat veteran Jesus Rivera, and the other January 6 Peaceful Protesters who've been thrown to the wolves.**

Those held in jail - especially the hellish D.C. jail - couldn't celebrate Christmas last year with their spouses, children, extended families, or friends. They weren't allowed to go to Midnight Mass or sing Christmas hymns on Sunday morning at church.

**If they celebrated, they did it as political prisoners who prayed and sang ...while hoping that the guards wouldn't show up and beat them again.**

You and I know they're being railroaded for just exercising their Constitutionally protected rights that day at the Capitol building.

Jesus Rivera didn't even protest. He just shot video on his smart phone and a digital camera for a local news station back home in Florida. He entered the Capitol peacefully like many other patriots that day.

But Jesus has been sentenced to eight months in federal prison anyway.

Disabled Marine veteran Zach Rehl protested peacefully, but he's been held without bail and the VA cut off his disability payments.

As you know, other January 6 peaceful protesters have been driven to such desperation by the abuse and torture they endure, that over 30 of them begged to get transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba!

**Many of these jailed patriots haven 't held or even seen their families in a year or more...some, like prisoner Peter Stager, have been jailed for over 600 days.**

That's why I beg you to stand with me at this crucial time.

**I 'm Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.**

I'm a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who's fought for the American people for 45 years.

You've seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I 'm proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton. **

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: An important lesson from last year
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elissa Slotkin for Congress
body:
Elissa Slotkin for Congresssecure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq12023?refcode=email20230130 [secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq12023?refcode=email20230130]
Team,
If there’s one thing we learned last year, it’s that it pays to plan.
Not only was my last election one of the most competitive House races in the country – it was the MOST expensive in the country. Outside groups poured millions of dollars into this race and necessary costs, like the price of ads, skyrocketed as we got closer to Election Day.
Luckily, we were able to combat the craziness by getting a head start. Way back in 2021, we started raising the resources we knew we were going to need down the road. This way, not only did we enter 2022 with money in the bank, we were able to make smart, early investments in things like voter outreach and registration.
We were also able to buy and air ads significantly earlier than my opponent. This was particularly important, as TV ads are much cheaper if you’re able to place them well in advance. When we’ve got the funds to reserve air time early, it means we’ll be able to afford more of it down the road. So, while ad prices skyrocketing in the last few months of the 2022 election wasn’t ideal, we were able to adapt thanks to the early work we had put in.
While I don’t know exactly what my next election will look like, I do know that it pays to plan. Which is why I’m asking if you’ll click below to contribute. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq12023?refcode=email20230130] Because the earlier we start – the more we’ll be able to save in the long run!
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq12023?refcode=email20230130]
Elissa

# [#]

Elissa Slotkin proudly represents mid-Michigan in Congress. She was re-elected in 2022 by a 5-point margin, in the state's most competitive Congressional district.

body:
It's Time to Stop "Woke" Doctors from Taking Advantage of Vulnerable Minors and Their Parents
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DWwie9kQq-B5YCQaZkoeoi681zE2u-xLpRB2gGW_zhIueoWZhvi4BDqEZl4BGLGyJcKQFZl6MIhvtxd28O-68iC0tHMPs4GcpO0FkbVkxQ0SOXllqLC98-0qk3Y2wgrJOC4TSJAAYIfJ6pKN6dAkNM3yAMyYZ-LRPmdZk0tqwY0=&c=eLN70Jh-O9NGmEsUBvqy4tFot_jADd6Q33RgnmNLRJomAOAhHMErAA==&ch=9JXvgQnNu3O_N2HrkZ9uSE4CoC-_R38igS4WaSDAal6EnPt8rTUDRA==)

|
FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE
January 30, 2022

Press Contact:
Jody Pyles
jody@chaseforva.com
804 912 6007

Scheduling Press Interview:
Debbie Gwynn
debbie@chaseforva.com
804 393 2715

SB791 The SAFE Act
"Save Adolescents from Experimentation Act"
to be Presented tomorrow by
Senator Amanda Chase

Prohibits permanent, irreversible and experimental radical gender transition medical procedures for minors by "Woke" Doctors

CHESTERFIELD, VA - Tomorrow, Tuesday January 31, Senator Amanda Chase will present SB791 the SAFE Act, otherwise known as the Save Adolescents from Experimentation Act, to prohibit permanent and irreversible experimental gender transition procedures on minors. Similar legislation sponsored by Arkansas Representative Lundstrum HB1570, which passed in 2021 and has been introduced in 21 other states.

The bill will apply to minors only and prohibits experimental, permanent and irreversible sterilization and mutilation on minors in the name of "gender transition" procedures.

It also prohibits the use of public funds for "transition procedures" for minors and establishes enforcement procedures for "woke" healthcare providers who chose financial gain over their Hippocratic oath to "do no harm."

Finally, the bill prohibits insurance companies from being forced to cover the tremendous cost of these experimental procedures and passing the cost along to the consumer.

"Public school children, who still believe in Santa and the Easter Bunny, are being allowed to make permanent irreversible medical decisions that will affect them for the rest of their lives. This is outrageous given students can't even legally get tattoos or take aspirin on their own on school property. "

"Trusting parents are seeking help from trusted doctors only to find out these "woke" doctors are encouraging these experimental procedures and coercing parents into going along with expensive transition surgeries that they are falsely told will save their child's life. Ultimately many of these children detransition when they become adults and regret the decision."

"It's time to put an end to "woke" doctors taking financial advantage of vulnerable parents and their children. "

Senator Amanda Chase will present SB791 The Safe Act before the Senate Health Subcommittee Room 2 at 4pm at the Pocahontas Building on the 5th Floor.
###

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58036009/389818974/-1511406121?refcode=em_fr_2023.01.30_b1_dhq_all&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZmFmODkxZi1lYWEwLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=N1dlnLE0BHwgnZIpsoEMAT8K1veaG5kEbH9rBtti8K0=) Derek,

Here at Deluzio HQ, we are proud to be running a **people-powered campaign.**

Chris believes in the power of collective action – _and he has the union and worker endorsements to back him up!_ Last year, our campaign didn’t take a dime from the corporate PACs that want to kill the union way of life and have workers begging for scraps. Instead, we relied on supporters just like you to power us to victory.

[**Right now, our campaign is facing our first fundraising deadline of 2023, so we’re calling on our supporters to help us. If everyone reading this email chipped in just $5 we could reach our $9,000 goal in no time. clean_body: Right now, our campaign is facing our first fundraising deadline of 2023, so we’re calling on our supporters to help us. | = Derek, Here at Deluzio HQ, we are proud to be running a people-powered campaign. Chris believes in the power of collective action – and he has the union and worker endorsements to back him up! Last year, our campaign didn’t take a dime from the corporate PACs that want to kill the union way of life and have workers begging for scraps. Instead, we relied on supporters just like you to power us to victory. = | = Chris is proud to be in Congress fighting for our common good. He never hesitates to put western Pennsylvanians and working folks first, because he’s not owned by corporate interests or outside groups. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you, Team Deluzio | Chris Deluzio is a voting rights lawyer and Iraq war veteran representing Pennsylvania's 17th District in Congress. [](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wk3KbH6rdH1-Ipv8EScXsAbOJgON61N8mw_ztJshSh84JuLWeXkrAhfeKwvgfxENLKO6Hhu3pwf6Fd1VOuux9aZE_man8IeVytD-mRF9ZA3XPlIl0A8ATgtkB4qs6tDVqIBESeU7TWMbL3c8dIWiODC2OlhbGi0vSHNNiRCJIx2SKOO9Jg_GZQ9bYEBfB4tjHCweTE2QCskHEdQrmUkAdVeWxuLeiVF3PO-nqzNw28tk39JzFrfuvs-Szq3N29L2KcwN-rGDx9jIzUIiA7PSRhmWFFGYnEJZHugFBEKJnjG25rh2nWwNMt-QEpoYI7s-xBoS4Es_ybUUK7nc1t82nq/3ta/9wLXd1BZQCy9xj8Ss3w2Tw/h1/_7ngnU04Ybekrs9Jt4lWTKPeGadGh8MQMmOrQuwP4Wg)

| IT IS ABSOLUTELY CRUCIAL THAT WE START THIS CYCLE ON A HIGH NOTE.

What we raise now will lay the groundwork for what we’re able to accomplish in 2023 and 2024, and right now, **_it’s not looking like we’ll be able to accomplish much of anything_** — not if we don’t reach our $15K goal by tomorrow at midnight.

We’re not exaggerating when we say that Black progressive champions all over the country are counting on YOU — **yes, you, Peter** — to help us power them to victory up and down the ballot over the next two years and #BuildBlackPoliticalPower more than ever.

[Please, Peter — we need you more than ever right now. Rush a donation of $10 or anything you can to The Collective PAC before tomorrow at midnight:](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wk3KbH6rdH1-Ipv8EScXsAbOJgON61N8mw_ztJshSh84JuLWeXkrAhfeKwvgfxENLKO6Hhu3pwf6Fd1VOuux9aZE_man8IeVytD-mRF9ZA3YxUHCqDim01vmSMC3D54h3TxsDEkzj9BQd6T9oG_xECM1C18ajU8L-G008BnqDNl5sIFmA20v2HCKd4ccAM1GUE4rWtTkCoNWW-L6-OkdaNTbX_BSalhKfQYcqGf3PYt2zN-lTSE0oFx1Q_fXpneeu_YvUYBVA0xiGhhSYwRgiMHQ9RrhFIe1Zn2h3vVP9mCxJWpXdred-C-XrjkFRX0QSNhvConUdv3y1mY5iOkO10/3ta/9wLXd1BZQCy9xj8Ss3w2Tw/h2/TAXbprxINlKDJUvTWem5l416d38mWY5FnAWBfhkbw5s)

What we raise now will lay the groundwork for what we’re able to accomplish in 2023 and 2024, and right now, it’s not looking like we’ll be able to accomplish much of anything — not if we don’t reach our $15K goal by tomorrow at midnight. We’re not exaggerating when we say that Black progressive champions all over the country are counting on YOU — yes, you, Peter — to help us power them to victory up and down the ballot over the next two years and #BuildBlackPoliticalPower more than ever. First Solar – an American manufacturer – has expanded its investment in solar power, bringing millions of dollars to Lake Township and its surrounding community. This investment, which has also contributed hundreds of jobs to the town, is further supported by the Inflation Reduction Act of 2022, signed into law by President Biden. Democrats have long advocated for solar energy and investments in renewable energy infrastructure in America. These clean energy jobs, which support both the environment and the towns in which the plants operate, are revitalizing the promise of the American heartland. We're proud that rural Americans are powering the future of this country and the world. We're also proud the Democrats are making huge strides in rural Ohio, supporting the development of new investments and jobs to the state. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: Thank you for your continued support. – United Rural Democrats United Rural Democrats (URD) is leading the effort to rebuild the Democratic Party in rural America. If we're going to take back our country, we need a 50-state strategy to organize in every community across the country. Will you support our network of activists on the ground as we work to rebuild our party's infrastructure and flip these areas blue?

Democrats Serve is a national organization that backs Democrats running for office with frontline public service backgrounds, including first responders, firefighters, social workers, police officers, prosecutors, judges, public defenders, educators, and more.

Democratic candidates with professional experience serving their communities in government have a pragmatic approach to governing and know how to get things done, making for strong narratives and an ability to connect with voters uniquely.

However, when running for office, they often lack access to the professional campaign staff and wealthy donor networks that non-working class candidates do.

Milford, CT 06460

name: Cori Bush
subject: This is what I’m striving for.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
You are part of a larger people-powered movement that’s gaining momentum and transforming the way we do politics.
#
Peter,
When you love all of humanity, you care that everyone is housed. You care that everyone is fed. You care that everyone is safe. You care that everyone has health care. You care that everyone has an education.
**This is what I’m striving for.** It seems like common sense — but dark money, white supremacy, disinformation, and our broken political system have made this vision, a divisive one.
**The challenges we face are immense. But I know that when we work together, we have the power to move mountains.**
That’s why ahead of our first end-of-month fundraising deadline I’m asking for a favor: I need your support as we organize and legislate in Congress for an agenda that puts people first. [**If you can afford it, will you chip in $5 before our end-of-month deadline or anything you can to help us continue doing this work?**](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230130-2.Kl49jV&amount=5&refcode=em20230130-2098&t=1&akid=2098%2E1082990%2E-Q6lhS)
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230130-2.Kl49jV&amount=5&refcode=em20230130-2098&t=20&akid=2098%2E1082990%2E-Q6lhS)**
You are part of a larger people-powered movement that’s gaining momentum and transforming the way we do politics. Together, we are making progress and demanding the change we deserve.
Thank you for all of your support.
Your Congresswoman loves you,
Cori

**[Contribute ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cori-em-20230130-2?refcode=em20230130-2098-footer&t=21&refcode2=2098_1082990_-Q6lhS&akid=2098%2E1082990%2E-Q6lhS) **

name: Team NPP
subject: Our rights are at stake in 8 days.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Pennsylvania Project_
body:
Our work here is not done. Help us get out the vote for the Special Elections.

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58037709/389824724/409185284?refcode=EM_FR_230130EOM2_EOM_TEAM_90DO_4_NG_B_Logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFmMTBiZmQzLWVlYTAtZWQxMS05OTRjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ad9WGsy3oQ-W8wjesLnWVX76MiDzpg0E9EcLSYDPKUs=)
| Fellow activist,

We have less than 48 hours to reach our $3,000 end-of-month goal, and we are falling a bit behind.

Last year we made huge strides by expanding our electorate and, as a result, electing a state legislature that reflects the voice of the people. But our work here is not done.

The Special Elections to fill three vacancies in Allegheny County and regain that reflective legislature are right around the corner, and we need to make sure we get those same voters, and then some, to get out and vote on 2/7.

name: Judicial Watch Tipsheet
subject: Judicial Watch Sues Health and Human Services for Surgeon General Office Contact with Big Tech about COVID Vaccines
body:
Judicial Watch announced recently it filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit against the U.S. Department of Health and Human Services (HHS) for communications and records of the Surgeon General’s Communications Director’s contact with social media companies regarding COVID-19 vaccines.

| | |
---
---
| | | Because no one is above the law! | Jan 30, 2023
---|---|---

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: My reflections on ten years of Giffords
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
I hope you’ll allow me to share some thoughts with you
#

Friends, at the beginning of this month we commemorated the ten year anniversary of our organization. I hope you’ll allow me to share some reflections with you about how Giffords came to be.
While a lot of people might think it was my own shooting that inspired me to commit my life to ending gun violence, that wasn’t the case. The shooting at Sandy Hook Elementary School in Newtown, Connecticut was the reason I decided to devote myself to this fight.
I’ll never forget the day of the Sandy Hook shooting. Twenty children and six teachers were killed. These were innocent people whose lives were stolen by the actions of a gunman driven by hatred. Like many Americans, I watched in disbelief as the events of that day unfolded.
Even though I was in the midst of my own recovery, I knew I couldn’t just sit back and do nothing after this tragedy. At the time, my husband Mark was in Asia. I called him, and I remember the one word that came to my mind to express what I was feeling.
_“Enough.”_
Mark was right there with me in his feelings of shock and horror. So three weeks after this tragedy, we went to Newtown and met personally with families who lost loved ones, and other parents who had children in the school that day.
That was one of the hardest days of my life. I remember the thoughts echoing in my head after that day: _Children are dying. We must do something._
With that, the idea for our organization was born. After weeks of gathering a leadership team, planning, and fundraising, we launched Americans for Responsible Solutions on January 8th, 2013, exactly two years after a gunman tried to take my life in Tucson and killed six of my constituents.
My goal for this organization—what we know today as Giffords—was to bring together concerned Americans from all backgrounds who were tired of the gun violence plaguing our country and wanted to take action.
Although we’ve made progress, we’ve also experienced some devastating lows. I’ll never forget the day in 2013 when the Senate failed to pass bipartisan background checks legislation. Today, we’re still fighting for universal background checks—a commensense solution that would save lives.
We’re still in the midst of a gun violence epidemic in our country. Sandy Hook was unfortunately not the last school shooting our nation faced. We had Parkland. We had Uvalde. In 2017, we had the deadliest mass shooting in modern American history at the Route 91 Harvest Music Festival in Las Vegas. And we can’t ignore the daily violence in homes and communities nationwide that often doesn’t make the news.
So yes, we have a long way to go to secure a future where nobody feels unsafe to attend school, shop at the supermarket, go to the movie theater, or simply walk down the street. I will not rest until that future becomes a reality. You can count on that.
I know sometimes the lows may make it seem like progress is impossible in the fight to end gun violence. This is tireless work, but it is worth it. I promise you. The hardest fights always are.
Change is possible, and it’s happening. We’ve changed hearts, changed minds, and changed laws. We’ve had some incredible triumphs since our founding ten years ago. 525 gun safety laws have been passed in states across the country in the last decade. In 2022, the most significant federal gun safety law in nearly three decades was signed into law. But the work continues.
I know this has been a long message, and I want to thank you for taking the time to read. Now is the time where I have to make an important ask of you.
[**In honor of our organization’s ten-year anniversary, will you please chip in $10? If you’ve been waiting to make your first online contribution to Giffords, there’s no better day than today.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-jan23.1ic_u0&refcode=em230130-2-30&t=1&akid=4185%2E3935704%2Eza-Utv)
**[CONTRIBUTE NOW](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-jan23.1ic_u0&refcode=em230130-2-30&t=2&akid=4185%2E3935704%2Eza-Utv)**
Whether you’ve been with us from the start, or have just joined our movement recently, I want to thank you so so much. It takes many voices to make a difference, and we can only do our work to achieve a future without gun violence through the support of people like you.
With courage,
Gabby Giffords
**[CONTRIBUTE NOW](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-jan23.1ic_u0&refcode=em230130-2-30&t=3&akid=4185%2E3935704%2Eza-Utv)**

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=4185%2E3935704%2Eza-Utv) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.
clean_body: I hope you’ll allow me to share some thoughts with you Friends, at the beginning of this month we commemorated the ten year anniversary of our organization. I hope you’ll allow me to share some reflections with you about how Giffords came to be. While a lot of people might think it was my own shooting that inspired me to commit my life to ending gun violence, that wasn’t the case. The shooting at Sandy Hook Elementary School in Newtown, Connecticut was the reason I decided to devote myself to this fight. I’ll never forget the day of the Sandy Hook shooting. Twenty children and six teachers were killed. These were innocent people whose lives were stolen by the actions of a gunman driven by hatred. Like many Americans, I watched in disbelief as the events of that day unfolded. Even though I was in the midst of my own recovery, I knew I couldn’t just sit back and do nothing after this tragedy. At the time, my husband Mark was in Asia. I called him, and I remember the one word that came to my mind to express what I was feeling. “Enough.” Mark was right there with me in his feelings of shock and horror. So three weeks after this tragedy, we went to Newtown and met personally with families who lost loved ones, and other parents who had children in the school that day. That was one of the hardest days of my life. I remember the thoughts echoing in my head after that day: Children are dying. We must do something. With that, the idea for our organization was born. After weeks of gathering a leadership team, planning, and fundraising, we launched Americans for Responsible Solutions on January 8th, 2013, exactly two years after a gunman tried to take my life in Tucson and killed six of my constituents. My goal for this organization—what we know today as Giffords—was to bring together concerned Americans from all backgrounds who were tired of the gun violence plaguing our country and wanted to take action. Although we’ve made progress, we’ve also experienced some devastating lows. I’ll never forget the day in 2013 when the Senate failed to pass bipartisan background checks legislation. Today, we’re still fighting for universal background checks—a commensense solution that would save lives. We’re still in the midst of a gun violence epidemic in our country. Sandy Hook was unfortunately not the last school shooting our nation faced. We had Parkland. We had Uvalde. In 2022, the most significant federal gun safety law in nearly three decades was signed into law. But the work continues. **THE ONLY OFFICIAL EMAILS FROM TED BUDD**

Hey!

It's Senator Ted Budd. Just yesterday, I was sitting in traffic and decided to make a few 'mental notes.'

Ever since I started this new job, I have been trying to stay on top of all that has been going on. With work, a family, and adjusting to the Senate, there is a lot to keep track of.

Here are my 'mental notes':

-Send Amy Kate some flowers for her birthday (she deserves them!)
-Run by the grocery store and skip the eggs
-Check in and make sure I've hit my fundraising goal for this month
-Send an email to my top supporters list

All that to say, after I checked in with my team, I realized I really needed to send you a message, Peter. My team let me know that we are way behind on this next fundraising deadline.

I told them not to worry about it, though, because I know you are with me!

clean_body: Quick Word | THE ONLY OFFICIAL EMAILS FROM TED BUDD Hey! It's Senator Ted Budd. Just yesterday, I was sitting in traffic and decided to make a few 'mental notes.' Ever since I started this new job, I have been trying to stay on top of all that has been going on. With work, a family, and adjusting to the Senate, there is a lot to keep track of. Here are my 'mental notes': -Send Amy Kate some flowers for her birthday (she deserves them!) -Run by the grocery store and skip the eggs -Check in and make sure I've hit my fundraising goal for this month -Send an email to my top supporters list All that to say, after I checked in with my team, I realized I really needed to send you a message, Peter. My team let me know that we are way behind on this next fundraising deadline. I told them not to worry about it, though, because I know you are with me! The size of the doesn't matter, and if you can't pitch in today, that's OK. But I just thought I would ask. or by the button below. | Thanks for giving me the opportunity to fight for you in the U.S. Senate. It's an honor I do not take for granted. Sincerely, Senator Ted Budd | Ted Budd is a father, small business owner, and conservative leader from North Carolina. | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Ted Budd for Senate Copyright (C) 2023 Ted Budd for Senate, All rights reserved.

| | Hi Peter, Elizabeth here from the American Federation for Children We have a bold but achievable goal this year – **we want to make 2023**** _the year_****of school choice. **
We want it to be the issue _everyone_ is talking about and for us to make our most ambitious strides yet.
---

| | With your support, we can continue advocating for quality educational opportunities for all children – regardless of zip code or income – and energizing the school choice movement nationwide.**[_Peter, can we count on you in the fight ahead?_](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=c100c3bf88e448c8bd0551dcc1a6c801&_e=TjJruSLUFH9LS6TGy52ZVr1SqLakZqa1ndhZn8aoKnrxd20fYfpc6K57ECko0e7Fc4-5GcwFhiaIy73URY9zWE-yTjf769UIgfPH-xYaq2eBXbI6hwE-GBSMjzE1RYwAWz-KOlNNk5elAqlJKB8PTHU1o6_9HFUSCbNdCWBYMTbxaeBzKQlQCOiYW8QUeEN73qUTTdmgk00kHhZpceXiDUC2k3-Iw8BvvaXQinjjatyUIwrfgN1iG0Xgj65Sz0z6dPo4pkAQ20CujwKdCx2PzOWmzqG8P516E3V5qkGu9OHThkRCHzS4FPyryQEaA2rN7RqTjq7p03MQe4EjP2C_5_tBuCKvTGhjKoGDp5Wiq_KQEMxEnzL8Oe-GydAaeFlONzXcjVlS5iOoiGD3zOEMI2OOFeqSRipNbVujSuYdmE88-pqUekIFfM2SmFv7GX2e)** _Who is the American Federation for Children? _ We’re an organization of parents, activists, and policy professionals all united under one mission: **bringing school choice to parents and students in every state. ** We believe EVERY parent deserves a choice, and EVERY child deserves better. **And 72% of Americans agree.** Yet, not every state offers even one alternative to traditional public school. **That’s not fair to students or parents.**
---
| | [**CHIP IN FOR CHOICE**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=c100c3bf88e448c8bd0551dcc1a6c801&_e=TjJruSLUFH9LS6TGy52ZVr1SqLakZqa1ndhZn8aoKnrxd20fYfpc6K57ECko0e7Fc4-5GcwFhiaIy73URY9zWE-yTjf769UIgfPH-xYaq2eBXbI6hwE-GBSMjzE1RYwAWz-KOlNNk5elAqlJKB8PTHU1o6_9HFUSCbNdCWBYMTbxaeBzKQlQCOiYW8QUeEN73qUTTdmgk00kHhZpceXiDUC2k3-Iw8BvvaXQinjjatyUIwrfgN1iG0Xgj65Sz0z6dPo4pkAQ20CujwKdCx2PzOWmzqG8P516E3V5qkGu9OG0tMpuTWXNAeFe6j35rU9WSUHW6AKTlDz49KfbvJq6pslGS5PGbbiDW5Q8W5uG9AuwYswrEAck7bTHt56SfYRqQXHXeRx5uO1wMrXeepiY4EelQ1rbcetL6_7-Q2IqC9wBnhr_j4Bhy44alPytvC5x)

name: Doug White
subject: Update from the Democratic Central Committee Meeting
body:
Apologies upfront for this being English only. Post election we are looking for Spanish language support and it is a big ask to have someone
| | **Can 't see this message? _[View in a browser](https://www.dougwhite4congress.us/so/5eONHupoV/c?w=7nD1VOZZ2psJT8Df7-cyHZ-daTLzzQBdp1WrjNuSFWA.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZG91Z3doaXRlNGNvbmdyZXNzLnVzL3NvLzVlT05IdXBvVj9sYW5ndWFnZVRhZz1lbiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjA0OTZmZmUwLWMwYmEtNDYwNi05OTg2LWMyODAzN2U4ZDE1NSJ9)_**
---
| | |
---
| | Rural Americans United
---
| | Apologies upfront for this being English only. Post election we are looking for Spanish language support and it is a big ask to have someone translate this much text. If you know of anyone that will help please let us know. Thank you.
---
| | This last weekend we saw new leadership step up to take the Washington Democrats forward. The path forward will not be easy, but what Tina was able to build gives us the confidence that we can do anything and the strong foundation to launch from. Thank you Tina and good luck to the newly elected team.
---
| |
---
|
---
| | |
---
| | Update from the Washington Democrats Central Committee Meeting Firstly I want to congratulate Patsy Whitefoot as the newly elected Representative of Congressional District 4. Patsy brings knowledge, relationships, expertise and passion to this role. We are grateful to have you, there is no one better for this role. Thank you. Secondly I want to thank all the State Committee Members and other attendees from Central and Eastern Washington that voiced their concerns that our specific needs require attention and for the response from the newly elected leadership that we are heard. During open mike I gave a short speech that went something like this: As Tina mentioned earlier we may have the same goals but that does not mean we take the same path to reach them. This is true of us in Central and Eastern Washington. When I think of climate change I think of the 10, 20, 30, 40% crop loss our famers suffer and the financial impact it has on thousands of families. When I think of access to healthcare I think of the long drives to reach a doctor. And if there will be a doctor because our lower medicare reimbursement and other factors make the better paying jobs in cities like Seattle and Spokane attractive. But my biggest anguish is what Alison Dabble shared earlier; LGBTQ+ kids in the Tri Cities are under attack. I walk as a proud gay 61 year old man. My childhood was difficult. I was raise in a loving family, but outside was bad. It disturbs me greatly that 60 years on the LGBTQ+ youth have it harder than me. They have adults fighting everyday to remove the legitimacy of their existence. This can not be. As democrats we always listen with compassion but I need you to now take action. We need your help now, please. Thank you
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| | Yakima Democrats are having a Social Hour for Social Change February 6th from 6-7pm at their 3rd street office. Ag and Rural Caucus Zoom Better Practices Series 06:30 pm Thursday 02 February 2023 with Teresa Purcell on Rural Messaging
[https://us02web.zoom.us/j/81582823697?pwd=V1FaVlV3Ly8xTHFBTTZZM1VxblVjQT09](https://www.dougwhite4congress.us/so/5eONHupoV/c?w=xq9CNAZglXfVQN24KBnip6EBspDG_4m2bPTvj0TiKgU.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly91czAyd2ViLnpvb20udXMvai84MTU4MjgyMzY5Nz9wd2Q9VjFGYVZsVjNMeTh4VEhGQlRUWlpNMVZ4YmxWalFUMDkiLCJyIjoiZmYwNzAwOWQtZTE0Ny00NTRjLWQ2YTEtMWJkYmFmOTFjNzJjIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiMDQ5NmZmZTAtYzBiYS00NjA2LTk5ODYtYzI4MDM3ZThkMTU1In0) Mobilize Lunchtime Meeting w/ Sen.Murray's & Sen. Cantwell's Staff in Seattle and Virtual with several dates to choose from [https://www.mobilize.us/mobilize/event/377852/](https://www.dougwhite4congress.us/so/5eONHupoV/c?w=-a4gHnpljxbdZe4z2UsgF72gLaZRxiTjz2hu-UpW-cY.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubW9iaWxpemUudXMvbW9iaWxpemUvZXZlbnQvMzc3ODUyLyIsInIiOiJmZjA3MDA5ZC1lMTQ3LTQ1NGMtZDZhMS0xYmRiYWY5MWM3MmMiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiIwNDk2ZmZlMC1jMGJhLTQ2MDYtOTk4Ni1jMjgwMzdlOGQxNTUifQ)
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| | Just in! I have received an update from Allison Dabler that the Tri Cities Pride event may not take place. Please visit their Facebook page to learn more and find out what help you can provide. [https://www.facebook.com/TriCitiesPrideFestival/ ](https://www.dougwhite4congress.us/so/5eONHupoV/c?w=rXl_5FcxRuWRhGYWUPpaKrPvYGMsOmPJJm6HJhej87Q.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZmFjZWJvb2suY29tL1RyaUNpdGllc1ByaWRlRmVzdGl2YWwvIiwiciI6ImRmYWVjOGQ0LTZlMzItNGFhZC1iMTc5LTVmYjY4OTJiYTg4NyIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjA0OTZmZmUwLWMwYmEtNDYwNi05OTg2LWMyODAzN2U4ZDE1NSJ9)At this time LGBTQ+ kids are under attack in Richland schools and others around the nation, this is NOT the time to be quiet. We must all step up and do our part. I trust Tri Cities Pride to make the correct decisions for their community and we will be there to provide complete support regardless.
---
| | |
---
