name: Charlie Kirk, Turning Point USA
subject: Expose the College Cartel
body:
| | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=83e84a4b8df049d09f60ae84e11396d8&_e=mT8ZI5d3jS5uW4tqldneLxY3wzebykS177O2u905MP6VGUg6BzeL2MXQUtAuhn0wx--7Wz6-BK6aoFwDcTMeVgquWOebdER1peLJm3SmLP8ot-2ZrjY5MMLr-OWbZDrCFytEYOvkR17iL2azaZtRdi7CymZ63JGOMfIztwtVXY2V1nl8DVYXsjuKbLOYjDzwsUKafMOp0b3Pf8wlO1Wdp0juOfffVBZRGKoNgs73hNZjOA-9rs8G-qqx9b1zyEX489PT92xTNR45Y1phor69iScKvVI9dcLDaMqNFF0LrB3tJwmAgT8DYg62tGeVXTL6)
---
Fellow Patriot, I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time. _And now I want to send YOU a copy of the evidence against America's colleges and universities -- my NEW BOOK,_**The College Scam.** [**Will you claim YOUR copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=83e84a4b8df049d09f60ae84e11396d8&_e=mT8ZI5d3jS5uW4tqldneLxY3wzebykS177O2u905MP6VGUg6BzeL2MXQUtAuhn0wx--7Wz6-BK6aoFwDcTMeVgquWOebdER1peLJm3SmLP8ot-2ZrjY5MMLr-OWbZDrCFytEYOvkR17iL2azaZtRdqY97r8FH6EbutEtMzDg0vU8Z6jE4G2-2Ni8LiiUS5pBygfhdkXuXmowTXKjof6QOGOCY5a-QVLkPxSx7gokevmY37A5_69UeULB7moPdh5u5Y-4mirCKgc1V1mMfNyYVo3wXXjrMSUW2h-MJs5q1UAgrS_CPhAsCJXDuo_ieDy0)
---
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=83e84a4b8df049d09f60ae84e11396d8&_e=mT8ZI5d3jS5uW4tqldneLxY3wzebykS177O2u905MP6VGUg6BzeL2MXQUtAuhn0wx--7Wz6-BK6aoFwDcTMeVgquWOebdER1peLJm3SmLP8ot-2ZrjY5MMLr-OWbZDrCFytEYOvkR17iL2azaZtRdvzTsi9Ljsws5AIQk4DiVKW1Y1n1wQ1SXAvHKRgjVcHcB5k9CFX9qBIMhzmVRGqI5mixKpl-alBUuZluIjq9B2Xkrz9Q_2JDSaDjDF90jVuZFnkCYJUIoanUykMVp-hK5KkPAm6xujHoGc15uiCLj37g4Kxle2-wVy8Ek9yUvso0)
---
_I was proud to share my new book,_ The College Scam,_
with President Donald Trump._
---
**I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. _And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives._ **I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_.** Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with _The College Scam_ to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. [**I'd like to send you a copy of my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_ , as a special thank-you for a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA. Will you claim your book right now?**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=83e84a4b8df049d09f60ae84e11396d8&_e=mT8ZI5d3jS5uW4tqldneLxY3wzebykS177O2u905MP6VGUg6BzeL2MXQUtAuhn0wx--7Wz6-BK6aoFwDcTMeVgquWOebdER1peLJm3SmLP8ot-2ZrjY5MMLr-OWbZDrCFytEYOvkR17iL2azaZtRdkOROrIFfjc_aP_g5pODH58Aql0xydzDJIAxig0ihhnkfPQ4GgzI0KMUJ0un58pP5l6nWyUC6sm_OaLTwjx-mhMqeZmRXgxmAYra6YNXvlXParYZa2hsG34MOLvBNAs0uy1v4TBDab0xEH1Ofbyug3uEaush5gwXcuaTYELdi9wf)
---
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=83e84a4b8df049d09f60ae84e11396d8&_e=mT8ZI5d3jS5uW4tqldneLxY3wzebykS177O2u905MP6VGUg6BzeL2MXQUtAuhn0wx--7Wz6-BK6aoFwDcTMeVgquWOebdER1peLJm3SmLP8ot-2ZrjY5MMLr-OWbZDrCFytEYOvkR17iL2azaZtRdhYjgx4EXej9DWybwp4nz4Lc47P6J80ymfBArfEbFVkwZcNODO1nuKfuPY33QI2m-WVej2y628i2IXwz2cL_e-0_fLc5p-w9aHYif7uN1z6PdtQEpzzHoQ9Yk0SNU-m3DJTG6KWgAeWPZS572Fx9wlg-NrfFWR3HqpwrOhCirjdd)
---
I wrote this book as an ESSENTIAL GUIDE for every patriot concerned about young people and the future of our country. When you read _The College Scam,_ you'll learn:
* my 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge

* the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness

* how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain

**_And I want you to know -- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists_.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... EXTENSIVE RESEARCH into the dirty secrets of higher education (and how the government props it up!) ... and a PROSECUTOR'S INTENSITY to present my case against the College Cartel. [**Can I send you a copy of _The College Scam_ right now? clean_body: | | | Fellow Patriot, I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time. And now I want to send YOU a copy of the evidence against America's colleges and universities -- my NEW BOOK,The College Scam. I was proud to share my new book, The College Scam, with President Donald Trump. I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the BIGGEST and most IMPACTFUL pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states. And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives. I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,The College Scam. Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with The College Scam to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. I wrote this book as an ESSENTIAL GUIDE for every patriot concerned about young people and the future of our country. When you read The College Scam, you'll learn: my 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain And I want you to know -- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... EXTENSIVE RESEARCH into the dirty secrets of higher education (and how the government props it up!) ... and a PROSECUTOR'S INTENSITY to present my case against the College Cartel. That means you'll get a copy of this exciting new book AND help support Turning Point USA's critical work to EXPOSE the Left's college scam, DEFEAT the radical Left, and WIN the American Culture War! The College Cartel has created and spread the WORST and MOST TOXIC beliefs behind the Left's War on American Culture. And no one has exposed the FULL TRUTH of the College Scam -- until now. Thank you for helping me EXPOSE the College Cartel and fight back against their toxic ideologies in the American Culture War! name: Katie Porter
subject: A note on the new Oversight Committee
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
13/15 new Oversight Committee members cast doubt on the 2020 election results.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=16846%2E3422442%2Ef2LNiE)
Kevin McCarthy made promises to some of the most extreme members of his party in order to become Speaker of the House. Now we’re seeing the consequences.**Of the 15 new Republicans who are joining me on the House Oversight Committee, 13 have cast serious doubt about President Biden’s 2020 win.**
My new committee members include Marjorie Taylor Greene, Paul Gosar, and Lauren Boebert.
I’ve always believed the Oversight Committee should be used to hold those with power to account, regardless of their politics. But Republicans are already prioritizing clips for Fox News.
We’d better serve the American people by using this committee to hold big corporations accountable for rising prices. Or by investigating health insurance companies who have harmed patients. Or by pushing gun manufacturers to implement safety features.
I’m a proud progressive Democrat, but I’ll work with anyone, including Republicans, to deliver for the American people.**I implore my colleagues to spend our time on the Oversight Committee rooting out real corruption and curbing the power of global corporations. That’s the critical work that benefits every single American.**
Thanks for being in this fight with me.
Katie Porter
P.S. — **[I’d be so grateful if you could chip in $5 to help power my work, show Republicans the strength of our movement, and help us start our new Senate campaign in a strong position.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230130-2?refcode=EMAF30_2_OVR_20230130_V1_F&refcode2=16846_3422442_f2LNiE&akid=16846%2E3422442%2Ef2LNiE)**

body:

[**Please give a crucial $25, $50, $100, or more TODAY to fully fund my two critical class action lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to FREE and get JUSTICE for ALL January 6 protesters!**

](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0cc353382d2541cc8aee059881e5911f&_e=wcMO9tYoTbVg-meDj41x0y3PWif1kzZfOXGKwZdPNsGR1nSnDog760mWkG_0P_nS0JeR-OPf4TVTaSvBzXO6byz2GtouNXDYq8V2MOx5jSttTtHzG6LlHKhkJE-mhlsYBRd3XbCV8B4w47FY_5iv3hgzxTuETgR34jKgh_6oa365icasAs5Vq8k-MkIrxGbcHLQQYrHbFJKBASkzwXHsaK7z_UonAZ-AkmjRiM98Xs1QkXrcUXrajj8FKSj-lzyzhbfFgvGN2e83dOUl4usnNkngGplSP8OC9691N4-Oy_UtJEB5NHS-IlPPfH9CU7swhu41CW1wObrzHpixtpovFw%3D%3D) I hope you enjoyed a wonderful Christmas and New Year with your family and friends.

**At this time, I can 't help but think of my client, Marine combat veteran Jesus Rivera, and the other January 6 Peaceful Protesters who've been thrown to the wolves.**

Those held in jail - especially the hellish D.C. jail - couldn't celebrate Christmas last year with their spouses, children, extended families, or friends. They weren't allowed to go to Midnight Mass or sing Christmas hymns on Sunday morning at church.

**If they celebrated, they did it as political prisoners who prayed and sang ...while hoping that the guards wouldn't show up and beat them again.**

You and I know they're being railroaded for just exercising their Constitutionally protected rights that day at the Capitol building.

Jesus Rivera didn't even protest. He just shot video on his smart phone and a digital camera for a local news station back home in Florida. He entered the Capitol peacefully like many other patriots that day.

But Jesus has been sentenced to eight months in federal prison anyway.

Disabled Marine veteran Zach Rehl protested peacefully, but he's been held without bail and the VA cut off his disability payments.

As you know, other January 6 peaceful protesters have been driven to such desperation by the abuse and torture they endure, that over 30 of them begged to get transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba!

**Many of these jailed patriots haven 't held or even seen their families in a year or more...some, like prisoner Peter Stager, have been jailed for over 600 days.**

That's why I beg you to stand with me at this crucial time.

**I 'm Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.**

I'm a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who's fought for the American people for 45 years.

You've seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I 'm proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton. **

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents - AND WIN!**

And now I'm pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden's rotten criminal regime in court.

I'm suing everyone responsible for these outrages, including FBI Director Christopher Wray.

[**Patriot, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0cc353382d2541cc8aee059881e5911f&_e=wcMO9tYoTbVg-meDj41x0y3PWif1kzZfOXGKwZdPNsGR1nSnDog760mWkG_0P_nS0JeR-OPf4TVTaSvBzXO6byz2GtouNXDYq8V2MOx5jSttTtHzG6LlHKhkJE-mhlsYBRd3XbCV8B4w47FY_5iv3hgzxTuETgR34jKgh_6oa365icasAs5Vq8k-MkIrxGbcKO5TX5prsFVQCZ4g_aDC5AgRMNoTEtLREz2aPgPZUCMCWXRobFqYERSJIFoD95qZlE0SGjTgBjPymhx9cSDWCzyE1CJ55px32TBZ9Bab6KUuPkemyI0AG4F9N208lotArWARLyX9NUcTX8UizaZ6Nw%3D%3D)

Your best gift today will help me fight for these jailed patriots, bring them justice, and fight for the future of our Great Nation.

[**So please give what you can right away.**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0cc353382d2541cc8aee059881e5911f&_e=wcMO9tYoTbVg-meDj41x0y3PWif1kzZfOXGKwZdPNsGR1nSnDog760mWkG_0P_nS0JeR-OPf4TVTaSvBzXO6byz2GtouNXDYq8V2MOx5jSttTtHzG6LlHKhkJE-mhlsYBRd3XbCV8B4w47FY_5iv3hgzxTuETgR34jKgh_6oa365icasAs5Vq8k-MkIrxGbcRs0h3jQOAPDfXEEVsgw8KqN7_1wJ8Y-f0QrGMV4ihp-pktSWInYcdSt2MY7juQ5okJ1DnLChVQGtdJvtfZkQgHL_eA7oYaN7vZEHM1ULWJsgbXpYCFwI1yYj2xxGsjxklT-BH4179oKdMOETB-pBWA%3D%3D)

Larry Klayman

name: Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: Are universities getting it right?
body:
Are K-12 schools, colleges, and universities in your state doing enough to provide students with a proper understanding of American history and government
| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=95520f3d8a6141489e3d9b3fe159489f&_e=0A5Sqj8j7PisIZro5fsYCc0RzgU9Ombst5Kfk8Cbjzbug3iWDdnoginLVVbFyq0HZD7DfYz4zXtSMcL3dgJxuENdhISXLRKVjXYbvUmB-LeAH35UzydwPdLGLi5zkDsUdf6sXnUICTfwEr-6c3tRSPW77w-KcnnXpxtqQIdYyo6K59HZXWQL-YPrbSkxV1TvwgUOpDtd8GInR3NYjOyMClSYfXOBJdi2Ni_fdyleMNdfSFvua9BglwGrHOU7vpPba9szIbEuROcaYonKVyrgt6c2k_s6WF65v1NTmPn4WEwjE_8etfE1_BD9lVkao9ji7r6VtvoY35pcNZHRD18nr4QTNh3ONowHX01lVcITd79zRRNH_yZ_tUSPgK2nUS2d)
---
| | | Fellow American, Are K-12 schools, colleges, and universities in your state doing enough to provide students with a proper understanding of American history and government--including an understanding of the purposes and principles of the Constitution? There is reason to be doubtful. There seems to be a decreasing sense of patriotism among young Americans, and an increasing attraction to socialism and other ideas destructive of liberty. And have you noticed all the disturbing incidents taking place on college campuses, with students resorting to intimidation, threats, and violence to silence speakers with whom they disagree? Hillsdale is planning to redouble its efforts for the future of liberty. We will respond to these disturbing trends by expanding our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--especially for younger Americans. And as we form our strategy we'd like to hear from you: [**Please take our brief education survey here » **](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=95520f3d8a6141489e3d9b3fe159489f&_e=0A5Sqj8j7PisIZro5fsYCc0RzgU9Ombst5Kfk8Cbjzbug3iWDdnoginLVVbFyq0HZD7DfYz4zXtSMcL3dgJxuENdhISXLRKVjXYbvUmB-LeAH35UzydwPdLGLi5zkDsUdf6sXnUICTfwEr-6c3tRSPW77w-KcnnXpxtqQIdYyo6K59HZXWQL-YPrbSkxV1TvwgUOpDtd8GInR3NYjOyMClSYfXOBJdi2Ni_fdyleMNf7oO-eJ2wF56ONyIR27o2X6PW_ZtNFoynG6vN92jxdIIWYJsYfT1DG-vrT0dnpcklgFfhdqBthg0ssinVPdSp31U-wKljGB4Mmms8EdlsF-4aLiwd3BmYBL3Dn1bYcjeqhOcXH_8RNI3TqloXQ4gaD) We have done too many of our young people a disservice by failing to provide them with knowledge of our nation's great heritage of liberty. Even worse, many of our schools, corrupted by Left-wing bias, have pushed a false history of America as essentially flawed and unjust. This indoctrination will only continue once students return to campuses across the country. Hillsdale can remain independent and stay true to its mission because it refuses to accept one penny of taxpayer funding--even indirect aid like federal or state student grants and loans. This frees Hillsdale from burdensome and corrupting regulation, but it also means we are entirely dependent on the support of our friends nationwide. Will you help us understand how Americans look at education today so that we can plan our expanded outreach in the smartest way possible? [**Please take a few minutes to complete this survey and let us know your opinions on education today » **](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=95520f3d8a6141489e3d9b3fe159489f&_e=0A5Sqj8j7PisIZro5fsYCc0RzgU9Ombst5Kfk8Cbjzbug3iWDdnoginLVVbFyq0HZD7DfYz4zXtSMcL3dgJxuENdhISXLRKVjXYbvUmB-LeAH35UzydwPdLGLi5zkDsUdf6sXnUICTfwEr-6c3tRSPW77w-KcnnXpxtqQIdYyo6K59HZXWQL-YPrbSkxV1TvwgUOpDtd8GInR3NYjOyMClSYfXOBJdi2Ni_fdyleMNd3guzuEL16a45VwJP88IvOnypFan5WNivcbxJ1qrfiJPCh9moQ_h1s1tg30-98wx8gnGCf_jczYbgoh1EbmOAROBYhbNI3pdjZSK-kz3DtI5QpJe20u7smCoRjdpxgd8Buf0NyyqNK01iPUSBSVryC) I am deeply grateful for your friendship.
---
Warm Regards,
Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

Sent to Conservative Liberty Wire subscribers.
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

One thing is for sure: we need a MAJOR push if we’re going to meet this goal, which is why I’m activating a limited-time **6X MATCH **on all contributions until our end of month deadline.

| | | [](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxFUEFOwzAQfE1yS-TYaZwecgBaEEIFxAVxQo530xrFibEdCryeTShFslbamfFodrApKrkqeFFWMoVGVapDSE3DGResEDQFWxV527VFua6lVKyTgmFSMrTK9Lkqjsr7cbS5Hm16aKRSCKwW6xo0gCg7LKGSa11j0UmmdNo3hxhdSMRFwq_pBdSTR8gPpu8DqB5zhInw8z5rJudGHzOKhl71JsTMKYc-zBbieor2NYyT15iIjfNjcKijGfYJr2bKIpjJErUkPoFaWafMfiD43_XP9FcxDhGHSILtZpdBm50TZWhZ2WaMcZIGTYrdHTW43a1pfx16AwS9fH4_tY_Pk64X8GCAbt7AXt4-2hFS34A7kqEJlaQy90uZc4WUqzfdV5PIy4Tz5RvnS1v8_eVo_fRm726yhw-fvVf3djWT_Ipm_HJ4Vp5M8tPFPJGbH71ZnUw)

| |
Dear Fellow American, “The Constitution is kind of trash.” That’s what a guest—with an Ivy League degree—said recently on a highly-rated daytime talk show. You’ve likely seen how “progressives” in the media, Big Tech, and politics are amplifying attacks on our nation’s principles of limited government and personal liberty with outrageous statements like “The Constitution is kind of trash.” And like that television pundit I mentioned, they are pushing a narrative that our Constitution is **flawed** , **outdated** , and **incapable** of dealing with the challenges of our time. Thankfully, a few early champions of the Constitution—Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison—gave you and me the perfect guide to understanding its timeless principles: _The Federalist Papers_.
---
| | Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described them as “the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written.” And these documents are just as relevant today as they were back then. If we’re serious about solving the current issues in our country, we shouldn’t run from them. We should embrace them. **That’s why I want to send you our entire 10-lesson course,["_The Federalist Papers_ ,"](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxFUEFugzAQfA3cQMYGmxw4tCGpqihtT5F6qgxewBHGjm0a5fc1NE0la6WdHc_ODlQZZUWGs5yyWFSc8g5ELCuMMEEZCZWgIkubrsnyTckYRx0jCKIcgeJyTHl25dZqrdJWq3ioOOZZSZq2Y0UHXUMaKMuuJDTPgRWEFvFYDd4bF5GnCO_Dc9DOFkQ6yHF0go-QgpgD_ugXzmyMtj4J1sDyUTqfGG7AukWC7GevvpyebQsRqY3VzkDr5dRHmC4jBULOKoxWx3ew5cpw2U8B_lf9E_1l6MnD5ANhVx8T0SQPRwkolDcJQjhQXRsYx0NIcHfchP5rGqVYlm3JmdbD6TSt4CBFuLkWPXv9UFrEthLmGgSloyyE2a9hLhEGX6PsblXEniOM128Yr2nhy-dV2fmsDi_J-7dNLvRNFcsQb0P1NwMP5l0kvV-MI1b_AKqnnEo)**** on DVD today when you make a tax-deductible donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.**

At a time when Americans are facing real issues, House Republicans are trying to veer us back to the dark ages.
Instead of protecting reproductive rights, House Republicans have rushed to introduce nearly a dozen anti-choice bills.
While gun violence increases, Republicans are silent.
And while families struggle to make ends meet, House Republicans are threatening to make massive cuts to Social Security and Medicare.
_This_ is what Republicans are choosing to do with their majority. We deserve better.
**Jason is a common sense leader, working to deliver real results for hardworking Americans. He’s counting on our help to stand up to extremism — starting today.**

Team, Dr. Anthony Fauci just retired from government after over **_50 YEARS_** of public service!

Dr. Fauci has devoted his entire career to serving our country. He's guided us through MULTIPLE public health crises, including the COVID-19 pandemic -- but despite his decades of service, **Republicans have continued to attack and smear his reputation!**

That’s why we're organizing a MASSIVE thank you card to stand with Dr. Fauci and let him know how grateful we are for his decades of service. But we need 33 more Democrats from Pennsylvania to sign on if we're going to hit our 50,000 signature goal! **Please, before the midnight deadline:**

subject: I’m one of only three
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF SHERROD BROWN
body:
Democratic Senators in states Trump won |
---

| | | | Did you know there are only three Democratic Senators representing states Donald Trump won in 2020? **I’m one of them.** That makes me a top 2024 target for Mitch McConnell and the GOP. Frankly, this is going to be one of our toughest races yet. It won’t be easy but that’s why we’re starting early -- staffing up, planning our strategy, and raising the funds needed to execute it. [_**Your contributions -- no matter how big or small -- help us run a winning campaign. Adam Schiff!_ | [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/stand-with-schiff/?source=VPP_20230130_EMPET_E3_T0_AC&t=6&akid=6208%2E878179%2EV0Ta-L) | **Matt Gaetz introduces bill barring Adam Schiff from receiving classified information**

**While MAGA Republicans promote and defend extremists like:**

❌ _Lauren Boebert_
❌ _Matt Gaetz_
❌ _George Santos_

They’re all-out attacking incredible Democrats like Rep. Adam Schiff trying to hold Trump accountable and protect our Democracy!

[**Rep. Schiff’s work on the Jan. 6th Committee was so important to uncovering the truth – so it’s critical we step up to defend him now, before it’s too late! Please, sign our petition now to stand with Adam Schiff! »** ](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/stand-with-schiff/?source=VPP_20230130_EMPET_E3_T0_AC&t=8&akid=6208%2E878179%2EV0Ta-L)

body:

Fellow Patriot, This is one of my biggest fights yet. Turning Point USA is LEADING THE CHARGE against the World Economic Forum and its radical Great Reset agenda -- and I want to make sure America-loving patriots like YOU know how you can help STOP this dangerous scheme.

Peter, We have just 24 hours before our first end-of-month deadline of the year, and we’re still pacing behind on our goal. I hate when emails act like the sky is falling, or all hope will be lost if you don’t chip in a few bucks right now. They’re trying to scare you into donating — I’m not here to do that. I’ll just be straight with you: We rely almost entirely on donations we receive from emails like this one to power everything we do. From supporting amazing frontline candidates, to running polls, or advocating for important issues — all of it is only possible because folks like you chip in. clean_body: | = Peter, We have just 24 hours before our first end-of-month deadline of the year, and we’re still pacing behind on our goal. I hate when emails act like the sky is falling, or all hope will be lost if you don’t chip in a few bucks right now. They’re trying to scare you into donating — I’m not here to do that. Friend,

name: Mark Warren
subject: Deadline approaching
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-jan23?refcode=013023 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-jan23?refcode=013023]
Friend,
Our first fundraising deadline of 2023 is almost here. This January 31st fundraising deadline is crucial as we look ahead to 2024. Our fundraising in a non-election year is key for being able to hire great staff when the campaign ramps up and run the programs we need to in order to keep our progressive House DFL majority.
We’ve still got a ways to go to meet our monthly fundraising goal, friend. We’re $2,316 away from this goal, but I know we can do it with support from DFLers like you. Will you help us meet this critical deadline goal?
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
Donate $15 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-jan23?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=013023]
Donate $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-jan23?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=013023]
Donate $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-jan23?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=013023]
Donate $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-jan23?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=013023]
Donate Other [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-jan23?express_lane_other=true&refcode=013023]
Thank you for your support, friend. With your help I know we can meet our goal.
Mark Warren
Finance Director
Minnesota House DFL
Contribute [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-jan23?refcode=013023]
